amount.amount: The monetary value associated with the specific combination of year, status, type, category, and class, representing the budget or actual expenditure figure.

quarter.quarter: The specific quarter and year (e.g., 1995-Q1) for which the economic indicator is reported, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data record.

level_1.level_1: The name of the economic indicator being measured, categorizing the type of data (e.g., Gross Domestic Product At 2010 Market Prices) for each quarter.

value.value: The numerical measurement (percentage or rate) of the economic indicator for the given quarter, representing the quantitative value associated with that time period and indicator.

year.year: The release year of the film, indicating when the media work was originally produced or published.

title.title: The name of the film or media title, serving as the primary identifier for the classified work.

actors.actors: The cast members who performed in the film, listing key participants in the media production.

producers.producers: The individuals or entities responsible for producing the film, detailing the production leadership.

directors.directors: The person(s) who directed the film, identifying the primary creative controller of the work.

language.language: The primary spoken language of the film, specifying the linguistic version being classified.

format.format: The physical or digital media format of the release (e.g., DVD, BLU-RAY), describing the distribution medium.

rating.rating: The content rating assigned to the film (e.g., PG, NC16), classifying its suitability for different age groups.

decision.decision: The outcome of the classification review (e.g., 'Passed Clean'), stating the final determination for the film.

duration.duration: The runtime of the film in minutes, measuring the length of the media content.

consumer_advice.consumer_advice: Descriptive text advising consumers about content elements (e.g., violence, language) that influenced the rating.

general_info.general_info: A detailed summary and classification rationale for the film, providing context and justification for the decision.

decision_date.decision_date: The date when the classification decision was officially made, recording when the rating was assigned.

year.year: The calendar year when the import price index measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for the index value of a specific product category.

level_1.level_1: The broad classification of the price index, consistently 'Import Price Index - Overall Items' in this data, serving as the parent category for all specific product groups.

level_2.level_2: The specific product category or commodity group for which the import price index is being measured, representing the main entity or subject in this dataset.

value.value: The numerical import price index value for a specific product category in a given year, representing a relative price measurement typically compared to a base period.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year for which the GST statistics are reported, providing temporal context for the economic sector data.

economic_sector.economic_sector: The industry or economic category being analyzed, serving as the primary entity for which GST statistics are tracked.

no_of_businesses.no_of_businesses: The count of businesses within the economic sector that are registered for GST, representing the sector's size in terms of registered entities.

percentage_of_businesses_in_net_gst_refu.percentage_of_businesses_in_net_gst_refu: The proportion of businesses in the sector that received more GST refunds than they paid, indicating the sector's net refund status.

net_gst_contribution.net_gst_contribution: The total net GST amount contributed by the economic sector (GST collected minus refunds), showing the sector's financial impact on GST revenue.

percentage_of_net_gst_contribution.percentage_of_net_gst_contribution: The sector's share of total net GST contributions across all sectors, indicating its relative importance to overall GST revenue.

year.year: The calendar year for which training program data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for organizing annual training statistics.

no_of_training_places.no_of_training_places: The total number of training places or slots available in correctional facilities during the specified year, representing the capacity of the training program.

no_of_inmates_trained.no_of_inmates_trained: The actual number of inmates who participated in and completed training programs during the specified year, indicating program utilization and participation rates.

year.year: The calendar year when the measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for when the data point was collected for each discipline.

disciplines_of_study.disciplines_of_study: The academic discipline or field of study being tracked, representing the main subject category for this statistical data. This column categorizes different educational or professional fields.

number.number: A quantitative count or measurement associated with each discipline in a given year, likely representing student enrollment, graduate counts, or participation numbers.

month.month: The year and month of the recorded measurement, serving as the primary temporal dimension for tracking industry performance over time.

level_1.level_1: A high-level classification category (e.g., 'Total') that groups related industries, providing a broad sector context for the measurement.

level_2.level_2: The specific industry or manufacturing sub-sector being measured, detailing the particular area of economic activity within the broader category.

value.value: The numeric measurement or metric (such as production index, output value, or performance indicator) for the specified industry in the given month.

year.year: The calendar year for which the facility count data is reported, providing the temporal context for this record of facility statistics.

institution_type.institution_type: The broad category of healthcare institution (e.g., Primary Care, Dental, Pharmacy) to which this specific facility type belongs, classifying the main entity at a high level.

sector.sector: The ownership or funding sector (Public or Private) of the facilities, indicating whether they are government-operated or privately run.

facility_type_b.facility_type_b: The specific, detailed classification of the healthcare facility (e.g., Polyclinics, General Practitioner Clinics), serving as the primary entity for which counts are tracked.

no_of_facilities.no_of_facilities: The total number of facilities of the specified type (facility_type_b) operating in the given sector and year, representing the quantitative measure for this record.

year.year: The specific calendar year for which the licensed food establishment data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for this dataset.

level_1.level_1: A categorical classification describing what type of establishment count is being measured (in this dataset, consistently 'Total Licensed Food Establishments').

value.value: The numerical count of licensed food establishments for the corresponding year, representing the quantitative measurement of establishments.

year.year: The calendar year for which judicial execution data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for tracking execution statistics over time.

types_of_judical_executions.types_of_judical_executions: The category or classification of crimes for which judicial executions were carried out, indicating the legal basis for capital punishment in each recorded instance.

number_of_judical_executions.number_of_judical_executions: The count of judicial executions performed for each crime type in the corresponding year, quantifying the frequency of capital punishment implementation.

date.date: The calendar date for which the weather measurements were recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each observation entry.

station.station: The name of the meteorological station where the weather data was collected, identifying the specific location for this set of daily measurements.

daily_rainfall_total.daily_rainfall_total: The total amount of rainfall recorded at the station for the given date, measured in millimeters (mm).

mean_temperature.mean_temperature: The average temperature recorded at the station over the course of the specified date, measured in degrees Celsius.

maximum_temperature.maximum_temperature: The highest temperature recorded at the station on the given date, representing the daily peak in degrees Celsius.

minimum_temperature.minimum_temperature: The lowest temperature recorded at the station on the given date, representing the daily low in degrees Celsius.

mean_wind_speed.mean_wind_speed: The average wind speed recorded at the station for the specified date, typically measured in kilometers per hour (km/h).

max_wind_speed.max_wind_speed: The highest instantaneous wind speed (gust) recorded at the station on the given date, measured in kilometers per hour (km/h).

year.year: The calendar year when the marriage statistics were recorded, serving as the temporal reference point for all education-level pairing data.

level_1.level_1: The education level category for brides in the marriage statistics, representing one dimension of the educational pairing analysis for each year.

level_2.level_2: The education level category for grooms in the marriage statistics, representing the second dimension of the educational pairing analysis for each year.

value.value: The count of marriages recorded for the specific year and education-level pairing, quantifying the volume of marriages for that demographic combination.

company_name.company_name: The name of the company that holds the medicinal product license, serving as the primary identifier for each license record in the dataset.

license_type.license_type: The specific category of medicinal product license held by the company, such as 'Import Licence' or 'Wholesale Licence', classifying the license's purpose and scope.

expiry_date.expiry_date: The date when the company's medicinal product license is due to expire, indicating the validity period of the license.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: Identifies the government agency (e.g., ACRA) responsible for issuing the Unique Entity Number, indicating the source of the entity's registration record.

uen.uen: The Unique Entity Number serving as the primary identifier for a registered business entity in Singapore, uniquely distinguishing it from all other entities.

entity_name.entity_name: The official registered name of the business entity, representing its legal identity for commercial and regulatory purposes.

entity_type_description.entity_type_description: Describes the legal form of the entity, such as 'Local Company' or 'Business', classifying its fundamental organizational structure.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: Specifies the legal constitution or ownership structure of the entity, for example 'Sole Proprietor' or 'Partnership'.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: Indicates the current operational and legal status of the entity, such as 'Live Company', 'Struck Off', or 'Dissolved'.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date when the business entity was first formally registered or incorporated, marking its legal inception.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The specific date on which the Unique Entity Number was issued to the business entity by the registration agency.

address_type.address_type: Classifies the type of address registered for the entity, such as a local ('LOCAL') business address.

block.block: The block number component of the entity's registered address, part of its physical location details.

street_name.street_name: The street name component of the entity's registered address, specifying the road where it is located.

level_no.level_no: The floor or level number within a building, forming part of the entity's detailed registered address.

unit_no.unit_no: The unit or office number within a building level, providing the specific location of the entity's premises.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building where the entity is located, as part of its complete registered address.

postal_code.postal_code: The postal code for the entity's registered address, used for mail delivery and geographic identification.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: The count of registered charges (typically financial securities or liabilities) recorded against the business entity.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Singapore Standard Industrial Classification code numerically representing the entity's main business activity.

primary_ssic_description.primary_ssic_description: A textual description of the entity's primary business activity, as defined by the SSIC code.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: A secondary SSIC code indicating an additional or subsidiary line of business activity for the entity, if applicable.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: The description corresponding to the secondary SSIC code, detailing the entity's additional business activity.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The total number of officers (such as directors, partners, or secretaries) formally associated with the business entity.

month.month: The month and year when the births occurred, providing the temporal context for tracking birth statistics over time.

mother_race.mother_race: The ethnic group of the mother (Chinese, Malays, Indians), categorizing births by maternal ethnicity for demographic analysis.

birth_attendant.birth_attendant: The type of healthcare professional who attended the birth, classifying births by the medical service provider category and sector.

birth_count.birth_count: The number of births recorded for the specific combination of month, mother's race, and birth attendant type, representing the core quantitative measurement in this dataset.

quarter.quarter: The calendar quarter (year and quarter) for which the job vacancy statistics are reported, serving as the primary temporal context for the data.

industry1.industry1: The primary, high-level industry sector classification (e.g., Services, Manufacturing) associated with the job vacancy rate measurement for the given quarter.

industry2.industry2: A more detailed industry classification that falls under the broader industry1 category, providing granular sector details for the vacancy data in that quarter.

occupation1.occupation1: The major occupational group classification (e.g., clerical staff, professionals, labourers) for which the job vacancy rate is measured within the specified quarter and industry.

job_vacancy_rate.job_vacancy_rate: The percentage of job positions that are vacant (unfilled) for the specific combination of quarter, industry, and occupation, representing the tightness of the labor market.

personalincome.personalincome: The personal income level reported by respondents within each age group, showing income distribution across different age demographics with categories ranging from 'Below $1,000' to '$8,000-$9,999' and including 'No personal income' and 'Prefer not to answer' options.

ban_age.ban_age: The age group category of survey respondents, representing demographic segmentation by age ranges (e.g., 25-34 yo, 35-44 yo). This serves as the primary demographic classification for analyzing other attributes.

socialnetwork_dp03.socialnetwork_dp03: A binary indicator of whether respondents use social networks (Yes/No), showing social media adoption patterns across different age and income groups, likely from a survey question about social network usage.

respondent_serial.respondent_serial: A unique numeric identifier for each survey participant, serving as the primary key to track individual respondents in the dataset.

q20_q212.q20_q212: A survey question response indicating the participant's answer (Yes, No, or missing represented by '-'), representing a categorical attribute of the respondent.

gender.gender: The biological sex or gender identity of the survey respondent (Male or Female), representing a demographic characteristic of the participant.

socialnetwork_dp10.socialnetwork_dp10: A response to a social network-related survey question (Yes or No), indicating whether the respondent has a specific social network characteristic or behavior.

socialnetwork_dp07.socialnetwork_dp07: Another social network-related survey question response (Yes or No), representing a different aspect of the respondent's social network attributes or behaviors.

month.month: The year and month for which the statistics are reported, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data record.

consumer_numbers.consumer_numbers: The count of consumer accounts recorded for the specified month, representing the scale of consumer participation in that period.

organisation_accounts.organisation_accounts: The count of organization accounts recorded for the specified month, indicating the level of organizational engagement during that time.

numbers_checked_million.numbers_checked_million: The volume of checks or verifications performed in the specified month, measured in millions, quantifying the activity level for the period.

year.year: The calendar year for which the data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal context for all observations in the dataset.

category.category: The classification or type of item (e.g., vehicle category) being counted, representing a specific group within the given year.

number.number: The count or quantity of items belonging to the specified category for the corresponding year, providing the numerical measurement for each record.

quarter.quarter: The year and quarter (e.g., 2010-Q1) for which the median rental data is reported, serving as the primary temporal period for this housing market statistic.

town.town: The geographical area or planning district in Singapore where the rental property is located, categorizing the data point by location.

flat_type.flat_type: The classification of the housing unit type (e.g., 1-Room, 4-Room, Executive), categorizing the rental data by property characteristics.

median_rent.median_rent: The median rental price recorded for the specified combination of quarter, town, and flat type, representing the central market value for such properties during that period.

month.month: The year and month for which the associated count is recorded, providing the temporal context for the data point related to the vehicle make.

make.make: The name of the vehicle manufacturer or brand, serving as the primary entity identifier for which the numerical count is tracked over time.

number.number: A numerical count (such as registrations or sales) associated with the specified vehicle make for the given month, representing the measured volume for that brand and time period.

service_type.service_type: The primary category or domain of services provided by the organization, such as 'Care and Support Services' or 'Active Ageing'. It classifies the main subject entity.

organisation.organisation: The name of the service provider or organization, serving as the primary identifier and main subject of this dataset.

address.address: The physical location of the organization, including building and street details. It is a descriptive property of the organization.

general_line.general_line: The main telephone contact number(s) for the organization. It is a contact attribute of the organization.

enquiry_email.enquiry_email: The email address designated for general inquiries to the organization. It is a contact attribute of the organization.

website.website: The official website URL of the organization. It is a digital contact and information attribute of the organization.

service_1.service_1: The primary or first-listed service offered by the organization. It describes a key function or offering of the organization.

service_2.service_2: A secondary service offered by the organization, if applicable. It describes an additional function or offering.

service_3.service_3: A tertiary service offered by the organization, if applicable. It describes a further function or offering.

service_4.service_4: An additional service offered by the organization, if applicable. It describes another function or offering.

service_5.service_5: Another additional service offered by the organization, if applicable. It describes a further function or offering.

services_6.services_6: A final listed service offered by the organization, if applicable (note the header name variation). It describes an additional function or offering.

newspaper_title.newspaper_title: The name of the newspaper publication containing the article, identifying the source publication for this content.

issue_id.issue_id: A unique identifier for the specific newspaper issue containing the article, linking to the publication instance.

issue_date.issue_date: The publication date of the newspaper issue containing the article, providing temporal context for when the content was published.

edition.edition: The edition number of the newspaper issue, indicating which version or printing of the issue contains this article.

page_id.page_id: A unique identifier for the specific page within the newspaper issue where the article appears, locating the article within the physical layout.

page_number.page_number: The numerical page number where the article is located within the newspaper issue, showing the article's position in the publication.

article_id.article_id: A unique identifier for each newspaper article, serving as the primary key for tracking individual content pieces in the database.

article_title.article_title: The headline or title of the newspaper article, describing the subject or topic of the content.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: The first 50 words of the article's text content, providing a preview or excerpt of the article's main content.

year.year: The calendar year for which the count data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for tracking changes over time in professional practice status.

sector.sector: The classification category indicating professional practice status, either 'Active Practice' or 'Not in Active Practice', representing the type of professional status being counted.

count.count: The numerical quantity of professionals or entities falling into each year-sector combination, measuring the volume of individuals in each practice status category for a given year.

year.year: The calendar year when the value-added measurement was recorded, providing the temporal context for each data point across different industry types.

type.type: The category or sector of cultural/creative activity being measured, serving as the primary classification for the value-added data (either Live Performing Arts or Recorded Music).

valueadded.valueadded: A quantitative metric measuring the economic contribution or performance value of each industry type in a given year, representing the core measurement in this dataset.

quarter.quarter: The specific three-month period (year and quarter) when the membership data was recorded, serving as the temporal identifier for this dataset.

investment_schm_type.investment_schm_type: The classification of CPF (Central Provident Fund) investment scheme type, either ordinary account or special account, indicating which program the member count data refers to for each quarter.

no_of_mbrs.no_of_mbrs: The number of members enrolled in the specified CPF investment scheme type during the given quarter, representing the participation volume measurement.

year.year: The calendar year when the data was collected or measured, providing the temporal context for the reported purchase value distribution percentage.

value_of_purchase.value_of_purchase: A categorical variable representing ranges of monetary amounts spent, serving as the primary subject for which distribution percentages are calculated.

percentage.percentage: The measured proportion (as a percentage) of the relevant population or sample that falls into the corresponding purchase value range for the specified year.

year.year: The calendar year when the participation data was recorded, providing temporal context for when the course category had the specified number of participants.

course_category.course_category: The classification or type of course/activity being offered, serving as the main subject that categorizes different educational or recreational programs.

no_of_participants.no_of_participants: The count of individuals who participated in the specified course category during the given year, measuring the enrollment or attendance volume for that program.

year.year: The calendar year for which the sectoral count data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for this dataset.

sector.sector: The classification category (e.g., Private Sector, Public Sector) that breaks down the annual count, representing the type of group being measured for each year.

count.count: The numerical tally or quantity of items (e.g., individuals, entities) recorded for a specific sector in a given year, representing the core measurement of this dataset.

year.year: The calendar year when the interest group count was recorded, providing temporal context for when the measurement was taken.

type_of_interest_groups.type_of_interest_groups: The category or classification of interest groups, representing the main subject being measured (e.g., COOKING & FOOD CULTURE, SPORTS & FITNESS).

no_of_interest_groups.no_of_interest_groups: The count or number of interest groups belonging to a specific type in a given year, representing the quantitative measurement of group prevalence.

issue_id.issue_id: A unique identifier for the specific newspaper issue (edition and date) in which this article was published, linking the article to its containing issue.

issue_date.issue_date: The publication date of the newspaper issue containing this article, providing the temporal context for when the article was released.

edition.edition: The edition number (e.g., first edition) of the newspaper issue that contains this article, indicating a specific print run.

page_id.page_id: A unique identifier for the specific physical page within the newspaper issue where this article is located, providing precise location metadata.

page_number.page_number: The sequential number of the page within the newspaper issue where this article appears, indicating its physical placement.

year.year: The calendar year for which the count of interest groups is reported, providing the temporal context for each data point.

type_of_interest_groups.type_of_interest_groups: The category or classification of the interest groups (e.g., Arts, Sports, Social Causes), serving as the primary entity being described and counted in the table.

no_of_interest_groups.no_of_interest_groups: The total number of interest groups recorded for a specific category in a given year, representing the quantitative measurement for the main subject.

year.year: The calendar year when the PSLE math performance was measured, serving as the primary temporal dimension for tracking educational outcomes over time.

race.race: The ethnic classification group for which the PSLE math performance is reported, including specific groups (Chinese, Malay, Indian, Others) and the aggregated 'Overall' category.

percentage_psle_math.percentage_psle_math: The percentage of students who passed the PSLE mathematics examination for the specified year and racial group, measuring educational achievement in mathematics.

year.year: The calendar year when the PSLE Mother Tongue Language performance data was recorded, providing temporal context for when each racial group's performance was measured.

race.race: The demographic or racial group category (Chinese, Indian, Malay, Others, or Overall) whose PSLE Mother Tongue Language performance is being tracked, serving as the primary entity in this dataset.

percentage_psle_mtl.percentage_psle_mtl: The percentage of students from each racial group who achieved a passing grade in the PSLE Mother Tongue Language examination, representing the academic performance measurement for each demographic category.

year.year: The calendar year when the educational attainment data was measured, providing temporal context for tracking changes over time in demographic education patterns.

level_1.level_1: The demographic age group and gender category (e.g., '30-39 Years (Total)', '40-49 Years (Males)'), serving as the primary subject entity for educational attainment analysis.

level_2.level_2: The highest educational qualification level achieved by individuals in the demographic group, categorizing the type of education attainment being measured.

value.value: The percentage or proportion of individuals within the specified demographic group who have attained the corresponding education level, representing the quantitative measurement of educational attainment.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year for which the resale transaction data is aggregated, providing the temporal context for the flat type statistics.

flat_type.flat_type: The classification of public housing flats by size and configuration (e.g., '3 room', 'Executive'), serving as the primary categorical entity for this dataset.

resale_transactions.resale_transactions: The total number of resale transactions recorded for a specific flat type within a given financial year, representing the transaction volume metric.

name.name: The full name of the registered professional, representing the individual associated with this registration record.

reg_no.reg_no: The unique registration number identifying each professional, serving as the primary key for this registry of individuals.

firm_name.firm_name: The name of the company or practice where the professional is employed or affiliated, indicating their organizational association.

firm_address.firm_address: The business address of the professional's firm, providing the physical location of their workplace in Singapore.

firm_phone.firm_phone: The contact telephone number for the professional's firm, serving as a business communication channel for the organization.

quarter.quarter: The specific three-month period (year and quarter) for which the project status and sales data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal context.

ec_completion_status.ec_completion_status: Indicates whether the Executive Condominium (EC) project had completed or uncompleted pre-requisites for sale during the quarter, categorizing the project's readiness.

sale_status.sale_status: Describes the market launch and sales outcome (e.g., Launched and Sold, Unsold, Not Launched Yet) for EC projects in that quarter.

units.units: The number of housing units associated with the specific combination of quarter, EC completion status, and sale status, quantifying the volume of units in that state.

year.year: The calendar year when the clearance rate measurement was taken, providing temporal context for the performance data across different justice divisions.

category.category: The organizational division or grouping within the justice system being measured, representing the main subject of this performance tracking data (e.g., Criminal Justice Division, Civil Justice Division).

clearance_rate_percentage.clearance_rate_percentage: The performance metric representing the clearance rate as a percentage, measuring case resolution efficiency for each justice division category in a given year.

country.country: The country where the survey respondent resides, with all shown records indicating Singapore as the location.

uen.uen: The Unique Entity Number, serving as the primary identifier for a registered business entity in Singapore.

street_name.street_name: The street name component of the entity's registered physical address.

level_no.level_no: The floor or level number within a building for the entity's registered address.

paid_up_capital1_others.paid_up_capital1_others: The monetary amount of paid-up capital attributed to other types of shares or capital instruments.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: The number of registered charges or liens against the business entity, indicating financial obligations or encumbrances.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Singapore Standard Industrial Classification code representing the main business activity of the entity.

primary_ssic_description.primary_ssic_description: The descriptive text explaining the primary business activity corresponding to the primary SSIC code.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: The secondary Singapore Standard Industrial Classification code for additional business activities of the entity.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: The descriptive text explaining the secondary business activity corresponding to the secondary SSIC code.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The number of officers, directors, or partners associated with the business entity in official capacities.

year.year: The calendar year for which the labor market statistics are recorded, serving as the temporal dimension for analyzing recruitment and resignation trends over time.

industry1.industry1: The industry sector classification (e.g., services, manufacturing, construction) for which the labor statistics are reported, categorizing the economic domain of the workforce data.

occupation1.occupation1: The occupational group classification (e.g., professional, production workers) for which the labor statistics are reported, specifying the job category within the industry.

recruitment_rate.recruitment_rate: The percentage rate of new hires or recruitment activity within the specified year, industry, and occupation combination, measuring workforce expansion.

resignation_rate.resignation_rate: The percentage rate of employee departures or resignations within the specified year, industry, and occupation combination, measuring workforce turnover.

quarter.quarter: The calendar quarter (year and quarter) for which the space inventory data is reported, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing the dataset.

sector.sector: The classification of space ownership or economic sector, either Private or Public, which categorizes the reported space metrics.

type_of_space.type_of_space: The functional category of the commercial property, such as Retail Space or Office Space, describing the kind of space being measured.

availability.availability: The occupancy status of the space, indicating whether it is Vacant or Available, defining the condition of the space inventory for the given period and category.

amount_of_space.amount_of_space: The total quantified area of commercial space (e.g., in square feet) that matches the specified quarter, sector, type, and availability status, representing the core measured fact in the dataset.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: The identifier for the government agency (e.g., ACRA) that issued the Unique Entity Number, indicating the source of the entity's registration.

uen.uen: The Unique Entity Number serving as the primary identifier for a registered business entity in Singapore, uniquely distinguishing each legal entity.

entity_name.entity_name: The official legal name of the registered business entity, representing its trading or corporate identity.

entity_type_description.entity_type_description: Describes the legal structure type of the entity, such as Business, LLP, or Local Company, classifying its fundamental organizational form.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: Specifies the business's constitutional form, such as Sole Proprietor, providing details on its ownership and governance structure.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: Indicates the current operational and legal status of the entity, such as Live, Struck Off, or Cancelled, showing its active or defunct state.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date when the business entity was first formally registered or incorporated, marking its legal inception.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The specific date on which the Unique Entity Number was issued to the business entity by the registration agency.

address_type.address_type: The classification of the registered address, such as LOCAL, specifying the nature of the entity's business location.

block.block: The block number component of the entity's registered address, part of its physical location details.

street_name.street_name: The street name component of the entity's registered address, identifying the road where it is located.

level_no.level_no: The floor or level number within a building, forming part of the entity's precise registered address.

unit_no.unit_no: The unit or office number within a building level, providing the specific location of the entity's registered address.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building where the entity is registered, if applicable, adding detail to the address.

postal_code.postal_code: The Singapore postal code for the entity's registered address, used for mail delivery and geographic identification.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: The number of registered charges (e.g., mortgages, debentures) against the entity, indicating financial encumbrances.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Singapore Standard Industrial Classification code numerically categorizing the entity's main business activity.

primary_ssic_description.primary_ssic_description: The textual description corresponding to the primary SSIC code, detailing the entity's principal line of business.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: A secondary SSIC code for categorizing an additional or subsidiary business activity conducted by the entity.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: The textual description of the secondary SSIC code, outlining the entity's other business operations.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The count of officers (e.g., directors, partners, secretaries) formally associated with the business entity.

quarter.quarter: The time period when the data was collected, using a year-quarter format (e.g., 2015-Q2), serving as the primary temporal identifier for this labor statistics dataset.

industry1.industry1: The broadest industry classification category, representing the highest level of industry grouping for which total paid hours are reported in that quarter.

industry2.industry2: A more specific industry classification that refines industry1, providing intermediate-level industry details for the labor statistics in that quarter.

industry3.industry3: The most detailed industry classification, representing the finest level of industry categorization for which total paid hours are measured in that quarter.

total_paid_hours.total_paid_hours: The total number of paid hours worked across the specified industry classification during the quarter, representing the quantitative labor measurement for that time period and industry combination.

year.year: The calendar year for which the overtime hours data is recorded, serving as the temporal context for all industry-specific measurements in this dataset.

industry1.industry1: The primary industry classification or sector grouping, providing the top-level categorization for analyzing overtime hours across different economic segments for each year.

industry2.industry2: The secondary or more detailed industry classification, offering a granular breakdown within the primary industry category to track overtime hours at a more specific sector level.

overtime_paid_hours.overtime_paid_hours: The number of overtime hours that were paid, representing the quantitative measurement of compensated extra work hours for each industry-year combination in the dataset.

year.year: The calendar year for which the financial expenditure data is reported, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing this dataset.

level_1.level_1: The top-level category of expenditure, classifying financial outflows into major groups such as operating expenses, capital expenditures, or other broad financial categories.

level_2.level_2: The detailed subcategory within the level_1 classification, specifying particular types of expenses like royalties, maintenance, or communications costs.

value.value: The monetary amount associated with the specific expenditure category for the given year, representing the financial magnitude of that expense type.

year_of_assessment.year_of_assessment: The tax assessment year for which the corporate tax data is aggregated, serving as the primary temporal identifier for this dataset.

no_of_companies_assessed.no_of_companies_assessed: The total number of companies that underwent tax assessment in this year, representing the population size for the aggregated statistics.

total_income.total_income: The combined income reported by all assessed companies for this assessment year, representing the aggregate revenue before deductions.

donations.donations: The total amount of charitable donations made by companies during this assessment year, typically representing tax-deductible contributions.

ci_before_reliefs_exemption.ci_before_reliefs_exemption: The aggregate chargeable income before applying tax reliefs and exemptions for this assessment year, representing the initial taxable income base.

group_relief.group_relief: The total amount of group relief claimed by companies during this assessment year, representing one type of tax reduction mechanism.

loss_carryback_relief.loss_carryback_relief: The total amount of loss carryback relief claimed by companies during this assessment year, representing tax relief for prior period losses.

tax_exemption.tax_exemption: The total amount of tax exemptions granted to companies during this assessment year, representing another form of tax reduction.

ci.ci: The aggregate chargeable income after applying all reliefs and exemptions for this assessment year, representing the final taxable income amount.

gross_tax_payable.gross_tax_payable: The total tax liability calculated for all companies before any tax credits or set-offs for this assessment year.

tax_deducted_at_source.tax_deducted_at_source: The total amount of tax already deducted at source (withholding tax) for this assessment year, representing prepaid tax amounts.

other_tax_set_offs.other_tax_set_offs: Additional tax credits or set-offs applied during this assessment year beyond tax deducted at source.

net_tax_assessed.net_tax_assessed: The final net tax amount assessed for all companies after all adjustments for this assessment year, representing the actual tax payable.

year.year: The calendar year for which demographic data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each observation period.

male.male: The count of male individuals recorded for the specified year, representing one component of the demographic breakdown for that period.

female.female: The count of female individuals recorded for the specified year, representing the other component of the demographic breakdown for that period.

total.total: The aggregate count of all individuals (male + female) for the specified year, providing the overall demographic total for that observation period.

year.year: The calendar year when the employment change measurement was recorded, providing the temporal context for this employment data point.

industry1.industry1: The broadest industry sector classification (e.g., services, manufacturing), representing the top-level category for this employment observation.

industry2.industry2: A more specific industry classification within the industry1 category, providing intermediate-level detail about the employment sector.

industry3.industry3: The most detailed industry classification within industry2, specifying the precise sub-sector or activity for this employment measurement.

employment_change.employment_change: The percentage change in employment for the specified industry and year, representing the core metric of workforce growth or decline.

month.month: The year and month for which the data point is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for this time-series dataset.

level_1.level_1: The top-level classification category for the data; in this dataset, it consistently has the value 'Total', indicating aggregated figures.

level_2.level_2: The specific sub-category of food service establishment (e.g., Restaurants, Fast Food Outlets) for which the value is reported, providing detailed classification.

value.value: The quantitative measurement or index value (likely a percentage or score) associated with the specified month and establishment category.

year.year: The calendar year for which the expenditure data is reported, providing the temporal context for the financial measurement per institution type.

type_of_educational_institution.type_of_educational_institution: The category or level of the educational institution (e.g., Primary Schools, Polytechnics), serving as the main entity for which expenditure is tracked.

expenditure_per_student.expenditure_per_student: The amount of money spent per student for the specified type of educational institution in the given year, representing a key financial performance metric.

from.from: The effective start date when this stamp duty rate configuration becomes applicable, serving as the temporal reference point for the entire rate schedule.

stamp_duty_type.stamp_duty_type: The category of stamp duty tax being applied, such as Additional Buyer's Stamp Duty or Buyer's Stamp Duty, which determines the tax regime for this rate entry.

document_type.document_type: The type of legal document or property transaction to which this stamp duty rate applies, specifying the contractual context for the taxation.

transaction_type.transaction_type: The specific buyer category or transaction scenario that qualifies for this stamp duty rate, defining the applicability conditions based on buyer status and property count.

duty_levied_on.duty_levied_on: The valuation basis used for calculating the stamp duty amount, typically the higher of purchase price or market value, which serves as the taxable base.

duty_rate.duty_rate: The percentage rate applied to calculate the stamp duty amount, representing the tax burden for the specified transaction type under this configuration.

from.from: The effective start date from which this specific duty rule applies, establishing the temporal validity for the associated conveyance type and conditions.

document_type.document_type: The category of legal conveyance transaction, such as equity interest transfers in property-holding entities, serving as the primary subject for these duty regulations.

underlying_property_definition.underlying_property_definition: The specific legal definition paragraph (from statute s23(21)) that determines what constitutes the 'underlying property' for the purpose of applying duty rules to the conveyance type.

duty_levied_on.duty_levied_on: The description of the valuation basis or conditional trigger point upon which the stamp duty is calculated for the given conveyance type, often based on property market value brackets.

duty_formula.duty_formula: The mathematical expression used to compute the stamp duty amount, incorporating variables that represent components like ownership ratios and property values relevant to the conveyance.

duty_rate.duty_rate: The applicable stamp duty percentage rate that is used within the calculation formula for the specified conveyance type, condition, and effective period.

year.year: The calendar year for which the data point is recorded, serving as the primary temporal context for the associated geographic and value information.

level_1.level_1: A top-level geographic or categorical classification for the data, typically indicating an aggregate summary level such as 'Total' for the subsequent region and country.

level_2.level_2: A major geographic region (e.g., Europe, Asia) to which the specific country in level_3 belongs, providing regional context for the annual data point.

level_3.level_3: The specific country, territory, or sub-region name that is the primary geographic entity for the recorded annual value.

value.value: The numeric measurement or figure associated with the specified year, region, and country, representing the core quantitative data point (which may be positive, negative, or null).

shs_year.shs_year: The survey year when the data was collected, providing temporal context for the housing statistics.

elderly_pop.elderly_pop: The population category classification, distinguishing between Elderly, Future Elderly, and All residents in the housing statistics.

flat_type.flat_type: The type of public housing flat, categorizing residential units as 1-room, 3-room, or 5-room apartments.

percentage.percentage: The statistical measurement representing the proportion or distribution percentage for the specific combination of year, population group, and flat type.

year.year: The calendar year for which the admissions data is reported, providing the temporal context for the count associated with each education level.

admissions_by_education_level.admissions_by_education_level: The categorical classification of an individual's highest educational attainment, serving as the primary dimension for grouping and analyzing admission statistics.

number_of_admissions.number_of_admissions: The total count of individuals admitted, corresponding to the specified education level and year, representing the quantitative measure for this dataset.

year.year: Indicates the calendar year when the computer usage measurement was recorded for each age group, providing temporal context for tracking usage trends over time.

age.age: Represents demographic age groups being studied, serving as the primary categorical classification that defines population segments for computer usage analysis.

computer_usage.computer_usage: Measures the percentage of individuals within each age group who use computers, representing the penetration rate of computer adoption for specific demographics in given years.

year.year: The calendar year for which the admission data is recorded, providing the temporal context for the count associated with each gender group.

admissions_by_gender.admissions_by_gender: The gender classification ('Male' or 'Female') for the admissions data, serving as the primary categorical subject of the record.

number_of_admissions.number_of_admissions: The total count of admissions recorded for the specified gender in the given year, representing the quantitative measurement for this subject.

year.year: The calendar year for which inmate work program data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing and comparing annual statistics.

no_of_inmates_score_wkprg.no_of_inmates_score_wkprg: The total number of inmates who scored or participated in work programs during the specified year, representing the absolute count of program participants.

percentage_of_inmates_engaged_wkprg.percentage_of_inmates_engaged_wkprg: The proportion of inmates engaged in work programs expressed as a percentage for the given year, indicating program participation rates relative to the inmate population.

year.year: The calendar year when the job vacancy data was recorded, providing temporal context for when these employment opportunities were available.

industry1.industry1: The primary industry sector classification for the job vacancy, representing the broad economic sector where the employment opportunity exists.

industry2.industry2: A more detailed industry classification within the primary sector, specifying the particular sub-industry or service area for the job vacancy.

occupation1.occupation1: The occupational classification of the job vacancy, describing the type of work or professional category for the available position.

job_vacancy.job_vacancy: The number of available job positions or employment opportunities, representing the quantitative measure of labor market demand across the specified dimensions.

centre_code.centre_code: A unique identifier code for each childcare center, serving as the primary key for tracking individual preschool facilities and their associated charges.

centre_name.centre_name: The official name of the childcare center, representing the specific preschool facility associated with the centre_code.

incidental_charges.incidental_charges: The type of additional fee or deposit required by the childcare center, categorizing various mandatory and optional charges such as deposits, registration fees, uniforms, and media services.

frequency.frequency: How often the incidental charge occurs, indicating whether it's a one-time payment or recurring (e.g., annually).

amount.amount: The monetary value of the incidental charge in Singapore dollars, representing the cost that parents/guardians must pay for the specified service or requirement.

app_no.app_no: The application number associated with this tobacco license, likely serving as a reference to the original permit request.

licence_no.licence_no: The unique identifier for the tobacco license, serving as the primary key for the licensed entity.

company_name.company_name: The legal name of the company authorized to deal in tobacco products under this license.

valid_period.valid_period: The start and end date defining the license's period of validity, indicating when the authorization is active.

company_address.company_address: The registered business address of the licensed company, specifying its physical location.

tobacco_types.tobacco_types: The specific category of tobacco products (e.g., cigars, pipe tobacco) that this license permits the company to deal in.

year.year: The calendar year when the measurement was taken, indicating the temporal point for the recorded healthcare professional density value.

level_1.level_1: The category of healthcare professional density being measured, such as Dentists, Doctors, or Nurses per 10,000 total population. This is the main subject defining what type of metric is recorded.

value.value: The numeric measurement representing the density of healthcare professionals per 10,000 total population for the specified category and year.

month.month: The year and month for which birth statistics are aggregated, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing the data.

mother_race.mother_race: The ethnic classification of the mother (e.g., MALAYS, CHINESE, INDIANS, OTHERS) for the births counted, representing a key demographic attribute.

place_of_birth.place_of_birth: The type of facility or location where the births occurred (e.g., Public/Private Sector Hospitals, Residence, Other Locations), indicating the birth setting.

birth_count.birth_count: The total number of births recorded for the specific combination of month, mother's race, and place of birth, representing the aggregated count metric.

year.year: The calendar year for which the company count data is recorded, providing the temporal context for the artform statistics.

artform.artform: The category or discipline of artistic practice (e.g., Dance, Theatre, Visual Arts), serving as the primary subject for which company counts are tracked.

companies.companies: The number of companies recorded within a specific artform category for a given year, representing a quantitative measure of activity or presence in that sector.

year.year: The calendar year when the measurement was recorded, providing the temporal context for when the category's value was observed.

level_1.level_1: The category or sector classification (e.g., Education, Arts & Heritage, Religious) being measured, serving as the primary entity for this dataset.

value.value: The numerical measurement or metric associated with a specific category in a given year, representing the quantitative data point for that category-year combination.

academic_year.academic_year: The year for which the course entry information is applicable, providing temporal context for the cut-off point and course offering.

jae_cluster.jae_cluster: The broad disciplinary category or faculty grouping to which the course belongs, classifying the academic field of study.

jae_course_code.jae_course_code: A unique alphanumeric code identifying a specific diploma or academic programme, serving as the primary course identifier.

course_name.course_name: The full official title of the academic programme or diploma, describing the specific area of study represented by the course code.

gceo_cut_off_point.gceo_cut_off_point: The entry score requirement (presented as a single value or a range) for the General Certificate of Education Ordinary Level (GCE O-Level) needed for admission to the course in the given academic year.

calendar_year.calendar_year: The year for which the LPA registration data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension that organizes this time-series dataset.

indicator_type.indicator_type: A categorical descriptor specifying the type of measurement being tracked, which in this dataset is consistently 'number of registered LPAs' across all records.

value.value: The quantitative measurement representing the count of registered Lasting Powers of Attorney (LPAs) for each corresponding calendar year, showing the volume of registrations over time.

year.year: The calendar year for which the establishment count is reported, providing the temporal context for each data point.

level_1.level_1: The top-level industry classification (SSIC 47 - Total Retail Trade) that encompasses all the specific retail sub-categories listed in the data.

level_2.level_2: A specific sub-category within the retail trade industry (e.g., General Merchandise), serving as the primary entity for which establishment counts are tracked over time.

value.value: The number of establishments (count) for the corresponding retail sub-category in the specified year, representing the quantitative measure for this dataset.

shs.shs: The survey year when the data was collected (e.g., 2008, 2013), providing temporal context for the household statistics.

flat_type.flat_type: The type of housing unit or apartment being analyzed, serving as the primary classification for household data in this survey.

no_of_income_earners.no_of_income_earners: The number of individuals earning income within households of the specified flat type, categorizing households by their economic contributors.

percentage.percentage: The proportion of households with the specified combination of flat type, survey year, and number of income earners, representing statistical distribution data.

newspaper_title.newspaper_title: The name of the newspaper that published the article, identifying the publication source for this content.

issue_id.issue_id: A unique identifier for the specific newspaper issue in which this article appears, linking the article to its parent publication instance.

issue_date.issue_date: The publication date of the newspaper issue containing this article, providing the temporal context for when the article was published.

edition.edition: The edition number or identifier of the newspaper issue, specifying a particular version or print run of that day's publication.

page_id.page_id: A unique identifier for the specific page within the newspaper issue where this article is located, linking the article to its physical/contextual location.

page_number.page_number: The sequential page number within the newspaper issue where the article appears, indicating its positional order.

article_id.article_id: A unique identifier for the individual newspaper article, serving as the primary key for this record of content.

article_title.article_title: The headline or title of the newspaper article, describing the main topic or subject of the content.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: The first approximately 50 words of the article's body text, providing a sample or preview of the article's full content.

year.year: The calendar year when the math performance measurement was taken, providing temporal context for each racial group's data point.

race.race: Identifies the demographic group whose math performance is being measured, serving as the primary entity for this educational data analysis.

percentage_pass_math.percentage_pass_math: The percentage of students who passed mathematics assessments, representing the academic performance measurement for each racial group in the specified year.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year for which the case statistics are reported, serving as the primary temporal context for tracking case volumes over time.

case_type.case_type: The classification of tax dispute resolution mechanisms, distinguishing between Mutual Agreement Procedures and Advance Pricing Arrangements as two types of international tax cases.

status.status: The current state or outcome of cases, indicating whether they are carried over from previous periods (Balance brought forward) or resolved (Completed) during the reported year.

no_of_cases.no_of_cases: The count of cases for the given combination of year, type, and status, where positive values represent cases carried forward and negative values indicate cases completed or removed from the backlog.

post_secondary_course.post_secondary_course: The type of post-secondary educational program or course track. This is the main subject of the table, categorizing the data by educational pathway.

year.year: The calendar year for which the associated percentage metric is recorded. This is a temporal attribute of the data point for each course type.

percentage.percentage: A quantitative metric (likely a rate, share, or proportion) associated with the specific post-secondary course in the given year. This is a measurement value describing an outcome or characteristic for that course-year combination.

year.year: Indicates the calendar year when the population measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for when each age group's population count was observed.

population_by_age_group.population_by_age_group: Represents different demographic segments categorized by age ranges, serving as the primary classification for population analysis. This is the main subject column that defines the population groups being measured.

number_of_population.number_of_population: The count of individuals belonging to a specific age group during a particular year, representing the quantitative measurement of population size for demographic analysis.

year.year: The calendar year for which the PSLE Mother Tongue Language performance data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for the dataset.

race.race: The demographic classification group (e.g., Overall, Chinese, Malay, Indian, Others) for which the PSLE MTL percentage is reported, categorizing the performance data within each year.

percentage_psle_mtl.percentage_psle_mtl: The percentage of students who passed or achieved a specific standard in the Primary School Leaving Examination (PSLE) Mother Tongue Language subject, representing the measured performance outcome for a given race group in a specific year.

quarter.quarter: A temporal identifier specifying the year and quarter (e.g., 1979-Q4) for which the data is recorded, serving as the primary time period for the dataset.

level_1.level_1: A categorical classification describing the type of entity being measured, which in this dataset is consistently 'Residential Properties,' indicating the data pertains to the residential property market.

value.value: A numerical measurement (such as an index value or price) associated with the specified quarter and property type, quantifying the state of residential properties for that period.

year.year: The calendar year for which the principal count data is recorded, providing temporal context for when these employment statistics apply.

sex.sex: The gender classification of principals, categorizing counts as Female (F) or combined Male & Female (MF) groupings in this dataset.

level_of_school.level_of_school: The educational level of the institution where principals work, classifying schools as PRIMARY, SECONDARY, or PRE-UNIVERSITY.

length_of_service.length_of_service: The years of professional experience range for principals, grouping them into service duration categories from beginners to veterans.

no_of_principals.no_of_principals: The count of school principals for each specific combination of year, gender, school level, and service length, representing the core measurement in this statistical dataset.

year.year: The calendar year for which the vessel statistics are recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data point.

number_of_vessels.number_of_vessels: The total count of vessels recorded for the corresponding year, representing the quantitative fleet size for that period.

gross_tonnage.gross_tonnage: The aggregate gross tonnage of all vessels for the corresponding year, measuring the total carrying capacity or volume of the fleet.

month.month: The year and month for which shipping data is aggregated, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each record.

number_of_vessels.number_of_vessels: The total count of vessels recorded during the specified month, representing the volume of shipping activity for that period.

gross_tonnage.gross_tonnage: The sum of gross tonnage for all vessels recorded during the specified month, indicating the total cargo capacity or size of vessels for that period.

ban_occupation_status7.ban_occupation_status7: Respondent's answer regarding a specific occupational status category (e.g., employed, unemployed).

ban_q30_4.ban_q30_4: Respondent's answer to survey question Q30_4, capturing another specific opinion or rating.

ban_occupation_status1.ban_occupation_status1: Respondent's answer regarding a primary occupational status category.

ban_occupation_status6.ban_occupation_status6: Respondent's answer regarding another occupational status category.

hhi.hhi: Household income bracket of the respondent, a key demographic and socioeconomic attribute.

ban_occupation_status5.ban_occupation_status5: Respondent's answer regarding an additional occupational status category.

respondent_serial.respondent_serial: Unique identifier for each survey participant, serving as the primary key for this dataset.

ban_marital.ban_marital: Marital status of the respondent (e.g., Married, Single), a fundamental demographic attribute.

ban_occupation_status3.ban_occupation_status3: Respondent's answer regarding a third occupational status category.

ban_age_youngest.ban_age_youngest: Age of the respondent's youngest child, or a category if no child ('Net- 18 yo+'), a family demographic attribute.

ban_age.ban_age: Age group of the respondent (e.g., 25-34 yo), a core demographic attribute.
