entity_type_description.entity_type_description: Describes the legal structure type of the entity, such as 'Local Company' or 'LLP', classifying its fundamental organizational form.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: Provides further detail on the business's constitutional makeup, such as 'Sole Proprietor' or 'Partnership', specifying its ownership structure.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: Indicates the current operational and legal standing of the entity, such as 'Struck Off' or 'Cancelled', showing its active or defunct state.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date when the business entity was formally registered or incorporated, marking the start of its legal existence.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The specific date on which the Unique Entity Number was issued to this business entity by the registration authority.

address_type.address_type: Specifies the type of registered address, such as 'LOCAL', indicating it is a Singapore-based address for the entity.

block.block: The block number component of the entity's registered address, forming part of its physical location details.

street_name.street_name: The name of the street where the entity is registered, forming a key part of its address location.

level_no.level_no: The floor or level number within a building at the entity's registered address, providing more precise location information.

unit_no.unit_no: The unit or suite number at the entity's registered address, specifying the exact office or space location.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building where the entity is registered, identifying the specific structure at its address.

postal_code.postal_code: The postal code for the entity's registered address, used for mail delivery and geographic identification.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: The number of registered charges (e.g., mortgages, debentures) lodged against the business entity, indicating financial encumbrances.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Singapore Standard Industrial Classification code numerically identifying the entity's main business activity.

primary_ssic_description.primary_ssic_description: The textual description corresponding to the primary SSIC code, detailing the entity's principal line of business.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: A secondary SSIC code identifying an additional or subsidiary business activity conducted by the entity, if applicable.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: The textual description for the secondary SSIC code, detailing the entity's additional business activities.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The count of officers (e.g., directors, partners, secretaries) formally associated with the business entity in a governance role.

salesperson_name.salesperson_name: The full name of the registered real estate salesperson, serving as the primary descriptive attribute for the individual.

registration_no.registration_no: A unique identifier for each real estate salesperson, acting as the primary key for their registration record.

registration_start_date.registration_start_date: The date when the salesperson's registration became effective, marking the beginning of their valid licensing period.

registration_end_date.registration_end_date: The expiration date of the salesperson's current registration, indicating the end of their valid licensing period.

estate_agent_name.estate_agent_name: The name of the real estate agency that the salesperson is employed by or affiliated with, categorizing them under a specific firm.

estate_agent_license_no.estate_agent_license_no: The unique license number of the estate agent company, serving as a foreign key that links the salesperson to their employing agency's official record.

agency.agency: The government organization or agency that provides the e-service, such as NLB (National Library Board), CPFB (Central Provident Fund Board), or MOH (Ministry of Health).

title.title: The name of the specific e-service being offered, serving as the primary identifier for each digital government service entry.

description.description: A brief explanation of what the e-service does and its purpose, providing details about the service's functionality and intended use.

year.year: The calendar year for which the employment change data is recorded, providing the temporal context for the measurement.

res_stat.res_stat: The residency status (resident or non-resident) of the workforce group for which the employment change is calculated, categorizing the data by population type.

industry1.industry1: The industry sector (e.g., manufacturing, construction, services) associated with the employment change, classifying the economic activity of the measured group.

employment_change.employment_change: The numerical change in employment level for the specified year, residency status, and industry, representing the core performance metric being analyzed.

grant_call.grant_call: The name or title of a specific funding opportunity or call for proposals, serving as the primary identifier for each grant initiative.

closing_date.closing_date: The deadline date for submissions to the grant call, indicating when the application period ended for that specific funding opportunity.

total_grants_awarded.total_grants_awarded: The total monetary amount (in the local currency) awarded across all successful proposals for this grant call, quantifying the funding disbursed for this initiative.

year_of_assessment.year_of_assessment: The assessment year for which the tax return statistics are reported, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing the tax data.

tax_type.tax_type: The category of tax being reported, classifying returns as either Corporate Income Tax or Individual Income Tax for each assessment year.

return_type.return_type: The specific category of tax return activity, describing the nature of the filing or processing (such as Returns Issued, Returns Received, or specific filing methods).

no_of_returns.no_of_returns: The numerical count of tax returns for the given combination of assessment year, tax type, and return type, representing the volume of tax processing activity.

year.year: The calendar year for which hospital admissions data is recorded, serving as the temporal reference point for all admissions statistics in this dataset.

level_1.level_1: The classification of hospital type for admissions, categorizing facilities as Community, Psychiatric, or Acute Hospitals based on their primary medical services and patient care focus.

level_2.level_2: The ownership classification of hospitals for admissions, distinguishing between Public (government-operated) and Non-public (private or non-governmental) healthcare institutions.

year.year: The calendar year when the healthcare workforce measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for each profession's statistics.

profession.profession: The type of healthcare worker being measured, serving as the primary entity for tracking workforce density and population ratios across different years.

no_per_1000.no_per_1000: The number of professionals per 1000 population, measuring the density or concentration of each healthcare profession in the population for a given year.

ratio_to_population.ratio_to_population: The population-to-professional ratio expressed as '1:X' format, indicating how many people each professional serves on average for that year and profession.

year.year: The calendar year when the data was recorded or measured, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing the statistical information.

gender.gender: A categorical classification (male/female) that segments the data within each year, representing demographic grouping for the measured values.

number.number: A quantitative measurement or count associated with each year-gender combination, representing the statistical value being tracked in the dataset.

month.month: The year and month for which the data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each observation.

level_1.level_1: The category or classification of the total being measured (e.g., overall total or total excluding a specific sector), describing the type of metric for the given month.

value.value: The numerical measurement or data point for the specified metric ('level_1') in the given month, representing the quantitative value of the reported figure.

year.year: The calendar year when the retrenchment data was recorded, providing temporal context for when the industry retrenchment incidence occurred.

industry1.industry1: The broad industry category grouping related sectors, representing the high-level classification that contains the specific industry2 sector.

industry2.industry2: The specific industry sector being analyzed for retrenchment, serving as the primary entity for which retrenchment incidence is measured.

incidence_of_retrenchment.incidence_of_retrenchment: The measured frequency or rate of retrenchment occurrences within the specific industry2 sector during the given year, quantifying workforce reduction trends.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year to which the budget data pertains, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing government expenditure records.

actual_revised_estimated.actual_revised_estimated: Indicates whether the budget figures represent actual expenditures, revised estimates, or initial estimates for the given financial year.

sector.sector: The broad government sector category (e.g., Economic Development, Social Development) to which the ministry belongs for budget classification in the given financial year.

ministry.ministry: The specific government ministry or department responsible for the budget allocation or expenditure in the given financial year.

type.type: The classification of expenditure as either Operating (recurrent costs) or Development (capital investments) for the budget item in the given financial year.

amount.amount: The monetary value of the budget allocation or expenditure, representing the financial commitment or spending in the given financial year.

percent_of_gdp.percent_of_gdp: The budget amount expressed as a percentage of Gross Domestic Product, providing economic context for the expenditure's scale relative to the economy in the given financial year.

name.name: The official name of a healthcare clinic in Singapore, serving as the primary identifier for each unique medical facility in this dataset.

address.address: The full physical location of the clinic, including building name and unit number, which describes where this medical facility is situated.

vaccine.vaccine: The type(s) of COVID-19 vaccine offered by the clinic, specifying the brand (e.g., Pfizer, Sinovac, Novavax) and the eligible age groups, which is a key service attribute of this medical facility.

year.year: The calendar year when the literacy rate measurement was taken, serving as the temporal identifier for each data point in this time series.

level_1.level_1: The specific demographic metric being measured (Literacy Rate for population aged 15 years and over), categorizing the type of educational attainment data recorded.

value.value: The measured literacy rate percentage for the corresponding year, representing the quantitative educational attainment level of the population.

year.year: The calendar year when the internet usage measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for when the data was collected for each business size category.

employment_size.employment_size: Categorizes businesses by their number of employees into three groups (below 10, between 10-199, and 200+ employees), serving as the primary classification for analyzing internet adoption patterns.

internet_usage.internet_usage: The percentage of businesses within each employment size category that reported using the internet during the specified year, measuring digital adoption rates across different business scales.

year.year: The calendar year when the metric measurement was taken, providing temporal context for when each data point was recorded.

level_1.level_1: The specific labor force or education metric being measured, such as participation rates, employment proportions, or enrolment ratios, broken down by gender categories. This is the primary subject describing what type of indicator each record represents.

value.value: The numerical measurement or percentage value for the specified metric in the given year, representing the quantitative result of the indicator measurement.

year.year: The calendar year when the demographic data was recorded, providing the temporal context for the median age measurement.

sex.sex: The gender category (male or female) for which the median age is reported, classifying the demographic group in each yearly observation.

median_age.median_age: The median age value for the specified gender in the given year, representing the central tendency of age distribution for that demographic group.

location.location: The name of the blood donation facility, serving as the primary identifier for each unique donation site.

donation_type.donation_type: The type of blood donation accepted at this location (e.g., Whole blood or Apheresis), classifying the services offered.

address.address: The physical street address where the donation facility is located, providing the location's place information.

postal_code.postal_code: The postal code corresponding to the facility's address, used for geographic identification and mail delivery.

monday_operating_hour.monday_operating_hour: The operating hours for this donation location on Mondays, indicating when it is open or closed.

tuesday_operating_hour.tuesday_operating_hour: The operating hours for this donation location on Tuesdays, indicating when it is open or closed.

wednesday_operating_hour.wednesday_operating_hour: The operating hours for this donation location on Wednesdays, indicating when it is open or closed.

thursday_operating_hour.thursday_operating_hour: The operating hours for this donation location on Thursdays, indicating when it is open or closed.

friday_operating_hour.friday_operating_hour: The operating hours for this donation location on Fridays, indicating when it is open or closed.

saturday_operating_hour.saturday_operating_hour: The operating hours for this donation location on Saturdays, indicating when it is open or closed.

sunday_operating_hour.sunday_operating_hour: The operating hours for this donation location on Sundays, indicating when it is open or closed.

eve_of_major_public_holiday_operating_ho.eve_of_major_public_holiday_operating_ho: The operating hours for this donation location on the eve of major public holidays, indicating special holiday timing.

public_holiday_operating_hour.public_holiday_operating_hour: The operating hours for this donation location on public holidays, indicating whether it is open or closed on official holidays.

respondent_serial.respondent_serial: A unique numeric identifier for each survey participant, serving as the primary key to distinguish individual respondents in the dataset.

q20_q212.q20_q212: The respondent's answer to survey question Q20/Q212, representing a categorical response (Yes/No/-) to a specific survey item about the respondent.

gender.gender: The gender of the survey respondent, providing demographic classification (Male/Female) as an attribute of the respondent.

socialnetwork_dp10.socialnetwork_dp10: The respondent's answer regarding social network usage for DP10, indicating whether they use specific social networks as an attribute of their behavior.

socialnetwork_dp07.socialnetwork_dp07: The respondent's answer regarding social network usage for DP07, representing another dimension of their social media engagement as a behavioral attribute.

personalincome.personalincome: The personal income bracket of the respondent, representing their reported range of monthly or annual earnings (e.g., '$2,000-$2,999'). It is a key demographic and economic attribute of the individual.

ban_age.ban_age: The age group of the respondent, expressed as a range or category (e.g., '25-34 yo'). This is a fundamental demographic attribute classifying the individual by life stage.

socialnetwork_dp03.socialnetwork_dp03: An indicator of whether the respondent uses or participates in social networks (Yes/No). This describes a behavioral or technological engagement attribute of the individual.

quarter.quarter: The time period (year and quarter) for which the export order limitation data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal context for each observation.

level_1.level_1: The specific factor or condition limiting export orders in manufacturing, categorizing the type of constraint reported for the given quarter and industry.

level_2.level_2: The manufacturing industry sector to which the limitation factor applies, classifying the observation within a specific industrial domain for the given quarter.

value.value: The quantitative measure (likely a count or percentage) indicating the extent or prevalence of the limiting factor for the specified quarter, factor type, and industry.

centre_code.centre_code: A unique identifier code for the childcare or preschool center, serving as the primary key to distinguish each facility.

centre_name.centre_name: The official name of the childcare or preschool center, representing its identity as an educational facility.

organisation_code.organisation_code: A code identifying the organization that operates the center, linking to the managing entity responsible for the facility.

organisation_description.organisation_description: A description of the type of operating organization, categorizing the center's management structure.

service_model.service_model: The type of service model offered by the center, classifying its operational framework.

centre_contact_no.centre_contact_no: The contact telephone number for the center, providing a direct communication channel for the facility.

centre_email_address.centre_email_address: The email address for the center, offering an electronic communication method for the facility.

centre_address.centre_address: The physical street address of the center, specifying its location for visitation and correspondence.

postal_code.postal_code: The postal code corresponding to the center's address, used for mail delivery and location identification.

infant_vacancy.infant_vacancy: The current vacancy status for infant care slots at the center, indicating availability for the youngest age group.

pg_vacancy.pg_vacancy: The current vacancy status for playgroup slots at the center, indicating availability for toddlers.

n1_vacancy.n1_vacancy: The current vacancy status for Nursery 1 slots at the center, indicating availability for preschool children.

n2_vacancy.n2_vacancy: The current vacancy status for Nursery 2 slots at the center, indicating availability for older preschool children.

k1_vacancy.k1_vacancy: The current vacancy status for Kindergarten 1 slots at the center, indicating availability for kindergarteners.

k2_vacancy.k2_vacancy: The current vacancy status for Kindergarten 2 slots at the center, indicating availability for senior kindergarteners.

food_offered.food_offered: A description of the food options provided, detailing dietary restrictions and meal sources at the center.

second_languages_offered.second_languages_offered: The second language taught at the center, indicating additional linguistic education provided.

spark_certified.spark_certified: Indicates whether the center is certified under the SPARK quality framework, reflecting its accreditation status.

weekday_full_day.weekday_full_day: The operating hours for full-day services on weekdays, specifying the time window the center is open.

saturday.saturday: The operating hours for Saturday services, indicating weekend availability at the center.

scheme_type.scheme_type: The type of government scheme the center participates in, classifying its subsidy or operational program.

extended_operating_hours.extended_operating_hours: Indicates whether the center offers extended operating hours beyond the standard schedule.

provision_of_transport.provision_of_transport: Indicates whether the center provides transportation services for children.

government_subsidy.government_subsidy: Indicates whether the center offers government subsidies to reduce fees for eligible families.

gst_regisration.gst_regisration: Indicates whether the center is registered for Goods and Services Tax, affecting its billing structure.

last_updated.last_updated: The date when this center's information was last updated, showing the recency of the data.

remarks.remarks: Additional notes or comments about the center, providing extra contextual information.
