uid.uid: A unique numeric identifier for each entity record in this knowledge base, serving as the primary key for this dataset.

descriptor.descriptor: The primary name, title, or label for the entity (e.g., a person's name, a road name, an organization's name), representing its core identifying attribute.

vocabulary.vocabulary: A categorical classification indicating the type of entity, such as _People for individuals, _Geographics for locations, or _Organisations for groups and institutions.

description.description: A detailed textual account providing context, history, significance, and background information about the entity described in this record.

name_displayname.name_displayname: A formal, alternative, or display name for the entity, often used for presentation purposes and may include fuller titles or standardized naming conventions.

year.year: The calendar year for which child welfare case statistics are recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing the data.

no_of_pl_cw_cases.no_of_pl_cw_cases: The number of PL (likely Public Law or similar category) child welfare cases reported in the given year, representing one component of total cases.

no_of_or_cw_cases.no_of_or_cw_cases: The number of OR (likely Other or specific category) child welfare cases reported in the given year, representing another component of total cases.

total_no_of_cw_cases.total_no_of_cw_cases: The total number of child welfare cases (sum of PL and OR cases) reported in the given year, providing the overall case volume for that period.

year.year: The calendar year for which the count of interest groups is reported, providing the temporal context for each category's data point.

category.category: The classification of the artistic, performance, or educational activity type (e.g., Instrumental, Dance, Vocal), serving as the main subject entity for the dataset.

interestgroups.interestgroups: The number of groups or entries recorded for a specific category in a given year, representing a quantitative measure of participation or activity volume.

year.year: The calendar year for which the primary school count data is reported, providing the temporal context for each record.

school_type.school_type: The classification category of primary schools, either Government or Govt-Aided, serving as the main entity for which counts are tracked over time.

number_of_pri_sch.number_of_pri_sch: The total count of primary schools belonging to the specified school type for the given year, representing a quantitative measure of school infrastructure.

year.year: The calendar year for which the data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing and analyzing the sector counts.

sector.sector: The classification category indicating the type of sector (Public Sector, Private Sector, or Not in Active Practice), representing the grouping dimension for the count data within each year.

count.count: The numerical count or tally of items/entities for the specific year and sector combination, representing the quantitative measurement in this aggregated dataset.

newspaper_title.newspaper_title: The name of the newspaper or periodical in which the article was published, identifying the source publication for this content.

issue_id.issue_id: A unique identifier for the specific newspaper issue containing this article, grouping all content from that publication instance.

issue_date.issue_date: The publication date of the newspaper issue containing this article, providing temporal context for when the content was released.

edition.edition: The edition number of the newspaper issue containing this article, specifying a particular version of that day's publication.

page_id.page_id: A unique identifier for the physical page within a newspaper issue where this article is located, grouping content by its page placement.

page_number.page_number: The sequential page number within the newspaper issue where this article appears, indicating its location in the publication's layout.

article_id.article_id: A unique identifier for each individual newspaper article, serving as the primary key for this dataset's core content unit.

article_title.article_title: The headline or title of the newspaper article, describing the subject or topic of this specific piece of content.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: The first approximately 50 words of the article's main text, providing a content excerpt or summary of the article's body.

year.year: The calendar year for which the aggregated sector data is reported, serving as the primary temporal dimension for this dataset.

sector.sector: A categorical classification indicating the practice status (e.g., 'Active Practice', 'Not in Active Practice'), describing the group being counted for each year.

count.count: The numerical total of individuals or entities recorded within the specified sector for the corresponding year, representing the quantitative measurement for each year-sector combination.

year.year: The calendar year when the vaccination coverage percentage was measured, providing temporal context for each disease data point.

disease.disease: The specific infectious disease for which vaccination coverage is being tracked, serving as the primary entity in this dataset.

percentage.percentage: The vaccination coverage rate for the specified disease in the given year, representing the proportion of the population protected against that disease.

year.year: The calendar year when the demographic measurement was recorded, serving as the temporal context for all data points in this statistical dataset.

race.race: The racial or ethnic category being measured, representing the demographic group for which the percentage statistic is reported in each year.

percentage.percentage: The statistical percentage value measured for the specified racial group in the given year, representing the quantitative measurement being tracked over time.

year.year: The calendar year when the population measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for when each education level count was observed.

population_by_education_level.population_by_education_level: The categorical classification of population based on highest educational attainment, serving as the primary subject of analysis with categories like 'No Education', 'Primary', 'Secondary', etc.

number_of_population.number_of_population: The count or quantity of individuals belonging to each education level category in the specified year, representing the measured population size for that demographic segment.

year.year: The calendar year for the arrest data, providing the temporal context for when the arrests counted in the 'value' column occurred.

level_1.level_1: Defines the primary subject as a combination of a demographic group (e.g., Male, Female, Total Persons) and a specific crime category for which arrests were made.

value.value: The quantitative count of persons arrested, corresponding to the demographic and crime category in 'level_1' for the specified 'year'.

quarter.quarter: The time period (year and quarter) when the measurement was recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for organizing this time-series property data.

level_1.level_1: The primary classification category for properties, indicating the broad property type (such as Residential Properties) being measured in each quarterly observation.

level_2.level_2: A secondary classification that further specifies property types within the primary category, distinguishing between Landed and Non-landed residential properties for each quarterly measurement.

value.value: The numerical measurement or metric (likely a property price index or value indicator) recorded for the specific property category during that quarter, representing the quantitative data point.

year.year: The calendar year for which the enrollment data is reported, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing the statistics.

age.age: The age group category of the enrolled individuals (e.g., '17 YRS', 'UNDER 17 YRS'), describing a key demographic dimension for the reported year.

sex.sex: The gender classification of the enrolled individuals ('F' for Female, 'MF' likely for Male & Female/Total), representing another demographic dimension for the given year and age group.

enrolment_jc.enrolment_jc: The count or number of individuals enrolled in Junior College (JC), representing the core quantitative measurement for the specified year, age group, and sex.

cohort.cohort: The release year or group of individuals being studied, serving as the primary identifier for tracking recidivism trends over time.

age.age: The age category (e.g., 'Below 16', 'Below 21') of individuals within the cohort, classifying the subgroup for which the recidivism statistic is reported.

recidivism_rate.recidivism_rate: The percentage of individuals from a specific cohort and age group who were reconvicted, measuring the rate of re-offense for that demographic segment.

date.date: The specific calendar date of a public holiday, serving as the primary identifier for each holiday entry in the dataset.

day.day: The day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) corresponding to the holiday date, describing a temporal property of that date.

holiday.holiday: The official name of the public holiday observed on the given date, classifying the reason for the holiday entry.

year.year: The calendar year when the housing distribution data was collected, providing temporal context for the worker category analysis.

level_1.level_1: The occupational category or worker type being analyzed, serving as the main subject that describes different employment groups in the dataset.

level_2.level_2: The type of housing accommodation associated with each worker category, representing the residential classification for analysis.

value.value: The numerical measurement (likely percentage or count) showing the distribution of workers across housing types, quantifying the relationship between occupation and accommodation.

year.year: The academic year or timeframe when this particular course offering is available or relevant, providing temporal context for the educational program data.

school.school: The academic department or organizational unit within the institution that offers and administers this specific course or diploma program.

course_name.course_name: The official title or name of the academic course or diploma program, describing the specific educational content and focus area of this offering.

course_code.course_code: A unique identifier for each academic course or diploma program, serving as the primary key to distinguish between different educational offerings.

year.year: The calendar year when the school life expectancy measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for tracking changes over time.

sex.sex: The gender classification (M for male, F for female) for which the school life expectancy measurement applies, enabling gender-based analysis of educational attainment.

school_life_expectancy.school_life_expectancy: The primary measurement representing the expected number of years of schooling for individuals, serving as the core metric being analyzed in this dataset.

year.year: The calendar year for which the leave entitlement statistics are reported, serving as the temporal reference point for all industry-specific data in each row.

industry1.industry1: The broad industry sector classification (e.g., services, manufacturing) that categorizes the establishments for which leave statistics are being reported.

industry2.industry2: The specific industry sub-sector or detailed classification that further refines the industry grouping for the reported leave entitlement statistics.

compassionate_leave.compassionate_leave: The percentage of establishments within the specified industry and year that offer compassionate leave to their employees, measuring the prevalence of this benefit.

marriage_leave.marriage_leave: The percentage of establishments within the specified industry and year that provide marriage leave to employees, indicating the availability of this specific leave type.

unpaid_leave_morethan1mth.unpaid_leave_morethan1mth: The percentage of establishments within the specified industry and year that allow extended unpaid leave (more than one month), reflecting flexibility in leave policies.

study_examination_leave.study_examination_leave: The percentage of establishments within the specified industry and year that grant study or examination leave, showing support for employee education.

child_sick_leave.child_sick_leave: The percentage of establishments within the specified industry and year that offer leave for caring for sick children, indicating family-friendly workplace policies.

parent_care_leave.parent_care_leave: The percentage of establishments within the specified industry and year that provide leave for caring for parents, measuring support for eldercare responsibilities.

vacc_date.vacc_date: The specific date when vaccination statistics were recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for tracking vaccination progress over time.

received_at_least_one_dose.received_at_least_one_dose: The cumulative count of individuals who have received at least one vaccine dose as of this date, representing initial vaccination coverage.

full_regimen.full_regimen: The cumulative count of individuals who have completed the full vaccination regimen as of this date, indicating complete vaccination status.

minimum_protection.minimum_protection: The cumulative count of individuals who have achieved minimum protection (likely through booster doses) as of this date, representing enhanced immunity levels.

received_one_dose_pcttakeup.received_one_dose_pcttakeup: The percentage of the total population that has received at least one vaccine dose as of this date, showing initial vaccination penetration.

full_regimen_pcttakeup.full_regimen_pcttakeup: The percentage of the total population that has completed the full vaccination regimen as of this date, indicating complete vaccination coverage.

minimum_protection_pcttakeup.minimum_protection_pcttakeup: The percentage of the total population that has achieved minimum protection as of this date, representing enhanced immunity coverage in the population.

year.year: The calendar year when the birth statistics were recorded, providing temporal context for the demographic data.

ethnic_group.ethnic_group: The racial or ethnic classification being analyzed, serving as the primary demographic category for birth statistics.

single_parent_births.single_parent_births: The count of births where the mother was a single parent, measured for each ethnic group in each year.

teenage_births.teenage_births: The count of births where the mother was a teenager, measured for each ethnic group in each year.

year.year: The calendar year for which the labor force participation rate data is recorded, providing the primary temporal context for the observation.

sex.sex: The gender classification (male or female) of the population group for which the labor force participation rate is measured, within the specified year.

age.age: The age group category (e.g., 25-29, 70_and_over) of the population for which the labor force participation rate is measured, within the specified year and sex.

lfpr.lfpr: The Labor Force Participation Rate, expressed as a percentage, representing the proportion of the specified sex and age group that is either working or actively seeking work in the given year.

ban_occupation_status1.ban_occupation_status1: The primary indicator of occupation status, showing whether the main occupation condition is present (Yes) or absent (No) for the entity.

ban_occupation_status7.ban_occupation_status7: A secondary occupation status indicator, representing whether an additional occupation-related condition is present (Yes) or absent (No) for the entity.

ban_occupation_role6.ban_occupation_role6: An indicator for a specific occupation role type, showing whether the entity holds this particular role (Yes) or not (No).

ban_occupation_status1.ban_occupation_status1: Indicates the primary occupation status (Yes/No) of an individual or entity, serving as the main indicator of occupational engagement.

ban_occupation_status7.ban_occupation_status7: Represents a secondary or alternative occupation status (Yes/No) related to the same entity, providing additional occupational status information.

ban_occupation_role6.ban_occupation_role6: Specifies the occupational role or position type (with '-' indicating no role), categorizing the nature of the occupation when status is affirmative.

ban_occupation_status1.ban_occupation_status1: A boolean flag indicating whether occupation status condition 1 applies, representing a specific occupational classification or restriction status for banking purposes.

ban_occupation_status7.ban_occupation_status7: A boolean flag indicating whether occupation status condition 7 applies, representing another specific occupational classification or restriction status for banking purposes.

ban_occupation_role6.ban_occupation_role6: A boolean flag indicating whether occupation role condition 6 applies, representing a specific occupational role or position classification for banking purposes.

year.year: The reporting year for the case data, serving as the temporal context for tracking disease incidence over time.

age.age: The age group classification for reported cases, categorizing individuals into specific age ranges for epidemiological analysis.

new_cases.new_cases: The count of newly reported cases for a specific year and age group, measuring disease incidence within demographic segments.

year.year: The calendar year when the leave entitlement data was collected, providing temporal context for the industry statistics.

industry1.industry1: The broadest industry classification category (e.g., services, manufacturing), representing the primary sector grouping for the data.

industry2.industry2: A more specific industry grouping within the industry1 category, refining the classification hierarchy for the industry being analyzed.

industry3.industry3: The most specific industry classification, representing the detailed industry segment that serves as the primary subject of this leave entitlement analysis.

compassionate_leave.compassionate_leave: The percentage of organizations in this industry-year that provide compassionate leave, measuring the prevalence of this specific leave type.

marriage_leave.marriage_leave: The percentage of organizations in this industry-year that provide marriage leave, indicating the availability of this particular employee benefit.

unpaid_leave_morethan1mth.unpaid_leave_morethan1mth: The percentage of organizations in this industry-year that offer unpaid leave extending beyond one month, measuring long-term unpaid leave provisions.

study_examination_leave.study_examination_leave: The percentage of organizations in this industry-year that provide leave for study or examinations, indicating support for employee education.

child_sick_leave.child_sick_leave: The percentage of organizations in this industry-year that offer leave for caring for sick children, measuring family support benefits.

parent_care_leave.parent_care_leave: The percentage of organizations in this industry-year that provide leave for parental care, indicating eldercare support provisions.

from.from: The effective start date for the tax rate schedule, indicating when these tax rates became applicable to the corresponding property type and value range.

type_of_property.type_of_property: The classification of residential properties, distinguishing between owner-occupied and non-owner-occupied dwellings for tax purposes.

annual_value.annual_value: The assessed value range of the property in local currency, defining the bracket that determines the applicable tax rate for the property type.

tax_rate.tax_rate: The percentage tax rate applied to properties falling within the specified annual value range and property type classification.

year.year: The calendar year for which donation data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for tracking charitable contributions over time.

level_1.level_1: The classification level indicating the type of metric being measured, consistently showing 'Total Donations' to specify that values represent donation amounts rather than other financial metrics.

level_2.level_2: The specific sector or category of charitable donations, classifying contributions into areas like Community, Social & Welfare, Religious & Others, Arts & Heritage, and Education.

value.value: The monetary amount of donations in millions, representing the quantitative measurement of charitable contributions for each year and category combination.

quarter.quarter: The calendar year and quarter (e.g., 2022-Q1) for which the unit data is recorded, providing the temporal context for each market segment's performance.

market_segment.market_segment: A geographic classification of the market, such as Core Central Region, Rest of Central Region, or Outside Central Region, serving as the primary entity for tracking unit metrics.

units.units: The numerical count or volume of items (e.g., properties, sales, transactions) recorded for a specific market segment during a specific quarter, representing the core quantitative measure.

period.period: The year and month for which the antiretroviral treatment data is reported, providing the temporal context for the aggregated count.

region.region: The major world region (e.g., ASIA, AFRICA) associated with the country of residence, categorizing the geographic scope of the data.

cor.cor: The country of residence, specifying the national entity for which the antiretroviral treatment count is aggregated.

gender.gender: The gender classification (Male, Female, Not Stated) of the population group receiving antiretroviral treatment.

arv_count.arv_count: The number of individuals recorded as receiving antiretroviral treatment during the specified period, for the given country and gender.

year.year: The calendar year for which the visitor count data is reported, providing the temporal context for the museum's attendance record.

museum.museum: The name of the cultural institution or heritage site, serving as the primary entity for which visitorship data is tracked.

visitorship.visitorship: The total number of visitors recorded at the museum during the specified year, representing the annual attendance or footfall measurement.

country.country: The country where the survey respondent resides, with all sample data showing Singapore as the location for this dataset.

q20_q214.q20_q214: A survey question response indicating a Yes/No answer or non-response, representing some characteristic or behavior of the respondent.

yearbornin_1_slice1.yearbornin_1_slice1: A numeric value likely representing the respondent's age or birth year information, providing demographic context about the individual.

hhi.hhi: Household income bracket indicating the respondent's monthly or annual household income range, showing economic background.

ban_q18_q192.ban_q18_q192: A survey question response with No answers or non-responses, capturing specific information about the respondent's attributes or behaviors.

ban_q435.ban_q435: A survey question response with Yes/No answers or non-responses, representing another characteristic or preference of the respondent.

ban_occupation_role2.ban_occupation_role2: Occupation-related information about the respondent, indicating their employment role or status with Yes/No/- responses.

socialnetwork_dp08.socialnetwork_dp08: Social network usage indicator showing whether the respondent uses social media platforms, with Yes/No responses.

ban_q431.ban_q431: A survey question response with No answers in the sample, representing another aspect of the respondent's characteristics.

ban_children4.ban_children4: Indicator of whether the respondent has children, showing family composition with Yes/No responses.

ban_education2.ban_education2: Education level of the respondent, indicating their highest educational attainment with categorical responses.

ban_gender.ban_gender: Gender of the survey respondent, showing demographic classification as Male or Female in this dataset.

year.year: The calendar year when the survey or study was conducted, providing temporal context for when this media consumption data was collected.

age.age: The age group range of survey respondents, categorizing the demographic segment being analyzed for media consumption patterns.

media_activity.media_activity: The specific type of media consumption behavior being measured, representing the core subject of study in this survey dataset.

sample_size.sample_size: The number of survey respondents in the specified demographic group for this media activity, indicating the data collection scale for each measurement.

ever_used.ever_used: The percentage of respondents in the specified demographic group who have ever engaged in this media activity, measuring adoption or usage prevalence.

year.year: The year when the survey was conducted, providing temporal context for when the media consumption data was collected.

age.age: The age group of survey respondents, representing the demographic segment being analyzed for media consumption patterns.

media_activity.media_activity: The specific type of media consumption behavior being measured in the survey, serving as the primary subject of analysis.

sample_size.sample_size: The number of survey respondents in the specified age group for the given year, indicating the data collection scale for that demographic segment.

ever_used.ever_used: The percentage of respondents in the specified age group who reported ever engaging in the media activity, measuring adoption or usage prevalence.

year.year: The academic or calendar year for which the staffing statistics are reported, serving as the primary temporal dimension for this educational dataset.

level.level: The education level category (Primary, Secondary, Junior College/Centralised Institute) that classifies the type of educational institution in the staffing data.

type_of_school.type_of_school: The governance and funding model of the school (Government, Govt-Aided, Independent, Specialised Independent) indicating the administrative structure.

qualification.qualification: The academic qualification level of teaching staff (Graduate, Non-Graduate, or unspecified) showing the educational attainment of educators.

sex.sex: The gender breakdown of staff counts, where 'MF' represents combined male and female totals and 'F' represents female-only statistics.

no_of_teacher.no_of_teacher: The total number of teaching staff employed in the specified educational category for the given year.

no_of_vice_principal.no_of_vice_principal: The count of vice-principals serving in the specified educational category for the given year.

no_of_principal.no_of_principal: The count of principals serving in the specified educational category for the given year.

year.year: The calendar year for which mail volume statistics are recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing and analyzing postal service data.

type.type: The classification of mail as either Domestic or International, categorizing the mail volume data by its geographic scope and service type.

volume_of_mail_handled.volume_of_mail_handled: The total quantity of mail processed during the specified year and type, representing the operational volume metric for postal service performance analysis.

year.year: The academic year or cohort year for which the statistics are recorded, providing temporal context for the course data.

sex.sex: The gender classification of the student group (e.g., 'MF' for combined, 'F' for female), categorizing the demographic segment for the course.

course.course: The name of the academic program or field of study, serving as the primary entity for which annual admission and completion metrics are tracked.

intake.intake: The number of new students admitted into the course for the specified year and sex group, measuring annual admissions.

enrolment.enrolment: The total number of students actively enrolled in the course for the specified year and sex group, indicating the program's current student body size.

graduates.graduates: The number of students who successfully completed and graduated from the course for the specified year and sex group, measuring annual program completions.

year.year: Indicates the calendar year when the population measurement was taken, providing temporal context for when each age group count was recorded.

age_year.age_year: Represents specific age group ranges (e.g., '9-<10' means ages 9 to under 10), serving as the primary demographic category being measured in this population data.

number.number: The count or quantity of individuals belonging to the specified age group in the given year, representing the measured population size for that demographic segment.

shs_year.shs_year: The year when the survey or data collection occurred, providing temporal context for the demographic statistics.

ethnic_group.ethnic_group: The ethnic classification of the population segment being measured, categorizing the data by cultural/racial groups.

age_group.age_group: The age range classification of the population segment, categorizing the data by different life stage brackets.

percentage.percentage: The proportion or percentage value representing the demographic measurement for the specified year, ethnic group, and age group combination.

shs_year.shs_year: The year for which the associated data point ('number') is recorded, providing the temporal context for this statistical entry related to a flat type.

flat_type.flat_type: The category or classification of the housing unit (e.g., '3-room', 'Executive'), serving as the primary subject identifier for this dataset.

number.number: A numerical value or measurement associated with a specific flat type and year, likely representing a statistic such as average household size or a similar metric.

entity_type_description.entity_type_description: The primary classification of the registered entity, such as 'Local Company' or 'Business', defining the core type of the organizational record.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: A numerical code from the Singapore Standard Industrial Classification (SSIC) system indicating the entity's secondary business activity, serving as an industry categorization attribute.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: The textual description of the secondary SSIC code, detailing the specific industry or business activity associated with the entity's secondary operations.

street_name.street_name: The name of the street associated with the entity's address, providing location information as a geographical attribute of the entity.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date and timestamp when the entity was officially registered or incorporated, representing the temporal origin point of the entity's legal existence.

period.period: The year for which the antiretroviral treatment data is reported, providing the temporal context for the count associated with the country/region.

region.region: The broad geographic continent or area where the country/region is located, categorizing the location of the reported data.

cor.cor: The specific country or region for which the antiretroviral treatment count is recorded, serving as the primary geographic entity in this dataset.

age_group.age_group: The demographic age category of the population receiving antiretroviral treatments, classifying the count for the country/region.

arv_count.arv_count: The number of antiretroviral treatments reported, representing the quantitative measurement for the specified country/region, period, and age group.

quarter.quarter: The calendar quarter and year for which the forecast metric is applicable, providing the temporal context for the business indicator.

level_1.level_1: The specific business or economic indicator being forecasted, such as investment, selling prices, new orders, or employment metrics, serving as the primary subject of the data.

level_2.level_2: The industry sector or domain to which the forecast metric applies, classifying the business indicator by manufacturing or engineering field.

quarter.quarter: The time period (year and quarter) when the labor market statistics were measured, serving as the temporal identifier for each data point.

industry1.industry1: The industry sector classification for which the recruitment and resignation rates are reported, categorizing the economic activity area.

occupation1.occupation1: The occupational group classification for which the labor market rates are measured, categorizing the type of work or job role.

recruitment_rate.recruitment_rate: The percentage rate of new hires or recruitment activity for the specified quarter, industry, and occupation combination.

resignation_rate.resignation_rate: The percentage rate of employee resignations or turnover for the specified quarter, industry, and occupation combination.

year.year: The calendar year when the crime statistics were recorded, providing temporal context for when the crime data was collected.

level_1.level_1: A categorical classification level for the crime statistics, currently showing 'Total' which indicates aggregated summary data across all categories at this level.

level_2.level_2: The specific type of crime being measured (e.g., Murder, Robbery, Rape), serving as the primary entity for which statistics are recorded in this dataset.

value.value: The numerical count or measurement for each crime type in each year, representing the quantity or frequency of occurrences being tracked.

year.year: The calendar year when the abuse cases were recorded, providing temporal context for when each count measurement occurred for the abuse type.

type_of_abuse.type_of_abuse: The category or classification of abuse being reported, representing the main subject of the data which includes neglect, sexual, and physical abuse types.

count.count: The number of reported cases for a specific abuse type in a given year, quantifying the volume or frequency of each abuse category over time.

year.year: The reference year for the labor market statistics, providing temporal context for all industry and occupation data points.

industry1.industry1: The broadest industry sector classification, representing the primary economic sector for the workforce statistics.

industry2.industry2: A more specific industry classification within the broader industry1 sector, narrowing down the economic activity category.

industry3.industry3: The most detailed industry classification within the industry2 category, specifying the precise economic sub-sector.

occupation1.occupation1: The occupational category of workers, classifying the type of work performed within the specified industry.

recruitment_rate.recruitment_rate: The hiring rate percentage for workers in the specified industry-occupation combination during the given year.

resignation_rate.resignation_rate: The turnover rate percentage for workers leaving the specified industry-occupation combination during the given year.

year.year: The calendar year when the deaths occurred, providing temporal context for the mortality statistics.

icd_main_category.icd_main_category: The primary International Classification of Diseases category, representing the broad disease group causing death.

icd_detail_category.icd_detail_category: A more specific ICD subcategory within the main category, providing detailed disease classification for mortality analysis.

gender.gender: The sex of the deceased individuals (Male/Female), representing a demographic dimension in mortality statistics.

death_age.death_age: The age group at time of death, categorizing mortality data by life stage for epidemiological analysis.

death_count.death_count: The number of deaths recorded for the specific combination of year, disease category, gender, and age group, representing the quantitative measure in this mortality dataset.

quarter.quarter: The specific calendar quarter (year and quarter) for which the property price index is reported, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data record.

property_type.property_type: The classification of the real estate sector, such as 'office' or 'retail', indicating the category of property to which the associated index value applies.

index.index: A numerical value representing the property price index for a given quarter and property type, quantifying the relative price level in that market segment.

quarter.quarter: The specific three-month period (year and quarter) for which residential completion data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for the dataset.

res_completion_status.res_completion_status: A classification describing the type of residential construction completion, specifically indicating these are privately developed residential units that have been finished.

units.units: The count of residential units that reached completion status during the specified quarter, representing the volume of construction output.

year.year: The year when the data on computer access was collected or reported, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data record.

housing_type.housing_type: The classification of housing as either 'public' or 'private', which categorizes the annual computer access data into distinct residential sectors.

computer_access_at_home.computer_access_at_home: The percentage (or proportion) of households that reported having access to a computer at home for a specific year and housing type, representing the core measured outcome.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year period for housing data collection, serving as the temporal context for all unit count measurements in this dataset.

dwelling_type.dwelling_type: The classification of housing type (DBSS or HDB), representing the category of dwelling for which unit counts are recorded in each fiscal year.

no_of_units.no_of_units: The count of housing units available for a specific dwelling type in a given financial year, representing the quantitative measurement of housing stock.

year.year: The calendar year for which the Crude Birth Rate measurement was recorded, providing the temporal context for each data point.

level_1.level_1: The demographic metric being measured, which is consistently 'Crude Birth Rate' in this dataset, defining the primary subject of the table.

value.value: The numerical measurement of the Crude Birth Rate (births per 1,000 population) for the corresponding year, representing the quantitative value of the metric.

year.year: The calendar year for which the annual leave entitlement distribution data is recorded, serving as the temporal reference point for this statistical dataset.

annual_leave_entitlement.annual_leave_entitlement: The categorized range of annual leave days available to employees, classifying workers into three groups based on their leave benefits for each recorded year.

distribution.distribution: The percentage of employees falling into each annual leave entitlement category for a given year, representing the statistical breakdown of workforce leave benefits.

calendar_year.calendar_year: The year for which donor statistics are recorded, serving as the temporal dimension for tracking donation patterns over time.

age_group.age_group: The age range category of donors (e.g., 21-29, 30-39), representing demographic segmentation of the donor population for each calendar year.

number_of_donors.number_of_donors: The count of individuals who donated (blood/organs) within the specified calendar year and age group, measuring donation volume by demographic and temporal segments.

month.month: The year and month when the price index measurement was recorded, providing the temporal context for each data point associated with an index type.

level_1.level_1: The category or type of domestic supply price index being measured, such as the overall index or the non-oil specific index, serving as the primary subject of the dataset.

value.value: The numerical index value for the specified price index category at the given month, representing the quantitative measurement of price levels.

quarter.quarter: The time period when the measurement was recorded, representing a specific three-month interval within a year and serving as the temporal context for all data points.

level_1.level_1: The industry or product category being measured, classifying what type of economic or business segment the value represents for each quarter.

value.value: The numerical measurement or metric for the specified category in the given quarter, representing an index, percentage, or score that quantifies performance or status.

year.year: The academic year when students graduated, serving as the temporal reference point for all graduate statistics in the dataset.

sex.sex: The gender classification of graduates (Male/Female), representing the demographic breakdown of graduate populations by year and course type.

type_of_course.type_of_course: The field of study or academic discipline completed by graduates, categorizing educational outcomes across different specialties and departments.

no_of_graduates.no_of_graduates: The count of students who graduated in a given year, by gender and course type, measuring the volume of educational output for each demographic and academic combination.

year.year: The calendar year when the measurement was recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing this time-series data about eating establishment metrics.

level_1.level_1: The top-level classification category for the eating establishment measurement, which in this dataset consistently shows 'Total' indicating aggregate data across all sub-categories.

level_2.level_2: The specific type of eating establishment being measured, including categories like Restaurants, Fast Food Outlets, Food Caterers, and Other Eating Places, providing detailed classification of the metric.

value.value: The numerical measurement or index value for the specified eating establishment category in the given year, representing the quantitative metric being tracked in this dataset (with some missing values indicated by empty cells).

date.date: The specific calendar date when weather measurements were recorded, providing the temporal context for all observations at the station.

station.station: The weather monitoring station location where measurements were taken, serving as the primary entity for tracking weather conditions at specific sites.

daily_rainfall_total.daily_rainfall_total: The total amount of rainfall measured at the station on the given date, representing precipitation accumulation in millimeters.

mean_temperature.mean_temperature: The average temperature recorded at the station throughout the measurement date, indicating the typical thermal conditions.

maximum_temperature.maximum_temperature: The highest temperature recorded at the station on the given date, showing the peak daytime heat or warmest period.

minimum_temperature.minimum_temperature: The lowest temperature recorded at the station on the given date, indicating the coolest period typically during nighttime.

mean_wind_speed.mean_wind_speed: The average wind speed measured at the station on the given date, representing typical air movement conditions.

max_wind_speed.max_wind_speed: The maximum wind gust speed recorded at the station on the given date, showing the peak wind intensity experienced.

year.year: The academic year for which the enrolment data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing the dataset.

level.level: The educational level or grade of the students (e.g., Junior College 1, Pre-University), categorizing the enrolment count within a given year.

course.course: The academic stream or subject area (Arts, Science, Commerce), further classifying the enrolment count for a specific year and level.

sex.sex: The gender classification of the enrolled students (F for Female, MF for Male & Female combined), providing a demographic breakdown of the enrolment figures.

enrolment_preu.enrolment_preu: The number of students enrolled, representing the core quantitative measurement for the specified combination of year, level, course, and sex.

shs_year.shs_year: The year the Singapore Household Survey (SHS) was conducted, serving as the primary temporal context for all demographic breakdowns in this dataset.

ethnic_group.ethnic_group: The ethnic classification of households (e.g., Malay, Chinese, Indian, Others, 'All'), categorizing the data within each survey year.

household_size.household_size: The size of the household by number of persons (e.g., '1 person', '5 person'), further categorizing data within each survey year and ethnic group.

percentage.percentage: The measured percentage of households that match the specific combination of survey year, ethnic group, and household size.

pharmacy_name.pharmacy_name: The name of the pharmacy establishment, serving as the primary identifier for each pharmacy entity in the dataset.

pharmacist_in_charge.pharmacist_in_charge: The name of the licensed pharmacist responsible for overseeing the pharmacy's operations, representing the key personnel attribute of the pharmacy.

pharmacy_address.pharmacy_address: The complete physical location of the pharmacy including unit numbers and postal codes, providing the geographical attribute of where the pharmacy is situated.

year.year: The calendar year when the road length measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for when each road type's infrastructure extent was assessed.

road_type.road_type: The classification category of transportation infrastructure, representing different functional classes of roads such as Local Roads, Arterial Roads, Expressways, and Collector Roads. This is the primary entity being measured in the dataset.

road_length.road_length: The total linear distance of roads belonging to each classification type in a given year, representing the physical extent of transportation infrastructure for that category.

year.year: The calendar year for which the retrenchment incidence data is recorded, providing the primary temporal context for the measurement.

industry1.industry1: The broadest sector classification (e.g., Services, Manufacturing) associated with the retrenchment data for the given year.

industry2.industry2: A more specific industry grouping within the broader sector (industry1), further classifying the data for the given year.

industry3.industry3: The most detailed industry classification within the industry2 group, specifying the precise area of economic activity for the retrenchment measurement in the given year.

incidence_of_retrenchment.incidence_of_retrenchment: A numerical measurement representing the rate or incidence of retrenchment for the specified detailed industry (industry3) within the given year.

month.month: The year and month for which the birth statistics are aggregated, providing the temporal context for the recorded birth count.

father_race.father_race: The racial category of the father, serving as a key demographic dimension for grouping and analyzing birth statistics.

child_gender.child_gender: The gender of the child (M for male, F for female), representing another demographic dimension used to categorize birth counts.

birth_count.birth_count: The number of births recorded for the specific combination of month, father's race, and child gender, representing the core aggregated measurement in this dataset.

buildingname.buildingname: The name of the building, serving as the primary identifier for tracking individual properties in the energy efficiency dataset.

buildingaddress.buildingaddress: The physical location of the building, providing the geographical address where the property is situated.

buildingtype.buildingtype: The functional classification of the building (e.g., Hotel, Office, Retail), categorizing its primary use or purpose.

greenmarkstatus.greenmarkstatus: Indicates whether the building has achieved Singapore's Green Mark certification, showing its environmental sustainability status.

buildingsize.buildingsize: A categorical classification of the building's scale (Small or Large), grouping properties by size category.

grossfloorarea.grossfloorarea: The total floor area of the building in square meters, measuring the physical size of the property.

2017energyuseintensity.2017energyuseintensity: The energy consumption per unit area for the year 2017, measuring the building's energy efficiency performance.

2018energyusintensity.2018energyusintensity: The energy consumption per unit area for the year 2018, showing the building's energy efficiency performance for that year.

voluntarydisclosure.voluntarydisclosure: Indicates whether the building owner voluntarily disclosed energy consumption data (Y/N), showing participation in energy reporting.

country.country: The country where the survey respondent resides, with all shown values indicating Singapore as the survey location for this dataset.

ban_gender.ban_gender: The gender of the survey respondent, representing a key demographic characteristic for segmentation and analysis.

hhi.hhi: Household income range of the respondent, indicating their economic bracket with values representing specific income intervals in Singapore dollars.

ban_q431.ban_q431: Survey response to question Q431, capturing a specific binary (Yes/No) answer from the respondent about an unspecified topic.

q20_q214.q20_q214: Combined survey response likely linking answers to questions Q20 and Q214, representing another categorical data point from the survey instrument.

yearbornin_1_slice1.yearbornin_1_slice1: Age or birth year grouping of the respondent, providing a temporal demographic dimension for analysis of different generational segments.

respondent_serial.respondent_serial: A unique numeric identifier for each survey respondent, serving as the primary key for tracking individual participants in the study.

q20_q212.q20_q212: The respondent's answer to survey question Q20/Q212, representing a categorical response (Yes/No) to a specific survey item.

gender.gender: The respondent's self-reported gender, providing demographic classification as either Male or Female.

socialnetwork_dp10.socialnetwork_dp10: The respondent's answer regarding social network usage for item DP10, indicating whether they use social networks (Yes/No) for this specific context.

socialnetwork_dp07.socialnetwork_dp07: The respondent's answer regarding social network usage for item DP07, representing another categorical response (Yes/No) about their social network behavior.

year.year: The academic year or graduation year being reported, serving as the primary temporal dimension for all enrollment data in this dataset.

sex.sex: A categorical attribute indicating the gender breakdown of the enrollment data, where 'MF' represents combined male/female counts and 'F' represents female-only counts.

nus.nus: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from the National University of Singapore for the specified year and gender category.

ntu.ntu: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from Nanyang Technological University for the specified year and gender category.

smu.smu: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from Singapore Management University for the specified year and gender category.

sit.sit: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from Singapore Institute of Technology for the specified year and gender category.

sutd.sutd: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from Singapore University of Technology and Design for the specified year and gender category.

suss.suss: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from Singapore University of Social Sciences for the specified year and gender category.

nie.nie: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from the National Institute of Education for the specified year and gender category.

singapore_polytechnic.singapore_polytechnic: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from Singapore Polytechnic for the specified year and gender category.

ngee_ann_polytechnic.ngee_ann_polytechnic: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from Ngee Ann Polytechnic for the specified year and gender category.

temasek_polytechnic.temasek_polytechnic: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from Temasek Polytechnic for the specified year and gender category.

nanyang_polytechnic.nanyang_polytechnic: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from Nanyang Polytechnic for the specified year and gender category.

republic_polytechnic.republic_polytechnic: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from Republic Polytechnic for the specified year and gender category.

lasalle_diploma.lasalle_diploma: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from LASALLE College of the Arts diploma programs for the specified year and gender category.

lasalle_degree.lasalle_degree: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from LASALLE College of the Arts degree programs for the specified year and gender category.

nafa_diploma.nafa_diploma: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from Nanyang Academy of Fine Arts diploma programs for the specified year and gender category.

nafa_degree.nafa_degree: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from Nanyang Academy of Fine Arts degree programs for the specified year and gender category.

ite.ite: The number of students enrolled in or graduating from the Institute of Technical Education for the specified year and gender category.

company_name.company_name: The name of the consulting company or firm, which is the primary entity listed in this directory.

uen_no.uen_no: The Unique Entity Number (UEN) assigned to the company, serving as its official business registration identifier in Singapore.

building_no.building_no: The numeric part of the building address where the company is located, forming a component of its physical address.

street_name.street_name: The name of the street where the company's office is situated, forming a component of its physical address.

unit_no.unit_no: The unit or suite number within the building where the company's office is located, forming a component of its physical address.

floor.floor: The floor level within the building where the company's office is located, forming a component of its physical address.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building or complex where the company's office is located, forming a component of its physical address.

postal_code.postal_code: The Singapore postal code for the company's office location, providing the precise geographic identifier for its address.

discipline.discipline: The primary professional field or specialization of the company, such as Architectural, Civil & Structural, or Quantity Surveying.

listing_code.listing_code: A specific alphanumeric code associated with the company's discipline and classification within this listing system.

listing_period.listing_period: The year for which this company listing record is valid and current, indicating the period of the directory's data.

period.period: The year-month time period for which hotel performance metrics are reported, serving as the primary temporal dimension for this dataset.

tier.tier: The classification category of hotels (UPSCALE, MID-TIER, LUXURY, ECONOMY) indicating the market segment level for which metrics are aggregated.

aor.aor: Average Occupancy Rate percentage for the specified period and hotel tier, measuring the proportion of rooms occupied during that time.

arr.arr: Average Room Rate in currency units for the specified period and hotel tier, representing the average price charged per occupied room.

revpar.revpar: Revenue Per Available Room in currency units for the specified period and hotel tier, calculated as the key performance metric combining occupancy and rate (aor × arr).

academic_year.academic_year: The year for which the course intake is planned, indicating the temporal context of this course offering.

school.school: The specific academic school or faculty within the institution that offers this course, representing its organizational home.

jae_cluster.jae_cluster: The broad academic discipline or cluster this course belongs to (e.g., Engineering, Business), categorizing its field of study.

jae_course_code.jae_course_code: A unique alphanumeric code identifying a specific course offering, serving as the primary key for this record.

course_name.course_name: The full official title of the diploma or programme, describing the specific academic course being offered.

planned_intake_numbers.planned_intake_numbers: The target or planned number of student admissions for this course in the given academic year, representing its capacity.

year.year: The calendar year for which newborn demographic data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal context for the dataset.

gender.gender: The gender classification (Male, Female, Unknown) of the newborn population counted for a given year, categorizing the demographic breakdown.

newborns.newborns: The count or number of newborns recorded for a specific combination of year and gender, representing the quantitative measurement for that demographic segment.

month.month: The year and month for which the vehicle registration or count data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal context for the dataset.

make.make: The manufacturer or brand name of the vehicles, categorizing the counted vehicles by their producer for the given month.

fuel_type.fuel_type: The primary type of fuel used by the vehicles (e.g., Diesel, Petrol), classifying the counted vehicles by their energy source for the given month.

vehicle_type.vehicle_type: The classification of vehicles by their intended use or size (e.g., Buses, Goods Vehicles), describing the category of vehicles counted for the given month.

number.number: The count or quantity of vehicles recorded that match the specific combination of month, make, fuel type, and vehicle type attributes.

identifier_uuid.identifier_uuid: A universally unique identifier serving as the primary key for each archival record, uniquely identifying a digitized item in the collection.

identifier_uri.identifier_uri: The web address (URI) providing direct access to the digital resource or detailed information page for this archival item.

title.title: The name or title of the archival item, describing its content and serving as its primary descriptive label.

contributor.contributor: Lists the individuals or organizations who owned or donated the physical item, indicating the provenance and source of the archival material.

digital_publisher.digital_publisher: The organization responsible for digitizing and publishing the item online, consistently the National Library Board Singapore in this dataset.

date_created.date_created: The date or date range when the original physical item was created, providing temporal context for the archival material.

description.description: A detailed textual summary, notes, or cataloguer's description providing context and additional information about the item's content and history.

subject_lcsh.subject_lcsh: Subject terms from the Library of Congress Subject Headings (LCSH) used to classify the topical content of the item according to a standard vocabulary.

subject_singheritage.subject_singheritage: Subject terms from a Singapore-specific heritage taxonomy used to classify the item according to local historical and cultural categories.

language.language: The language or languages in which the item's content is written or presented, indicating its linguistic context.

ispartof_collections.ispartof_collections: The hierarchical path(s) within the digital repository indicating which library collections and sub-collections this item belongs to.

nlb_type.nlb_type: The format or material type of the item (e.g., Postcard, Poster, Ephemera) as classified by the National Library Board.

rights.rights: A statement describing the copyright status and ownership of the item, specifying rights holders and usage restrictions.

access_rights.access_rights: Specific terms and conditions governing how the item may be accessed, used, and reproduced, often for research and study purposes only.

year.year: The calendar year when the scholarships were awarded, providing temporal context for when each scholarship scheme distributed its awards.

scholarship_scheme.scholarship_scheme: The specific type of Public Service Commission scholarship program, serving as the primary categorical identifier for tracking different award schemes.

no_of_psc_scholarships_awarded.no_of_psc_scholarships_awarded: The count of scholarships awarded for a particular scheme in a given year, representing the quantitative measurement of award distribution.

start_year.start_year: The beginning year of the time period during which construction/completion occurred, providing temporal context for when units were built.

end_year.end_year: The ending year of the time period during which construction/completion occurred, defining the timeframe boundary for unit completion statistics.

flat_type.flat_type: The classification of development type (e.g., dwelling units, commercial developments), representing the category of construction being measured.

no_of_completed_units.no_of_completed_units: The count of units completed during the specified time period for the given flat_type, measuring construction output volume.

year.year: The calendar year for which the count of societies is recorded, providing the temporal context for the data point related to an artform.

artform.artform: The category or discipline of the arts (e.g., Literary Arts, Dance, Theatre), serving as the primary entity for grouping and analyzing society counts.

societies.societies: The number of societies (likely arts organizations or associations) recorded for a specific artform in a given year, representing a quantitative measure of activity or presence.

newspaper_title.newspaper_title: The name of the newspaper from which the article originates, providing the publication source context for the article.

issue_id.issue_id: A unique identifier for the specific newspaper issue containing this article, linking the article to its parent publication instance.

issue_date.issue_date: The publication date of the newspaper issue containing this article, providing the temporal context for when the article was published.

edition.edition: The edition number of the newspaper issue (e.g., first edition), indicating a specific version of the issue that contains this article.

page_id.page_id: A unique identifier for the specific page within the issue where this article is located, linking the article to its physical location in the newspaper.

page_number.page_number: The sequential page number within the issue where this article appears, indicating the article's positional location in the newspaper.

article_id.article_id: The unique identifier for the individual newspaper article, serving as the primary key for this archival record.

article_title.article_title: The headline or title of the newspaper article, describing the primary subject or topic of the article content.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: The first 50 words of the article's text content, providing a representative excerpt or summary of the article's full text.

year.year: The calendar year when the immunization data was recorded, providing temporal context for when these vaccinations occurred relative to the immunization type.

immunisation_type.immunisation_type: The specific vaccine or immunization administered (e.g., Diphtheria, BCG, Measles, Poliomyelitis), serving as the primary medical intervention being tracked in this dataset.

sector.sector: The healthcare sector where immunizations were administered (Public or Private), categorizing the organizational context of the vaccination delivery.

number_of_children.number_of_children: The count of children who received the specified immunization in the given year and sector, quantifying the vaccination coverage for that combination.

yr.yr: The calendar year for which the membership data is recorded, providing the temporal context for the demographic statistics of each age group.

age_grp.age_grp: The age bracket or range categorizing the members, serving as the primary demographic segment for analysis (e.g., '>50 - 55').

gender.gender: The gender classification (Male/Female) of the members within the specified age group and year, providing a further demographic breakdown.

no_of_mbrs.no_of_mbrs: The count or number of members recorded for the specific combination of year, age group, and gender, representing the quantitative size of that demographic cohort.

year.year: The calendar year for which passenger traffic statistics are recorded, serving as the temporal identifier that organizes the annual data.

arrival_passengers_count.arrival_passengers_count: The total number of passengers arriving during the specified year, representing inbound passenger traffic volume for that period.

depart_passengers_count.depart_passengers_count: The total number of passengers departing during the specified year, representing outbound passenger traffic volume for that period.

year.year: The calendar year for which the school data is recorded, serving as the temporal reference point for all other data in the table.

school_type.school_type: The classification category of schools (Government, Independent, or Specialised Independent) for which mixed-level school counts are reported in each year.

number_of_mixed_level_sch.number_of_mixed_level_sch: The count of mixed-level schools (schools offering multiple education levels) for each school type in the corresponding year, representing quantitative data about educational institutions.

year.year: The calendar year for which the policyholder data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data point in the dataset.

policyholders.policyholders: The total number of policyholders recorded for the given year, representing the overall insurance coverage population during that time period.

policyholders_with_private_plans.policyholders_with_private_plans: The number of policyholders who have private insurance plans during the given year, indicating the subset of the total policyholder population with private coverage.

year.year: The calendar year for which solar PV installation data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for tracking installation trends over time.

residential_status.residential_status: Classification of solar PV installations as either Residential or Non-Residential for each recorded year, indicating the primary usage category of the installations.

user_type.user_type: Specific categorization of the user or organization type installing solar PV systems each year, providing detailed breakdown within residential and non-residential classifications.

The count of solar photovoltaic installations recorded for each combination of year and user category, measuring the volume of solar PV deployment across different sectors.

year.year: The calendar year when the course data was recorded, providing temporal context for tracking changes in course offerings over time.

course_category.course_category: The type or classification of courses offered, representing the main subject of analysis with categories like cooking, arts, sports, and personal development.

no_of_classes.no_of_classes: The count of classes available for each course category in a given year, measuring the volume or availability of educational offerings.

epi_year.epi_year: The epidemiological year for which the admission data is recorded, providing the annual temporal context for tracking hospital admission patterns over time.

epi_week.epi_week: The week number within the epidemiological year, offering granular temporal resolution for analyzing admission trends on a weekly basis throughout each year.

new_admisison_type.new_admisison_type: The classification of hospital admission types (such as ICU or general hospitalization), representing the main categorical subject being measured and analyzed in this dataset.

count.count: The numerical count of admissions for each admission type during the specified epidemiological week and year, quantifying the volume of hospital cases for analysis.

yr.yr: The calendar year for which the membership data is recorded, providing the temporal context for the demographic breakdown.

age_grp.age_grp: The age group category defining a demographic segment, such as '>20 - 25' or 'Above 60', which serves as the primary entity for the membership count analysis.

gender.gender: The gender classification (Male, Female, or Unspecified) of the members within each age group and year, providing a further demographic dimension.

no_of_mbrs.no_of_mbrs: The total number of members counted for the specific combination of year, age group, and gender, representing the quantitative measure for the cohort.

shs_year.shs_year: The survey year when the demographic data was collected, providing the temporal context for the dependency ratio measurement associated with each ethnic group.

ethnic_group.ethnic_group: The population category (e.g., Chinese, Malay, Indian) for which the old age dependency ratio is calculated, serving as the primary classification for demographic analysis.

year.year: The calendar year when the English pass percentage was measured, serving as the temporal context for this educational performance data.

race.race: The racial or ethnic group category for which the English pass percentage is reported, including specific groups (Chinese, Indian, Others) and an 'Overall' aggregate category.

percentage_pass_eng.percentage_pass_eng: The percentage of individuals within the specified year and racial group who passed English, measuring educational achievement in language proficiency.

year.year: The calendar year for which the establishment count is reported, providing the temporal context for this data point.

level_1.level_1: The broad industrial sector classification (SSIC 56 - Total Food & Beverage Services) that encompasses all the specific establishment types listed, representing the parent category for the main subject.

level_2.level_2: The specific type of food and beverage service establishment as defined by the Singapore Standard Industrial Classification (SSIC), serving as the primary entity being counted (e.g., Restaurants, Fast Food Outlets).

value.value: The numerical count of establishments for the specified SSIC classification ('level_2') in the given year, representing the measured quantity for this data record.

year.year: The calendar year when the educational progress measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for when each racial group's percentage applies.

race.race: The demographic group identifier (Indian, Malay, Others, or Overall aggregate) for which educational progress is being measured, serving as the primary entity in this dataset.

percentage_prog_postsec.percentage_prog_postsec: The percentage of students from each racial group who progressed to post-secondary education in the given year, representing the core educational outcome measurement.

year.year: The calendar year for which transportation ridership data is recorded, serving as the temporal identifier for each observation in this time-series dataset.

mrt.mrt: The annual ridership count for the Mass Rapid Transit system, representing the number of passengers who used MRT services during the specified year.

bus.bus: The annual ridership count for the bus transportation system, representing the number of passengers who used bus services during the specified year.

year.year: The calendar year for which the bus system metrics are recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each observation.

ave_bus_fleet.ave_bus_fleet: The average number of buses in the fleet during the specified year, representing the scale of transportation capacity available.

bus_route_in_operation.bus_route_in_operation: The count of bus routes actively operating during the specified year, indicating the breadth of the transportation network's coverage.

month.month: The month and year for which the taxi fleet data is recorded, providing the temporal context for the company's fleet size.

company.company: The name of the taxi company or operator, serving as the primary entity identifier in this dataset.

taxi_fleet.taxi_fleet: The total number of taxis in the company's operational fleet as of the recorded month, representing a key operational metric.

quarter.quarter: The year and quarter period when sales occurred, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing sales performance data in YYYY-QQ format.

type_of_sale.type_of_sale: The classification of the sales transaction type for each quarter, categorizing sales as New Sale, Sub Sale, or Resale to distinguish different sales channels.

units.units: The quantity of units sold during each quarter for the specified sale type, measuring the sales volume or transaction count for that period and category.

year.year: The calendar year for which the arrest statistics are recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing this time-series data.

level_1.level_1: The primary demographic classification category, indicating age groups, citizenship status, or summary categories such as 'Total Persons Arrested' for statistical grouping.

level_2.level_2: The secondary demographic classification specifying gender (Male/Female), providing a gender breakdown within each primary category.

value.value: The quantitative count or measurement representing the number of persons in each demographic group arrested during the specified year.

year.year: The calendar year when the reentry rate measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for when each occupational data point was collected.

occupation1.occupation1: The occupational category or group being analyzed, representing the main subject of study for reentry rate measurements across different years.

reentry_rate.reentry_rate: The percentage rate of reentry measured for each occupational category in each year, quantifying the likelihood or frequency of reentry within that occupation.

year.year: The calendar year for which the population data is recorded, providing the temporal context for the demographic measurement.

population_by_age_group.population_by_age_group: The categorical classification of the population into specific age ranges or brackets, serving as the primary demographic entity being analyzed.

number_of_population.number_of_population: The count of individuals belonging to the specified age group for the corresponding year, representing the quantitative measurement of the demographic data.

quarter.quarter: The specific time period (year and quarter) for which the measurement is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data point.

level_1.level_1: The category or type of measurement being reported, indicating whether the value represents the total or total excluding motor vehicles for that quarter.

value.value: The numerical measurement or data point recorded for the specified quarter and category, representing the quantitative value being tracked over time.

year.year: The year of the data record, providing temporal context for the count of principals and allowing analysis of trends over time.

sex.sex: The gender category of principals (e.g., Female, Male/Female combined), used to segment the count of principals by sex for demographic analysis.

level_of_school.level_of_school: The educational level of the school (Primary, Secondary, Pre-University), classifying the count of principals by the type of institution they lead.

age.age: The age group of principals (expressed as ranges), categorizing the count of principals by demographic age brackets for workforce analysis.

no_of_principals.no_of_principals: The number of principals counted for each combination of year, sex, school level, and age group, representing the core quantitative measure in this dataset.

year.year: The calendar year when the enterprise share measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for each data point.

level_1.level_1: The category of enterprise share being measured, such as share of enterprises count, nominal value added, or employment, serving as the primary classification for the data.

value.value: The percentage value representing the share measurement for the specified enterprise category and year, showing the proportion or distribution being quantified.

annual.annual: The year of observation, serving as the temporal identifier that organizes the demographic data across different time periods.

chinese.chinese: The measurement value for the Chinese demographic group in the corresponding year, representing this population segment's data.

malay.malay: The measurement value for the Malay demographic group in the corresponding year, representing this population segment's data.

indian.indian: The measurement value for the Indian demographic group in the corresponding year, representing this population segment's data.

other.other: The measurement value for other demographic groups in the corresponding year, representing additional population segments' data.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year for which the housing price statistics are reported, providing the temporal context for the data record.

town.town: The HDB town or estate location where the flat transactions occurred, specifying the geographical area for the price data.

room_type.room_type: The category of HDB flat based on the number of rooms (e.g., '2-room', '3-room'), serving as the primary classification for the reported price statistics.

min_selling_price.min_selling_price: The minimum (lowest) transacted selling price recorded for this room type in the specified town and financial year.

max_selling_price.max_selling_price: The maximum (highest) transacted selling price recorded for this room type in the specified town and financial year.

min_selling_price_less_ahg_shg.min_selling_price_less_ahg_shg: The minimum selling price after deducting the Additional CPF Housing Grant (AHG) and/or Special CPF Housing Grant (SHG), representing a lower net price for eligible buyers.

max_selling_price_less_ahg_shg.max_selling_price_less_ahg_shg: The maximum selling price after deducting the Additional CPF Housing Grant (AHG) and/or Special CPF Housing Grant (SHG), representing a lower net price for eligible buyers.

year.year: The calendar year for which new case data is reported, serving as the primary temporal dimension for tracking disease incidence over time.

gender.gender: The sex classification (Male/Female) for which new cases are counted, categorizing the case data by demographic groups within each year.

new_cases.new_cases: The count of newly reported cases for a specific year and gender combination, measuring disease incidence volume for that demographic segment in that time period.
