shs_year.shs_year: The year when the survey was conducted, providing temporal context for the demographic and housing distribution data.

ethnic_group.ethnic_group: The demographic group being analyzed, representing the primary entity for which housing type distribution is measured.

flat_type.flat_type: The category or type of housing unit, classifying the residential accommodation type for each ethnic group.

percentage.percentage: The proportion or distribution percentage of an ethnic group living in a specific flat type during the survey year.

year.year: The calendar year when the post-secondary progress measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for tracking educational outcomes over time.

race.race: The demographic or ethnic group category for which post-secondary progress is being measured, serving as the primary classification for comparing educational outcomes across different population segments.

percentage_progress_postsec.percentage_progress_postsec: The measured percentage of progress in post-secondary education for a specific race group in a given year, representing the quantitative outcome metric for educational attainment tracking.

year.year: The calendar year when the reentry rate measurement was recorded, serving as the temporal dimension for tracking changes over time.

sex1.sex1: The gender classification (Male or Female) for which the reentry rate is reported, categorizing the demographic group in each annual measurement.

reentry_rate.reentry_rate: The percentage rate of reentry measured for the specified gender in the given year, representing the quantitative outcome being tracked in this dataset.

year.year: The calendar year when the measurement was recorded, indicating the temporal context for each demographic data point.

level_1.level_1: The demographic category being measured, specifying age groups (e.g., 30-39 Years, 40-49 Years) with gender breakdowns (Total, Males, Females). This is the primary entity defining what population segment the statistics represent.

value.value: The numerical measurement or statistic for the specified demographic category in the given year, representing the quantitative data being tracked over time.

year.year: The calendar year when the revenue measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for when each segment's revenue data applies.

segment.segment: The industry category within the infocomm sector, representing different business areas like telecommunication services, hardware, IT services, etc.

infocomm_industry_revenue.infocomm_industry_revenue: The revenue amount generated by a specific infocomm industry segment in a given year, representing the financial performance measurement for that segment-year combination.

quarter.quarter: The specific calendar quarter (year and quarter) for which the data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each observation.

level_1.level_1: The primary classification category for the data point within the given quarter, representing the top-level grouping (e.g., 'Total' indicating aggregate data).

level_2.level_2: The secondary or more detailed classification category within the given quarter, specifying the particular sector, industry, or sub-group being measured.

value.value: The numerical measurement or metric recorded for the specified quarter and category combination, representing the quantitative data point (e.g., percentage, index score, or monetary value).

year.year: The academic or calendar year for which the secondary school enrolment statistics are reported, serving as the primary temporal dimension for the dataset.

age.age: The age group category of the enrolled students (e.g., '18 YRS', 'UNDER 13 YRS'), classifying the enrolment figures for each reported year.

sex.sex: The gender classification for the enrolment count ('M' for Male, 'F' for Female, 'MF' for combined Male and Female), providing a demographic breakdown for each year and age group.

enrolment_secondary.enrolment_secondary: The total number of students enrolled in secondary education, representing the quantitative measurement for a specific combination of year, age group, and gender.

year.year: The calendar year when the retrenchment data was recorded, serving as the temporal context for all industry retrenchment statistics.

industry1.industry1: The broad industry sector classification (e.g., services, manufacturing) for which retrenchment data is reported in that year.

industry2.industry2: The specific sub-industry or detailed industry classification within the broader industry1 category for retrenchment reporting.

retrench.retrench: The total number of employees retrenched in the specified industry and year, representing the overall retrenchment count.

retrench_permanent.retrench_permanent: The number of permanent employees who were retrenched in the specified industry and year, showing retrenchments of regular staff.

retrench_term_contract.retrench_term_contract: The number of term contract employees who were retrenched in the specified industry and year, indicating temporary staff reductions.

ban_occupation_status1.ban_occupation_status1: A boolean indicator (Yes/No) representing whether occupation status type 1 applies to the entity, serving as a categorical attribute of occupation classification.

ban_occupation_status7.ban_occupation_status7: A boolean indicator (Yes/No) representing whether occupation status type 7 applies to the entity, serving as another categorical attribute of occupation classification.

ban_occupation_role6.ban_occupation_role6: A boolean indicator (Yes/No) representing whether occupation role type 6 applies to the entity, serving as a categorical attribute describing specific occupational roles.

year.year: The calendar year for which the solar PV installation data is recorded, providing the temporal context for all measurements in this dataset.

ura_planning_region.ura_planning_region: The Urban Redevelopment Authority planning region in Singapore where solar PV installations are located, categorizing installations by geographical area.

residential_status.residential_status: Indicates whether the solar PV installations are for residential or non-residential properties, classifying the type of building usage.

num_solar_pv_inst.num_solar_pv_inst: The count of solar photovoltaic installations recorded for the given year, region, and residential status, measuring installation frequency.

inst_cap_kwac.inst_cap_kwac: The total installed capacity of solar PV systems in kilowatt AC units, quantifying the energy generation potential for the specified category.

total_inst_cap_percent.total_inst_cap_percent: The percentage share of total installed solar PV capacity represented by this category, showing relative contribution to overall capacity.

year.year: The calendar year for which the portfolio investment asset data is reported, providing the temporal context for the financial measurement.

level_1.level_1: The classification of the financial instrument type within Singapore's portfolio investment assets, such as Debt Securities or Equity, categorizing the nature of the investment.

level_2.level_2: The geographic region or economic grouping that is the destination of Singapore's portfolio investments, specifying the location of the asset holdings.

value.value: The monetary amount of Singapore's portfolio investment assets, measured in millions of Singapore dollars, representing the core quantitative data point described by the year, instrument, and region.

school_name.school_name: The name of the educational institution advertising a canteen stall vacancy, serving as the primary entity for this advertisement.

area.area: The geographical region or planning area in Singapore where the school is located, providing the vacancy's general location context.

type_of_stall.type_of_stall: The category of food service or cuisine required for the canteen stall (e.g., Halal Rice, Western Food), defining the nature of the business opportunity.

remarks.remarks: Additional notes, conditions, or specifications provided by the school for the stall application, such as dietary allowances or preparation guidelines.

closing_on.closing_on: The application deadline date for the canteen stall vacancy, indicating the last day to submit a proposal.

detailed_requirements.detailed_requirements: A hyperlink to the school's official webpage containing the full advertisement, detailed requirements, and application procedures for the canteen stall.

month.month: The year and month for which the tanker fleet statistics are reported, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data record.

category.category: The classification of the tanker type (e.g., Oil, Chemical, LNG & LPG), specifying the vessel category being measured for the given month.

number_of_tankers.number_of_tankers: The count of tanker vessels belonging to the specified category that were active or recorded in the given month.

gross_tonnage.gross_tonnage: The total gross tonnage (a measure of ship size and cargo capacity) for all tankers in the specified category during the given month.

year.year: The calendar year for which the tanker statistics are recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data point.

number_of_tankers.number_of_tankers: The count of tankers recorded for the specified year, representing the quantitative measure of tanker fleet size for that period.

gross_tonnage.gross_tonnage: The total gross tonnage of all tankers for the specified year, representing the aggregate carrying capacity measurement for that year's tanker fleet.

period.period: The year and month when the data was recorded, serving as the temporal dimension for organizing departure statistics chronologically.

region.region: The continental geographical classification (such as ASIA, EUROPE, OCEANIA) that groups countries/areas for regional analysis of departure patterns.

cor.cor: The specific country or area within each region (like Japan, Scandinavia, Australia) providing granular geographical context for departure statistics.

los.los: Length of stay categories (such as '5 Days', 'Under 1 Day', '60 Days & Over') classifying departures based on duration of stay.

dep_count.dep_count: The count of departures recorded for each combination of period, region, country/area, and length of stay category, representing the core quantitative measurement in this dataset.

rank.rank: The numerical position of the country within the specified report's ranking for the given year, serving as a performance measurement.

latest_year.latest_year: The most recent year for which the ranking data from the associated report is available for this country, providing temporal context.

report.report: The name or code of the specific global ranking or index (e.g., IMD WCY, WEF GITR NRI) that produced this ranking, categorizing the data source.

country.country: The name of the nation that is the subject of this ranking entry, serving as the primary entity identifier.

date_of_launch.date_of_launch: The date when the land tender or auction was officially announced to the public, marking the start of the bidding process for this location.

date_of_tender_closing_or_auction.date_of_tender_closing_or_auction: The date when bidding closed for this land tender or auction, representing the deadline for submissions for this location.

date_of_award.date_of_award: The date when the tender or auction was officially awarded to the successful bidder for this specific property location.

location.location: The physical address or description of the land parcel being tendered or auctioned, serving as the primary identifier for each property transaction.

type_of_development_allowed.type_of_development_allowed: The permitted use or zoning classification for the land parcel, specifying what can be built or developed on this location.

site_area.site_area: The total land area of the property in square meters, measuring the size of the site available for development at this location.

name_of_successful_tenderer_or_bidder.name_of_successful_tenderer_or_bidder: The name of the individual or company that won the tender or auction for this specific property location.

successful_tender_or_auction_price.successful_tender_or_auction_price: The monetary amount of the winning bid for the land parcel, representing the price paid for this location.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year period for which government revenue data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal entity for organizing financial performance metrics.

total_gov_operating_rev.total_gov_operating_rev: The total operating revenue collected by the Singapore government during the specified financial year, representing overall government income from all sources.

iras_collection.iras_collection: The revenue specifically collected by the Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore (IRAS) during the financial year, representing tax and duty collections as a subset of total government revenue.

month.month: The year and month for which the data value is recorded, providing the temporal context for the measurement.

level_1.level_1: The top-level category or aggregation label (e.g., 'Total'), representing the broadest classification for the data value.

level_2.level_2: The secondary geographic region or category (e.g., 'North East Asia'), providing a mid-level classification for the data value.

level_3.level_3: The most specific geographic entity or sub-category (e.g., 'China'), indicating the finest granularity of classification for the data value.

value.value: The core quantitative measurement (e.g., count, amount, or metric) associated with the specified month and geographic hierarchy.

year.year: The calendar year for which the divorcee count is recorded, providing the temporal context for the demographic data.

level_1.level_1: The gender classification of the divorcee population, categorizing the count as either 'Total Female Divorcees' or 'Total Male Divorcees'.

level_2.level_2: The age group of the divorcee population, specifying the demographic bracket (e.g., '25-29', '40-44') for the counted individuals.

value.value: The number of divorcees recorded, representing the quantitative count for the specified combination of year, gender, and age group.

month.month: The month and year when the service coverage measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for each data point as an attribute of the telco's performance.

telco.telco: The telecommunications company being measured, serving as the primary entity identifier for tracking service coverage performance across different providers.

service_coverage.service_coverage: The percentage of service coverage achieved by the telco during the specified month, representing a key performance metric that measures network reliability and availability.

year.year: The calendar year for which the enrollment data is recorded, providing temporal context for when each academic program's enrollment was measured.

academic_programme.academic_programme: The type or category of educational program being tracked, representing the main subject of enrollment analysis (e.g., N LEVELS, O LEVELS, A LEVELS, DIPLOMA, OTHER COURSES).

yearly_enrolment.yearly_enrolment: The number of students enrolled in each academic program for the corresponding year, serving as a quantitative measurement of program participation.

year.year: The calendar year when this educational topic or workshop was offered, providing temporal context for when this learning opportunity was available.

category.category: The subject area or discipline grouping for this educational topic, classifying the content into broad fields like Physics, Computing, or Nature Science.

topic.topic: The specific title or description of the educational content, workshop, or learning activity, representing the main subject matter being taught or explored.

level.level: The educational level or target audience for this topic, indicating whether it's designed for Primary, Secondary, or Tertiary education stages.

year.year: The calendar year for which the average annual mileage data is recorded, providing temporal context for when the vehicle mileage measurement was taken.

vehicle_type.vehicle_type: The classification of the vehicle (e.g., Cars, Heavy Goods Vehicles, Motorcycles), serving as the primary entity for which mileage statistics are tracked.

average_annual_mileage.average_annual_mileage: The typical yearly distance traveled by vehicles of the specified type, measured in miles or kilometers, representing the quantitative performance metric for each vehicle category.

year.year: The calendar year for which the data point is recorded, providing the temporal context for the measured value.

level_1.level_1: The primary classification category, such as an ethnic group or major demographic segment, used to group the measured values.

level_2.level_2: The secondary classification category, often a month or finer sub-division, providing additional detail for categorizing the value within the primary level.

value.value: The numerical measurement or statistic (e.g., count, rate) associated with the specific combination of year, primary category, and secondary category.

year.year: The calendar year for which the industry data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal context for the dataset.

industry1.industry1: The classification of the economic sector (e.g., manufacturing, services), categorizing the industry associated with the annual measurement.

total_paid_hours.total_paid_hours: The measured total number of paid hours for the specified industry in the given year, representing a key labor metric.

date_of_launch.date_of_launch: The date when the tender for this land/property location was officially launched, marking the beginning of the bidding process.

date_of_tender_closing.date_of_tender_closing: The deadline date for submitting bids for this location's tender, indicating when the bidding period ended.

date_of_award.date_of_award: The date when the tender for this location was awarded to the successful bidder, finalizing the transaction.

location.location: The physical address or description of the land/property site being tendered, serving as the primary identifier for the development parcel.

type_of_devt_allowed.type_of_devt_allowed: The category of development permitted on this location, such as Residential, Industrial, or Commercial, defining its intended use.

lease.lease: The lease duration in years granted for this location, indicating the tenure period for the development rights.

type_of_devt_code.type_of_devt_code: A coded classification for the type of development allowed on this location, providing a standardized categorization.

site_area.site_area: The total land area of this location in square meters, measuring the physical size of the development site.

gross_floor_area.gross_floor_area: The maximum allowable gross floor area for development on this location in square meters, defining the buildable space.

no_of_bids.no_of_bids: The number of bids received for this location's tender, indicating the level of competition for the site.

successful_tenderer_name.successful_tenderer_name: The name of the company or entity that won the tender for this location, identifying the successful bidder.

successful_tender_price.successful_tender_price: The monetary value of the winning bid for this location, representing the price paid for the development rights.

psm_per_gpr_or_gfa.psm_per_gpr_or_gfa: The price per square meter calculated based on gross floor area or gross plot ratio for this location, showing the land cost intensity.

planning_area.planning_area: The urban planning region or zone where this location is situated, providing geographical context within Singapore's planning framework.

epi_year.epi_year: The epidemiological year for which the data is recorded, representing the calendar year in the epidemiological reporting system. This combines with epi_week to uniquely identify specific time periods.

epi_week.epi_week: The week number within the epidemiological year, indicating the specific reporting period. Together with epi_year, this forms a complete temporal identifier for the data point.

status.status: The classification category for the reported data, indicating whether the count represents COVID cases, Non-COVID cases, or Empty/unknown status for that time period.

count.count: The numerical measurement representing the quantity of cases or data points for the specified status during the given epidemiological week, typically representing case counts or incidence rates.

year.year: The calendar year when the sick leave data was recorded, providing temporal context for the employee absence statistics.

type_of_employee.type_of_employee: The classification of employee groups (management/executive vs rank-and-file), serving as the primary entity for analyzing sick leave patterns across different organizational roles.

sick_leave.sick_leave: The category of sick leave taken (hospitalisation leave or outpatient sick leave), classifying the type of medical absence for each employee group.

avg_days_per_absentee.avg_days_per_absentee: The average number of sick days taken per employee who was absent, measuring the duration of sick leave for those who actually took leave.

avg_days_per_employee.avg_days_per_employee: The average number of sick days across all employees in the category, representing the overall sick leave utilization rate for the employee group.

quarter.quarter: The year and quarter (e.g., 1990-Q3) to which the industry employment data pertains, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each record.

industry1.industry1: The high-level industry sector (e.g., services, manufacturing, others) categorizing the type of economic activity for this quarterly observation.

industry2.industry2: The more specific industry sub-sector or detailed classification within industry1, providing granular detail about the economic activity recorded for the quarter.

total_paid_hours.total_paid_hours: The total or average paid hours for the specified industry and quarter, representing a key labor metric measured for this time and industry combination.

year.year: The calendar year associated with the certification data, providing the temporal context for the worker type and count.

types_of_workers_covered.types_of_workers_covered: The classification or category of occupational groups covered, serving as the primary subject defining the type of workers being certified.

no._certified.no._certified: The number of workers certified within the specified worker type and year, representing the quantitative measure of certifications.

level_no.level_no: A classification code or tier level for the business entity, possibly related to its registration type or entity hierarchy. It categorizes the entity.

block.block: A numeric identifier, likely part of the entity's registered address, specifying a building or street block. It provides location context for the entity.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: The legal structure or form of the business entity, such as Sole Proprietor, Partnership, or Private Limited Company. It defines the entity's constitutional type.

entity_name.entity_name: The official registered name of the business entity, serving as the primary identifier for each record in this dataset.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: The current operational or registration status of the entity, indicating whether it is active (Live/Live Company), cancelled, or struck off. It describes the entity's active state.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Singapore Standard Industrial Classification code representing the main business activity of the entity. It categorizes the entity's core industry.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: An optional secondary SSIC code indicating an additional or subsidiary business activity conducted by the entity. It provides further classification detail for the entity.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The count of officers (e.g., directors, partners, secretaries) formally associated with the business entity. It quantifies the entity's governance structure.

quarter.quarter: The year and quarter (e.g., 2015-Q2) for which the overtime paid hours data is reported, providing the temporal context for this measurement.

industry1.industry1: The broadest industry sector classification (e.g., services, manufacturing) associated with the reported overtime hours, categorizing the measurement at the highest level.

industry2.industry2: A more specific industry grouping within the sector defined by industry1, providing mid-level categorization for the overtime hours measurement.

industry3.industry3: The most detailed industry classification within the hierarchy, specifying the precise industry segment for which the overtime paid hours are measured.

year.year: The calendar year for which potable water sales data is recorded, serving as the temporal dimension for tracking water consumption patterns over time.

category.category: The classification of water consumers as either Domestic (household/residential) or Non-domestic (commercial/industrial), representing the customer segment for water sales analysis.

identifier_uuid.identifier_uuid: A unique universal identifier for each digital heritage item or publication record, serving as the primary key that distinguishes individual entries in the catalog.

identifier_uri.identifier_uri: The persistent URL or web address that provides direct online access to the digital item, acting as a locator attribute for the identified resource.

title.title: The name or descriptive title of the digital heritage item, representing its core identifying label as a key attribute of the record.

contributor.contributor: The person or organization credited with contributing to the creation or donation of the item, describing an agent role related to the resource.

digital_publisher.digital_publisher: The organization responsible for digitizing and making the item available online, indicating the digital provenance of the identified resource.

original_publisher.original_publisher: The entity that originally published or produced the physical version of the item, providing historical publication context for the resource.

is_referenced_by.is_referenced_by: An external identifier or reference number (such as a call number) used by other systems to cite this item, linking the resource to broader cataloging frameworks.

date_created.date_created: The publication or creation date of the item, providing temporal context for when the resource was originally issued.

abstract.abstract: A textual summary or description of the content and scope of the item, offering a concise overview of the resource's subject matter.

subject_lcsh.subject_lcsh: Subject terms assigned from the Library of Congress Subject Headings (LCSH) vocabulary, classifying the item's topics using a standardized library taxonomy.

subject_singheritage.subject_singheritage: Subject terms from a Singapore-specific heritage taxonomy, categorizing the item's content within a local cultural and historical context.

language.language: The primary language in which the item's content is written, describing a fundamental characteristic of the resource's communication medium.

ispartof_collections.ispartof_collections: A hierarchical path or set of collection names indicating where this item is cataloged within the digital library's organizational structure.

nlb_type.nlb_type: The format or genre of the resource as defined by the National Library Board, such as 'Digitised Periodical' or 'Electronic Periodical'.

rights.rights: A statement of copyright ownership and licensing terms for the item, specifying the legal rights associated with the resource.

access_rights.access_rights: The terms and conditions governing how the item may be used, detailing permissions and restrictions for research, study, and reproduction.

period.period: The year when the visitor statistics were collected, providing temporal context for the travel purpose data.

region.region: The geographical grouping of countries, categorizing the country of residence into broader regional segments.

cor.cor: Country of residence or origin of the visitors, serving as the primary entity for which travel purpose statistics are reported.

leisure.leisure: Percentage of visitors from this country who traveled for leisure purposes, representing recreational travel activities.

holiday.holiday: Percentage of visitors from this country who traveled specifically for holiday/vacation purposes, a subset of leisure travel.

vfr.vfr: Percentage of visitors from this country who traveled to visit friends and relatives, representing social travel purposes.

business.business: Percentage of visitors from this country who traveled for business-related purposes, encompassing all commercial travel.

general_business_purpose.general_business_purpose: Percentage of business travelers engaged in general business activities, representing a subset of the business category.

mice.mice: Percentage of visitors traveling for Meetings, Incentives, Conferences, and Exhibitions, representing organized business/event travel.

others.others: Percentage of visitors whose travel purpose falls into other uncategorized reasons not specified in the main categories.

not_stated.not_stated: Percentage of visitors who did not specify or report their travel purpose, representing missing or unreported data.

year.year: The election year in which the presidential candidate ran, providing the temporal context for their electoral performance.

candidates.candidates: The name of the presidential candidate, serving as the primary subject identifying the individual who contested in the election.

vote_percentage.vote_percentage: The proportion of total votes received by the candidate in that election, expressed as a decimal, indicating their share of the electorate's support.

year.year: The calendar year when the probation orders were recorded, serving as a temporal dimension for tracking trends over time in conjunction with gender classification.

new_probation_orders.new_probation_orders: The count of new probation orders issued during the specified year for the specified gender, representing the quantitative measurement in this statistical dataset.

year.year: The calendar year when the ridership data was recorded, serving as the temporal reference point for all transportation statistics in this dataset.

average_ridership.average_ridership: The average number of passengers using the specified type of public transportation during the given year, representing the ridership volume measurement.

type_of_sale.type_of_sale: The classification of the sales transaction type (e.g., Resale, New Sale, Sub Sale) that occurred within the given quarter, categorizing the nature of the sales activity.

units.units: The count of units sold for the corresponding sales type within the specified quarter, measuring the sales volume for that category and period.

property_type.property_type: The category of property (e.g., Non-Landed, All Residential) to which the index applies, classifying the type of real estate measured.

locality.locality: The geographical region or area (e.g., Whole Island, Core Central Region) for which the index is calculated, specifying the location scope of the property price measurement.

industry1.industry1: The industry sector classification for the workforce data, categorizing the economic activity area to which the employment statistics apply.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: The first 50 words of the article's text content, providing a preview or excerpt of the full article.

year.year: The calendar year when the enforcement activities occurred, providing temporal context for when the measurements were taken.

type.type: The category or classification of enforcement activity being tracked, such as court prosecutions, enforcement checks, or various notices issued. This is the primary entity that defines what is being measured in each record.

number_of_enforcement.number_of_enforcement: The count or quantity of enforcement activities that occurred for the specified type in the given year, representing the volume or frequency of enforcement actions.

yr.yr: Indicates the calendar year for which the member count data is reported, providing temporal context for each balance group's statistics.

regrossed_bal_grp.regrossed_bal_grp: Categorizes members into balance range groups based on their regrossed balance amounts, serving as the primary segmentation dimension for analyzing member distribution.

no_of_active_mbrs.no_of_active_mbrs: Represents the number of active members belonging to each balance range group in the specified year, quantifying the distribution of members across balance categories.

as_of_month.as_of_month: The specific month and year for which the demographic count data is reported, serving as the primary temporal context for the aggregated statistics.

age_groups.age_groups: The categorical age bracket (e.g., '0 - 11 years old') for which the count is provided, segmenting the data reported for each month.

count.count: The numerical quantity (e.g., number of individuals or cases) corresponding to the specified age group for the given month, representing the measured value of the observation.

year.year: The calendar year when the trade union data was recorded, serving as the temporal dimension for tracking union statistics over time.

size_of_trade_union.size_of_trade_union: A categorical classification of trade unions based on their membership size ranges (e.g., 'Under 50', '250 to 999'), describing the scale category of the unions counted.

no_of_trade_unions.no_of_trade_unions: The count of trade unions that fall within each size category for a given year, representing the quantitative measurement of union prevalence by size.

year.year: The calendar year for which the membership data is reported, providing the temporal context for each record.

type_of_interest_groups.type_of_interest_groups: The category or name of the interest group (e.g., Sports, Arts, Cooking), serving as the primary entity for which membership is tracked.

no_of_members.no_of_members: The total count of individuals registered as members for the specified interest group type in the given year, measuring the group's size.

year.year: The calendar year for which the establishment count is recorded, providing the temporal context for the data point related to the Transport & Storage Services sector.

level_1.level_1: The category or industry sector being measured, specifically the total number of establishments classified under SSIC 49-53 for Transport & Storage Services. This is the main subject of the dataset.

value.value: The numerical count of establishments in the specified sector (SSIC 49-53 - Transport & Storage Services) for the corresponding year, representing the quantitative measurement.

newspaper_title.newspaper_title: The name of the newspaper that published the article, identifying the source publication for this piece of content.

issue_id.issue_id: A unique identifier for the specific newspaper issue containing this article, linking the article to its broader publication context.

issue_date.issue_date: The publication date of the newspaper issue containing this article, providing the temporal context for when the article was released.

edition.edition: The edition number of the newspaper issue containing this article, specifying a particular version of that day's publication.

page_id.page_id: A unique identifier for the specific page within the newspaper issue where this article appears, locating the article within the physical/digital layout.

page_number.page_number: The sequential number of the page within the newspaper issue where this article is located, indicating its position in the publication.

article_id.article_id: A unique identifier for the individual newspaper article, serving as the primary key for this specific piece of content.

article_title.article_title: The headline or title of the newspaper article, summarizing the main topic or subject of the content.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: The first approximately 50 words of the article's body text, providing a content preview or excerpt of the article.

year.year: The calendar year for which the unemployment statistics are recorded, serving as the temporal identifier for each data point in the time series.

residential_status.residential_status: The classification of the population group being measured (e.g., resident population), categorizing which demographic segment the unemployment data applies to for each year.

long_term_unemployed.long_term_unemployed: The count of individuals who are long-term unemployed for the specified year and residential status, representing the quantitative measurement of extended unemployment within that population group.

newspaper_title.newspaper_title: The name of the newspaper in which the article was published, identifying the source publication for this article.

issue_id.issue_id: A unique identifier for the specific newspaper issue containing this article, grouping it with other articles from the same publication instance.

issue_date.issue_date: The publication date of the newspaper issue containing this article, providing the temporal context for when it was released.

edition.edition: The edition number of the newspaper issue (e.g., first edition), specifying the version of the publication that contains this article.

page_id.page_id: A unique identifier for the specific page on which this article appears, providing the physical or logical location within the issue.

page_number.page_number: The sequential number of the page within the newspaper issue where this article is found, indicating its placement.

article_id.article_id: The unique identifier for this specific newspaper article, serving as the primary key for the article entity.

article_title.article_title: The headline or title of the newspaper article, describing the main topic or subject of the content.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: The first approximately 50 words of the article's text, providing a content excerpt or summary of the article.

newspaper_title.newspaper_title: The name of the newspaper publication where this article appeared, identifying the source periodical for the content.

issue_id.issue_id: A unique identifier for the specific newspaper issue containing this article, linking the article to its parent publication instance.

issue_date.issue_date: The publication date of the newspaper issue in which this article was published, providing the temporal context for the content.

edition.edition: The edition number of the newspaper issue (e.g., first edition), indicating a specific version of the issue containing this article.

page_id.page_id: A unique identifier for the specific page within the issue where this article is located, linking the article to its physical page context.

page_number.page_number: The sequential page number within the newspaper issue where this article appears, specifying the article's location in the publication.

article_id.article_id: A unique identifier for this individual newspaper article or content item, serving as the primary key for the archival record.

article_title.article_title: The headline or title of the article, describing the subject or topic of this specific newspaper content piece.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: The first approximately 50 words of the article's textual content, providing a preview or excerpt of the article's main body.

year.year: The calendar year when the museum count data was recorded, providing temporal context for when each category's museum count was measured.

category.category: The classification or type of museums being tracked, representing the main subject of analysis such as Science and Innovation, Healthcare, Lifestyle & Collectibles, etc.

museums.museums: The count or number of museums recorded for each category in the specified year, representing quantitative measurement data about museum availability by type.

year.year: The calendar year for which the data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing the statistics.

type.type: A categorical classification indicating whether the data represents Ticketed or Non-Ticketed categories within each year.

number.number: A quantitative count or measurement associated with each year and type combination, representing the volume or frequency for that specific category in that year.

year.year: The year of the observation or data point, serving as the primary temporal identifier for tracking counts of citizens held over time.

type_of_citizens.type_of_citizens: The classification of citizenship status (e.g., Foreign or National/Local), categorizing the group of citizens for which the count is reported in a given year.

number_of_citizens_held.number_of_citizens_held: The count or number of citizens held (likely in custody or detention) for a specific year and citizenship type, representing the quantitative measure for each record.

year.year: The calendar year for which the sector counts are recorded, serving as the temporal dimension that organizes this statistical data.

sector.sector: The classification category indicating the professional or operational sector (Public Sector, Private Sector, or Not in Active Practice) for the entities being counted.

count.count: The numerical count of entities (likely professionals or organizations) within each specific year and sector combination, representing the quantitative measurement in this dataset.

year.year: The calendar year for which the course data is aggregated, serving as the primary temporal dimension for this dataset.

course_category.course_category: The classification or type of courses (e.g., Arts & Lifestyle, Sports), representing the specific program area being counted for a given year.

no_of_classes.no_of_classes: The count or total number of classes conducted or offered for the corresponding course category within the specified year, providing a quantitative measure of activity volume.

year.year: The calendar year for which the measurement is recorded, serving as the temporal reference point for all data points in the table.

level_1.level_1: Categorical groupings representing different financial brackets or tiers (likely revenue ranges), which segment the measurements within each year.

value.value: A numerical measurement or statistic associated with each year and category combination, representing the quantitative data being tracked across time and financial brackets.

month.month: The specific month and year when the measurement was recorded, serving as a temporal reference point for the data point related to Ready Mixed Concrete.

level_1.level_1: The category or entity being measured, which in this dataset is consistently 'Ready Mixed Concrete', identifying the main subject of the data.

value.value: A numerical measurement or index value associated with Ready Mixed Concrete for the given month, representing the quantitative data point being tracked.

year.year: The calendar year when the population data was recorded or measured, providing temporal context for when each age group count was observed.

population_by_age_group.population_by_age_group: The categorical classification of population segments based on age ranges (e.g., 'Below 21', '21-30', '31-40', etc.), serving as the primary entity being analyzed in this demographic dataset.

number_of_population.number_of_population: The count or quantity of individuals belonging to each age group category for the corresponding year, representing the measured population size for that demographic segment.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year for which the property transaction data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension that organizes all property transaction counts in the dataset.

property_type.property_type: The classification of commercial property (e.g., Shops and Eating Houses, Offices, Supermarkets & Emporiums), categorizing the type of real estate being transacted within each financial year.

category.category: The transaction type indicating whether properties were rented or sold, representing the nature of the commercial property transaction within each financial year and property type.

no_of_units.no_of_units: The count of property units for the specified combination of financial year, property type, and transaction category, measuring the volume of commercial property transactions.

year.year: The calendar year when the population measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for when each education level population count was observed.

population_by_education_level.population_by_education_level: The educational attainment category of the population being measured, serving as the primary classification for demographic analysis of education levels.

number_of_population.number_of_population: The count of individuals belonging to each education level category in the specified year, representing the quantitative measurement of population size for demographic analysis.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year when the service level performance was measured, providing temporal context for each performance record.

service_levels.service_levels: The specific service or operational activity being measured, representing the main subject of performance evaluation (e.g., refund processing, email response, call answering).

target.target: The performance target or goal percentage set for the service level in that financial year, representing the expected standard of service delivery.

achieved.achieved: The actual performance percentage achieved for the service level in that financial year, showing how well the target was met or exceeded.

planning_area.planning_area: A geographic planning region in Singapore where the demographic data is collected, representing the primary administrative area for urban planning purposes.

subzone.subzone: A smaller geographic subdivision within a planning area, providing more precise location information for the demographic data.

age_group.age_group: The age range category of residents being counted, representing demographic segmentation by life stage (e.g., 10_to_14, 45_to_49).

sex.sex: The gender classification of residents (Males or Females) for the demographic breakdown.

type_of_dwelling.type_of_dwelling: The housing type category where residents live, such as HDB flats, condominiums, or landed properties.

resident_count.resident_count: The number of residents counted in each specific demographic segment, representing the quantitative measurement that is the focus of this dataset.

year.year: The year when the demographic data was collected or recorded, providing temporal context for the resident counts.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year period for which tax enforcement statistics are reported, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing this dataset.

no_of_cases.no_of_cases: The number of tax enforcement cases recorded during the specified financial year, measuring the volume of enforcement activity.

tax_and_penalty_arising.tax_and_penalty_arising: The total monetary amount of tax and penalties collected from enforcement cases during the specified financial year, representing the financial impact of enforcement actions.

age_group.age_group: The age range category of staff members, representing demographic segmentation of the workforce being measured.

public_service_sector.public_service_sector: The type of public service organization (Civil Service or Statutory Board), indicating the institutional sector where staff are employed.

executive_level.executive_level: The job rank or hierarchical level of staff (Junior Executive, Senior Executive & above), classifying staff by their position grade.

year.year: The calendar year when the staff count was recorded, providing temporal context for the workforce measurement.

staff_strength.staff_strength: The total number of staff members counted, representing the workforce size for the specified demographic and organizational attributes.

month.month: The reporting period (year and month) for loan data, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each record.

total_loans.total_loans: The total value of all loans issued during the month, representing the overall lending volume for that period.

total_loans_business.total_loans_business: The portion of total loans allocated to business lending during the month, indicating commercial credit activity.

total_loans_consumer.total_loans_consumer: The portion of total loans allocated to consumer lending during the month, indicating personal credit activity.

rankmostimptchild_new_1.rankmostimptchild_new_1: A ranking value indicating priority or importance rating, representing the respondent's assessment of child-related importance.

ban_children3.ban_children3: A binary response indicating whether the respondent has children or not, providing demographic information about parental status.

ban_q28.ban_q28: The respondent's answer identifying who influences their decisions, revealing sources of authority or guidance they consider important.

ban_q437.ban_q437: A binary response (Yes/No) to a survey question, capturing the respondent's position on a specific issue or behavior.

ban_age.ban_age: The age group category of the respondent, providing demographic segmentation for analysis.

highestlevel.highestlevel: The highest educational attainment level of the respondent, indicating their academic background and qualifications.

respondent_id.respondent_id: A unique identifier for each survey participant, serving as the primary key for tracking individual responses.

yearbornin_1_slice.yearbornin_1_slice: The respondent's year of birth, providing precise age data for demographic analysis and cohort studies.

q20_q214.q20_q214: A binary response to a combined survey question, capturing the respondent's answer to a specific issue or scenario.

year.year: The calendar year when the birth occurred, providing temporal context for the stillbirth data.

mother_age.mother_age: The age group of the mother at the time of birth, categorized in 5-year intervals as a demographic factor related to stillbirth risk.

child_birth_weight.child_birth_weight: The weight range of the child at birth in grams, representing a key health indicator that correlates with stillbirth outcomes.

child_gender.child_gender: The biological sex of the child (M for male, F for female), serving as a demographic variable in stillbirth analysis.

period_of_gestation.period_of_gestation: The duration of pregnancy in weeks at the time of birth, indicating gestational age which is a critical factor in stillbirth occurrence.

still_births_count.still_births_count: The number of stillbirths recorded for each specific combination of year, maternal age, birth weight, gender, and gestation period.

year.year: The calendar year when the activity data was recorded, providing temporal context for when each type of port activity occurred and was measured.

type.type: The category of maritime or port activity being tracked, representing the main subject of measurement which includes TradeNet permits, inward movements, transhipment operations, and outward movements.

quantity.quantity: The numerical count or volume of occurrences for each activity type in a given year, measuring the scale or frequency of the port operations.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year for which the case processing statistics are reported, serving as a primary temporal dimension for categorizing the data.

case_type.case_type: The category or classification of the tax-related cases (e.g., Advance Pricing Arrangement), defining the type of procedure being measured.

time_taken.time_taken: The duration bucket representing how long the cases took to process, categorizing cases by their completion timeline.

no_of_cases.no_of_cases: The number of cases counted for the specific combination of financial year, case type, and processing duration, representing the core quantitative metric.

country.country: The country where the survey respondent resides, with all records in this dataset showing Singapore as the location.

q20_q214.q20_q214: A survey question response indicating a specific characteristic or behavior of the individual, recorded as Yes/No answers.

yearbornin_1_slice1.yearbornin_1_slice1: The age or year of birth of the survey respondent, serving as the primary demographic characteristic for analysis.

hhi.hhi: Household income bracket representing the respondent's income level, shown as categorical ranges or 'Prefer not to answer'.

ban_q18_q192.ban_q18_q192: A behavioral or preference survey question response from the respondent, recorded as a Yes/No answer.

ban_q435.ban_q435: An additional survey question response capturing specific information about the respondent's characteristics or behaviors.

ban_occupation_role2.ban_occupation_role2: The occupation classification of the respondent, indicating their professional role or employment status.

socialnetwork_dp08.socialnetwork_dp08: Indicator of whether the respondent uses or participates in social networks, showing their digital engagement.

ban_q431.ban_q431: Another survey question response providing additional demographic or behavioral information about the respondent.

ban_children4.ban_children4: Indicator of whether the respondent has children, representing their parental status.

ban_education2.ban_education2: The education level classification of the respondent, showing their highest educational attainment.

ban_gender.ban_gender: The gender of the survey respondent, recorded as Male or Female in this dataset.

quarter.quarter: The year and quarter period for which space allocation and supply data is reported, serving as the primary temporal context for the metrics.

product_segment.product_segment: The category or type of real estate or industrial space (e.g., High-Rise Space, Business Park Space), classifying the space being measured in each quarter.

total_allocated.total_allocated: The amount of space allocated or occupied for the given product segment in the specified quarter, representing the utilized portion of available space.

supply.supply: The total available space for the given product segment in the specified quarter, indicating the overall capacity or inventory of that space type.

country.country: The country where the survey respondent resides, with all records showing Singapore as the location for this dataset.

q20_q214.q20_q214: A survey question response indicating a Yes/No answer or non-response (-), representing a specific behavioral or demographic characteristic of the respondent.

yearbornin_1_slice1.yearbornin_1_slice1: The birth year or age group of the survey respondent, serving as the primary demographic identifier for individual records in this dataset.

hhi.hhi: Household income bracket indicating the respondent's economic status, ranging from specific income ranges to 'Prefer not to answer' responses.

ban_q18_q192.ban_q18_q192: A survey question response (Yes/No) capturing a specific behavioral or attitudinal characteristic of the respondent.

ban_q435.ban_q435: A survey question response (Yes/No) representing another behavioral or demographic attribute of the respondent.

ban_occupation_role2.ban_occupation_role2: The respondent's occupational classification or role, with 'No' indicating no occupation or non-response in some records.

socialnetwork_dp08.socialnetwork_dp08: Indicates whether the respondent uses social networks (Yes/No), showing digital engagement behavior for all records as 'Yes'.

ban_q431.ban_q431: A survey question response (Yes/No) capturing an additional behavioral or demographic characteristic of the respondent.

ban_children4.ban_children4: Indicates whether the respondent has children (Yes/No), representing family structure demographic information.

ban_education2.ban_education2: Education level indicator (Yes/No/-) showing the respondent's educational attainment or non-response status.

ban_gender.ban_gender: The gender of the survey respondent, recorded as either Male or Female for demographic classification.

resident_type.resident_type: The classification of tax residency status (e.g., Tax Resident or Non-Tax Resident) for the group of companies summarized in this record, defining the tax regime applied.

no_of_companies.no_of_companies: The total number of companies included in this aggregated tax assessment for the specified year and resident type.

chargeable_income.chargeable_income: The total sum of income subject to tax for the aggregated group of companies in this record, representing the tax base before deductions and credits.

net_tax_assessed.net_tax_assessed: The final total tax amount assessed as payable by the aggregated group of companies for the given year and resident type, after applying relevant tax rules and rates.

year.year: The calendar year when the trademark filings were submitted, providing temporal context for when the country's trademark activity occurred.

yearbornin_1_slice.yearbornin_1_slice: The birth year or birth year category of the individual, indicating their age generation.

year.year: The calendar year for which financial data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for tracking fund activities over time.

yr_fund_raised.yr_fund_raised: The total amount of funds raised during the specified year, representing the inflow of financial resources collected in that period.

yr_fund_disbursed.yr_fund_disbursed: The total amount of funds disbursed or distributed during the specified year, representing the outflow of financial resources expended in that period.

month.month: The year and month for which the vessel statistics are aggregated, providing the temporal context for the data record.

vessel_type.vessel_type: The classification of maritime vessels (e.g., Tug, Container, Freighter), serving as the primary category for which counts and tonnage are summarized.

number_of_vessels.number_of_vessels: The total count of vessels belonging to the specified type that were recorded in the given month.

gross_tonnage.gross_tonnage: The sum of the gross tonnage (a volumetric measure of ship size) for all vessels of the specified type recorded in the given month.

year.year: The calendar year when the APS investigations data was collected, serving as the primary temporal dimension for tracking investigation trends over time.

age.age: The age group classification for the individuals involved in APS investigations, categorizing subjects into specific age ranges for demographic analysis alongside the year.

aps_investigations.aps_investigations: The count of Adult Protective Services investigations conducted, representing the volume of cases for each specific year and age group combination.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building where the business entity is located; this is an optional property of the entity that provides specific location context.

street_name.street_name: The street address for the business entity's location; this is a core property that describes where the entity is situated.

entity_type_description.entity_type_description: A classification of the business entity's legal structure, such as 'Business' or 'Local Company'; this is a categorical property defining the entity's type.

uen.uen: The Unique Entity Number that serves as the primary identifier for each registered business entity in the dataset.

year.year: The calendar year when the wage data was collected or reported, providing temporal context for the occupation wage statistics.

occ_desc.occ_desc: The specific job title or occupation being analyzed, serving as the primary subject for wage comparison and statistical reporting.

mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile: The median (50th percentile) monthly basic wage for the specified occupation, representing the fixed salary component excluding allowances and bonuses.

year.year: The academic year when this course information was recorded or is valid, providing temporal context for the course offering.

school.school: The academic division or faculty within Temasek Polytechnic that offers this course, categorizing it by institutional department.

course_name.course_name: The official title of the diploma or educational program, serving as the primary identifier for this course entity.

poly_course_code.poly_course_code: An internal course code used by Temasek Polytechnic for administrative and identification purposes within the institution.

course_description.course_description: A comprehensive overview of the course's curriculum, learning objectives, career prospects, and educational focus areas.

reference.reference: A web URL linking to the official course information page on Temasek Polytechnic's website for additional details.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The number of officers (e.g., directors, partners) associated with the business entity at registration, representing its governance structure.

unit_no.unit_no: The unit number portion of the business entity's registered address, specifying the office or suite location for the entity.

level_no.level_no: The floor or level number portion of the business entity's registered address, indicating the building level where the entity is registered.

entity_name.entity_name: The official registered name of the business entity, representing the legal name associated with the UEN.

unit_no.unit_no: The unit number within a building for the business entity's registered address, providing specific location details as part of the entity's contact information.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: The identifier of the government agency that issued the UEN (e.g., ACRA for Accounting and Corporate Regulatory Authority), indicating which regulatory body authorized this business registration.

address_type.address_type: The classification of the business entity's registered address type (e.g., LOCAL for Singapore addresses), specifying the geographical scope of the business location.

uen.uen: The Unique Entity Number, a standard identifier for business entities in Singapore, serving as the primary key for each registered entity in this dataset.

year.year: The calendar year when the employment hours data was recorded, serving as the temporal context for all statistical measurements.

age_group.age_group: The age range classification of the inhalant abusers who were arrested, grouping individuals into demographic categories for statistical analysis.

no_of_inhalant_abusers_arrested.no_of_inhalant_abusers_arrested: The count of individuals arrested for inhalant abuse within the specified year, status, and age group, representing the quantitative measurement in this dataset.

year.year: Indicates the calendar year when the charity income distribution data was collected, providing temporal context for each proportion measurement.

income_size.income_size: Categorizes charities into different income brackets, serving as the primary classification for analyzing charity financial distributions across years.

proportion_of_charities.proportion_of_charities: Represents the percentage or proportion of total charities falling into each income size category for a given year, measuring the distribution of charities across income brackets.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: The identifier for the government agency (e.g., ACRA) responsible for issuing the Unique Entity Number, indicating the source of the entity's registration.

uen.uen: The Unique Entity Number serving as the primary identifier for a business entity registered in Singapore, uniquely distinguishing it from all other entities.

entity_name.entity_name: The official registered name of the business entity, representing its legal identity for commercial and regulatory purposes.

entity_type_description.entity_type_description: Describes the legal form of the entity, such as 'Business' or 'Local Company', classifying its fundamental structure under Singapore law.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: Specifies the internal governance structure of the entity, such as 'Sole Proprietor' or 'Partnership', defining its ownership and operational framework.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date when the business entity was first formally registered or incorporated, marking the start of its legal existence.

street_name.street_name: The name of the street where the entity is registered, specifying the thoroughfare for its address.

level_no.level_no: The floor or level number within a building, providing vertical positioning details for the entity's registered address.

unit_no.unit_no: The specific unit or suite number within a building level, giving the precise location of the entity's registered office.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building where the entity is registered, identifying the specific structure at its address.

postal_code.postal_code: The Singapore postal code for the entity's registered address, enabling mail delivery and geographical pinpointing.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: A count of the charges (e.g., mortgages, debentures) registered against the entity, indicating its secured financial obligations.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Singapore Standard Industrial Classification code numerically representing the entity's main business activity.

primary_ssic_description.primary_ssic_description: The textual description corresponding to the primary SSIC code, detailing the entity's principal line of business.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: A secondary SSIC code for the entity, numerically representing an additional or subsidiary business activity.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: The textual description for the secondary SSIC code, detailing the entity's ancillary line of business.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The total number of officers (e.g., directors, partners, secretaries) formally associated with the management of the entity.

year.year: The calendar year for which the employment hours data is reported, providing the temporal context for all subsequent metrics.

nature_of_employment.nature_of_employment: The classification of the employee group being measured, such as 'full-time', 'part-time', or the aggregate 'all' employees, serving as the primary categorical subject of the data.

total_paid_hours.total_paid_hours: The average total number of hours paid per employee within the specified employment category and year, encompassing both standard and overtime hours.

standard_hours.standard_hours: The average number of regular or contracted hours worked per employee within the specified employment category and year, excluding overtime.

overtime_of_all_employees.overtime_of_all_employees: The average number of overtime hours per employee within the specified employment category and year, calculated across all employees in that group (including those with zero overtime).

overtime_of_employees_who_worked_overtim.overtime_of_employees_who_worked_overtim: The average number of overtime hours specifically for employees within the category and year who actually worked overtime, providing insight into the intensity of overtime for those who performed it.

year.year: The calendar year for which the arrest data is recorded, providing the temporal context for the count of inhalant abusers.

status.status: A classification indicating if the count represents 'New' inhalant abusers arrested or the 'Total' number arrested for that year and race group.

race.race: The ethnic group (e.g., Malay, Chinese, Others) of the inhalant abusers who were arrested, used to segment the arrest statistics.

no_of_inhalant_abusers_arrested.no_of_inhalant_abusers_arrested: The primary measurement representing the count or number of individuals arrested for inhalant abuse, segmented by year, status, and race.

year.year: The calendar year when the percentage measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for when each cause group's proportion was measured.

broad_cause_group.broad_cause_group: A category of health conditions or diseases, representing the main subject being analyzed for percentage distribution across different years.

percentage.percentage: The proportion or share represented by each cause group for the given year, quantifying the relative magnitude of each health condition category.

year.year: The academic year for which enrollment data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal reference point for tracking educational enrollment trends over time.

sex.sex: The gender classification of the enrollment data, indicating whether figures represent female students (F) or mixed/total enrollment (MF) for the corresponding year.

enrolment_pri_3.enrolment_pri_3: The number of students enrolled in Primary 3 education level, representing the quantitative enrollment measurement for the specified year and gender category.

year.year: The calendar year when the export revenue was recorded, providing temporal context for when each region's export data was measured.

region.region: The geographical area or territory for which export revenue is being reported, serving as the primary entity in this dataset that categorizes the export data.

month.month: The month and year of the observation, serving as the temporal identifier for each data point in this time series dataset.

level_1.level_1: A categorical classification indicating the aggregation level or category of the measurement (all values are 'Total' in this sample, suggesting aggregated data).

value.value: The numerical measurement or metric value associated with the specified month and category, representing the quantitative data point being tracked.

year.year: The calendar year for which the enrolment data is recorded, providing the temporal context for the associated qualification and its enrolment count.

qualification.qualification: The category or level of the academic program (e.g., Diploma, Undergraduate, Post-graduate), serving as the primary entity for which enrolment statistics are tracked.

enrolment.enrolment: The total number of students enrolled in the specified qualification during the given year, representing a quantitative measure of student participation.

year.year: The calendar year when the new cases were recorded, providing temporal context for when these health events occurred.

gender.gender: The demographic classification of individuals (Male or Female) for whom new cases were reported, categorizing the affected population groups.

new_cases.new_cases: The count of newly reported cases for a specific health condition or disease, representing the volume of occurrences measured annually by gender.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year for which the financial data is recorded, serving as the temporal context that organizes all expenditure records in this dataset.

actual_revised_estimated.actual_revised_estimated: Indicates whether the financial figure represents actual, revised, or estimated amounts, showing the data's reliability status for that fiscal year.

type.type: Classifies expenditures as either Operating or Development types, categorizing the broad nature of spending for that fiscal year.

category.category: Provides a more detailed classification within each expenditure type (e.g., Transfers, Running Cost, Development Expenditure), specifying the expenditure category for that fiscal year.

class.class: The most specific level of expenditure classification (e.g., Social Transfers, Expenditure on Manpower), detailing the precise nature of spending within each category for that fiscal year.

amount.amount: The monetary value of the expenditure in the specified class, category, and type for that fiscal year, representing the quantitative financial measurement.

month.month: The year and month for which the data point is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for this time-series dataset.

level_1.level_1: A top-level categorical classification for the data, indicating the aggregation level (e.g., 'Total') for the reported value in relation to the specific month and cluster.

level_2.level_2: The specific industrial cluster or sector (e.g., General Manufacturing, Biomedical Manufacturing) to which the value measurement pertains for the given month.

value.value: The quantitative measurement or index value associated with the specified month and industrial cluster, representing the core metric being tracked in this dataset.

company_licensee_name.company_licensee_name: The legal name of the company or individual holding the operating license, serving as the primary identifier for each licensed entity in the dataset.

valid_period.valid_period: The start and end dates for which the licensee's operating permit is valid, representing the active duration of the license associated with the company.

retail_outlet_address.retail_outlet_address: The full physical address of the specific retail premises operated under the license, detailing the location where the licensed business activities occur.

shs_year.shs_year: The Singapore Household Survey year when the data was collected, serving as the temporal reference point for all demographic measurements in this dataset.

elderly_pop.elderly_pop: Classification of the population segment as either 'Elderly' or 'Future Elderly', indicating which demographic group the statistics apply to for that survey year.

sex.sex: Gender breakdown of the population data, showing statistics for Male, Female, or All genders combined within the specified population segment and survey year.

age.age: Age group ranges (e.g., '65-69', '85 & Above') that categorize the population data, providing demographic segmentation within gender and population segment for each survey year.

percentage.percentage: The measured population percentage representing the proportion of people in the specified age group, gender, and population segment relative to the total for that survey year.
