uen.uen: The Unique Entity Number serving as the primary identifier for each business entity in Singapore, uniquely distinguishing one organization from another.

entity_name.entity_name: The legal registered name of the business entity, representing the official designation under which the organization operates.

entity_type_description.entity_type_description: Describes the type of legal entity such as 'Business' or 'Local Company', categorizing the organizational structure of this business.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: Specifies the legal constitution or ownership structure of the entity, such as Sole Proprietor or Partnership, defining its governance framework.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: Indicates the current operational status of the entity, such as 'Live Company', 'Struck Off', or 'Cancelled', showing its active or inactive state.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date when the business entity was originally registered or incorporated, marking the establishment of this organization.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The date when the Unique Entity Number was issued to this business, which may differ from the original registration date.

address_type.address_type: Specifies the type of address recorded, such as 'LOCAL' for Singapore addresses, categorizing the location information for this entity.

block.block: The block number component of the business address, providing part of the physical location details for this entity.

street_name.street_name: The street name where the business is located, completing the address information for identifying the entity's premises.

level_no.level_no: The floor or level number in a building where the business is situated, providing additional address specificity for this entity.

unit_no.unit_no: The unit or office number within a building level, giving precise location details for the business premises.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building where the business is located, if applicable, providing recognizable location reference for this entity.

postal_code.postal_code: The postal code for the business address, enabling mail delivery and geographical identification of this entity's location.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: The number of charges or liens registered against the business entity, indicating financial obligations or encumbrances.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Singapore Standard Industrial Classification code representing the main business activity of this entity.

primary_ssic_description.primary_ssic_description: The descriptive text corresponding to the primary SSIC code, explaining the main business activity of this entity.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: An additional SSIC code for secondary business activities conducted by this entity, if applicable.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: The descriptive text for the secondary SSIC code, detailing additional business activities of this entity.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The number of officers, directors, or partners associated with the business entity, indicating its management structure size.

year.year: The calendar year when the funding amount was recorded or allocated, providing temporal context for when each funding type received its allocation.

fundingtype.fundingtype: The category or type of cultural funding being tracked, representing different areas of cultural investment such as Arts & Heritage, Library services, and Cultural Matching Fund programs.

amount.amount: The monetary value of funding allocated to each funding type in a specific year, measured in millions (based on the decimal values shown in the data).

year.year: The calendar year when the import price index measurement was recorded, serving as the temporal reference point for tracking economic trends over time.

level_1.level_1: The specific category or type of import price index being measured, classifying the economic indicator into different segments such as overall import prices or non-oil specific imports.

value.value: The numerical index value representing the price level measurement for the specified year and index type, typically expressed as a percentage relative to a base period.

quarter.quarter: The specific calendar quarter and year for which the economic data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each observation.

level_1.level_1: The name of the economic indicator or series being measured, describing what type of data is represented in the value column for each quarter.

value.value: The numerical measurement of the economic indicator for the corresponding quarter, representing the quantitative value of the series at that point in time.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year to which the statistical data applies, providing temporal context for each ministry's reported figures.

actual_revised_estimated.actual_revised_estimated: Classification indicating whether the reported figures are actual, revised, or estimated values for each ministry's statistics.

ministry.ministry: The government ministry or department being reported on, serving as the primary entity for which statistical data is collected and organized.

count.count: A quantitative measurement representing some countable metric (likely personnel, budget items, or similar statistics) for each ministry during the specified financial year.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year for which business statistics are recorded, serving as the temporal dimension for tracking business entity counts over time.

entity_type.entity_type: The classification of business entities (e.g., Corporate, Sole-Proprietorship, Partnership), categorizing the organizational structure of businesses counted in each year.

no_of_businesses.no_of_businesses: The count or number of businesses recorded for a specific financial year and entity type, representing the quantitative measure of business presence.

year.year: The calendar year when the retrenchment incidence was measured, providing temporal context for tracking employment trends over time.

industry1.industry1: The economic sector or industry classification for which retrenchment data is reported, categorizing the workforce statistics by business domain.

incidence_of_retrenchment.incidence_of_retrenchment: The measured rate or percentage of workforce retrenchment occurrences within a specific industry and year, representing the core employment stability metric being tracked.

month.month: The time period (year-month) when the industrial output measurement was recorded, serving as the primary temporal reference for this time-series data.

level_1.level_1: The highest-level aggregation category, consistently showing 'Total' values indicating these are aggregated industrial measurements rather than individual company data.

level_2.level_2: Major industrial cluster or sector classification representing broad manufacturing categories such as Precision Engineering, Chemicals, or Biomedical Manufacturing.

level_3.level_3: Specific sub-sector or product category within each industrial cluster, providing detailed classification of the measured industrial output.

value.value: The measured industrial output metric (likely production value, sales, or similar economic indicator) for the specified month and industrial classification combination.

year.year: The calendar year for which the population or statistical count is reported, serving as the primary temporal dimension for this dataset.

residential_status.residential_status: A categorical classification indicating whether the counted individuals are 'local' residents or 'foreigners', breaking down the annual figures by residential category.

number.number: The count or quantity of individuals corresponding to the specified year and residential status, representing the measured value for that demographic segment.

year.year: The calendar year when the financial measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for when this industry segment data was collected.

level_1.level_1: The type of financial metric being measured (Operating Surplus, Operating Receipts, or Operating Expenditure) for this transport and storage industry segment.

level_2.level_2: A specific industry segment within Singapore's SSIC 49-53 Transport & Storage Services sector, identifying the particular sub-industry being measured.

value.value: The numerical amount of the financial metric for this industry segment in the specified year, representing the monetary value in appropriate units.

licensee_name.licensee_name: The name of the individual or company that holds the license, identifying the responsible party for the licensed premises.

licence_number.licence_number: The unique identifier for the license, serving as the primary key to track each licensed food establishment or premises.

premises_address.premises_address: The physical address of the establishment where the license is valid, specifying the location of the licensed operations.

grade.grade: The hygiene or quality rating (e.g., A, B) awarded to the premises, categorizing its compliance with regulatory standards.

year.year: The calendar year for which the financial data is reported, providing the temporal context for the metric associated with the health service sector.

level_1.level_1: The category of financial performance metric (e.g., Operating Receipts, Value Added) being measured for the specified health service sector.

level_2.level_2: The specific health service sector or sub-sector as defined by the Singapore Standard Industrial Classification (SSIC), serving as the primary subject for the financial data.

value.value: The numerical figure representing the amount of the financial metric for the corresponding health service sector, year, and metric type.

company_name.company_name: The name of the company or organization holding the poison license, serving as the primary entity for this licensing record.

licensee_name.licensee_name: The name of the individual person authorized under the company's license, representing the designated licensee responsible for compliance.

license_effective_date.license_effective_date: The date when the poison license becomes valid for the company, indicating the start of the licensing period.

license_expiry_date.license_expiry_date: The date when the poison license expires for the company, indicating the end of the licensing validity period.

license_type.license_type: The classification code for the type of poison license granted to the company (e.g., PO_FA), categorizing the license authority level.

category_of_poisons.category_of_poisons: The classification of poison categories that the company is licensed to handle, specifying the scope of authorized substances.

specific_details.specific_details: Additional restrictions, conditions, or special provisions applicable to the company's license, such as controlled drug exclusions or inclusions.

quarter.quarter: The time period for the job vacancy measurement, formatted as year-quarter (e.g., 2000-Q1), serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing this time-series data.

industry1.industry1: The broad industry sector classification for the job vacancies, representing the primary economic sector where vacancies exist (e.g., services, manufacturing, total).

industry2.industry2: A more specific industry classification within the broader industry1 category, providing detailed sector information (e.g., financial services, administrative and support services).

occupation1.occupation1: The occupational classification of the job vacancies, describing the type of work or job roles being measured (e.g., professional roles, clerical workers, production operators).

job_vacancy.job_vacancy: The count of available job positions measured for the specified quarter, industry, and occupation combination, representing the quantitative core metric of this dataset.

year.year: The calendar year when the demographic measurement was recorded, indicating the temporal context for each population count.

level_1.level_1: The demographic category being measured, specifying the ethnicity and gender group (e.g., Chinese Brides, Indian Grooms, Total Brides). This is the primary entity that identifies what population segment the data represents.

value.value: The numerical count of individuals in the specified demographic category for the given year, representing the population size measurement.

year.year: The calendar year when the marriage statistics were recorded, serving as the temporal context for all measurements in this dataset.

level_1.level_1: The education level category for brides (or 'Total' for aggregated counts), representing one dimension of the marriage pairing being measured.

level_2.level_2: The education level category for grooms, representing the second dimension of the marriage pairing being measured alongside the bride's education level.

value.value: The count of marriages recorded for the specific year and education level combination of brides and grooms, representing the quantitative measurement in this statistical dataset.

year.year: The year for which the median income statistics are reported, serving as the primary temporal context for the data series.

sex.sex: The gender classification (male or female) for the reported income statistics, segmenting the annual data into demographic categories.

med_income_incl_empcpf.med_income_incl_empcpf: The median income figure that includes employer CPF contributions, representing the central tendency of earnings for a specific year and sex group.

med_income_excl_empcpf.med_income_excl_empcpf: The median income figure that excludes employer CPF contributions, showing the central tendency of take-home earnings for a specific year and sex group.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year for which the property tax statistics are reported, serving as the primary temporal dimension for tracking HDB property tax data over time.

type_of_hdb.type_of_hdb: The classification of Housing & Development Board flat types in Singapore, categorizing properties by size and configuration (e.g., 1 or 2 Room, 3 Room, 4 Room, 5 Room, Executive & Others).

no_of_cases.no_of_cases: The number of property tax cases or properties recorded for each HDB type in the given financial year, representing the volume of taxable properties in that category.

median_annual_value.median_annual_value: The median annual property value for each HDB type in the specified financial year, indicating the typical valuation of such properties for tax assessment purposes.

property_tax_collection.property_tax_collection: The total amount of property tax collected for each HDB type in the given financial year, representing the revenue generated from that property category.

personalincome.personalincome: The personal income bracket of survey respondents, showing their reported income ranges or 'Prefer not to answer'/'No personal income' responses. This is a socioeconomic attribute associated with each age group.

ban_age.ban_age: The age group of survey respondents, representing demographic segmentation by age ranges (e.g., 25-34 yo, 35-44 yo). This is the primary demographic characteristic for analyzing other attributes.

socialnetwork_dp03.socialnetwork_dp03: Indicates whether respondents use social networks (Yes/No responses), representing digital engagement behavior. This is a behavioral attribute associated with respondents in each age group.

respondent_serial.respondent_serial: A unique identifier for each survey participant, serving as the primary key for tracking individual respondents in the research dataset.

q20_q212.q20_q212: A response to a specific survey question (likely question 20 or 212), representing categorical data about the respondent's characteristics or behaviors.

gender.gender: The gender of the survey respondent, representing a demographic attribute of the participant (Male or Female).

socialnetwork_dp10.socialnetwork_dp10: A response indicating whether the respondent uses or participates in a specific social network (DP10), showing categorical yes/no data about their social media behavior.

socialnetwork_dp07.socialnetwork_dp07: A response indicating whether the respondent uses or participates in another specific social network (DP07), representing additional categorical yes/no data about their social media engagement.

respondent_serial.respondent_serial: A unique numeric identifier for each survey participant, serving as the primary key to distinguish individual respondents in the dataset.

q20_q212.q20_q212: The respondent's answer to survey question Q20/Q212, representing a categorical response (Yes/No/blank) to a specific research query.

gender.gender: The gender of the survey respondent, providing demographic classification (Male/Female) for analysis of response patterns.

socialnetwork_dp10.socialnetwork_dp10: The respondent's answer regarding social network usage or behavior (question DP10), indicating whether they engage in a specific social network activity (Yes/No).

socialnetwork_dp07.socialnetwork_dp07: Another social network-related response (question DP07), capturing different aspects of the respondent's social media behavior or attitudes (Yes/No).

cardholders.cardholders: The main subject column identifying different categories of transportation users eligible for concessionary fares, including students, seniors, and other special groups.

bus_price.bus_price: The monthly fare price for bus-only travel for each cardholder category, representing the cost of unlimited bus rides within the billing period.

train_price.train_price: The monthly fare price for train-only travel for each cardholder category, representing the cost of unlimited train/MRT rides within the billing period.

hybrid_price.hybrid_price: The monthly fare price for combined bus and train travel for each cardholder category, representing the cost of unlimited multimodal transportation access.

yr.yr: The calendar year for which the net balance amount is aggregated, providing the temporal context for the financial data.

age_grp.age_grp: The age group category (e.g., '>20 - 25', 'Above 60') associated with the net balance amount, classifying the data by demographic age range.

gender.gender: The gender category ('Male', 'Female', 'Unspecified') associated with the net balance amount, classifying the data by demographic gender.

net_bal_amt.net_bal_amt: The aggregated net balance amount (likely a monetary value) for the specific combination of year, age group, and gender, serving as the core quantitative measure in the dataset.

year.year: The calendar year for which the service count is reported, providing the temporal context for this data record.

type.type: The category of palliative care service (e.g., Home Palliative Care, Palliative Nursing), serving as the primary subject being measured in this dataset.

count.count: The numerical figure representing the volume or frequency of the specified palliative care service type for the corresponding year.

identifier_uuid.identifier_uuid: A unique universal identifier (UUID) for each digital item record, serving as the primary key to distinguish individual entries in the catalog.

title.title: The descriptive name or title of the digital item, providing the primary human-readable label for the photographed scene or subject.

digital_publisher.digital_publisher: The organization responsible for publishing or contributing the digital version of the item, such as the National Library Board Singapore or National Archives of Singapore.

date_created.date_created: The date when the original item (e.g., photograph) was created or taken, indicating the temporal context of the subject matter.

description.description: A textual summary or detailed explanation of the item's content, often including historical context, physical features, or collection notes.

subject_lcsh.subject_lcsh: Subject classifications using the Library of Congress Subject Headings (LCSH) vocabulary, providing standardized topical terms for the item's content.

subject_singheritage.subject_singheritage: Subject classifications using a Singapore heritage taxonomy, offering localized categorical terms relevant to Singapore's history and culture.

ispartof_collection.ispartof_collection: The hierarchical path(s) within the library's digital collections where this item is categorized, showing its membership in specific donor collections, themes, or series.

nlb_type.nlb_type: The format or type of the resource, such as 'Photograph', classifying the nature of the digital item.

rights.rights: The copyright statement and ownership details for the item, specifying the rights holder and any associated licensing information.

access_rights.access_rights: The terms governing the use of the item, typically outlining permissions and restrictions for research, study, and reproduction.

yr.yr: The calendar year for which the member count data is recorded, providing the temporal context for the housing scheme statistics.

housing_schm_type.housing_schm_type: The category or type of housing scheme, such as Public Housing or Residential Properties, which serves as the primary subject for the member count statistics.

no_of_mbrs.no_of_mbrs: The number of members (likely households or individuals) counted for a specific housing scheme type in a given year, representing the quantitative measure for this record.

month.month: The year and month period for the vehicle count data, providing the temporal context for when the recorded number of vehicles was tallied.

make.make: The manufacturer or brand name of the vehicles being counted, categorizing the count by the company that produced the vehicles.

fuel_type.fuel_type: The primary fuel type used by the vehicles in the count (e.g., Petrol, Others), classifying the vehicles based on their energy source.

vehicle_type.vehicle_type: The body style or category of the vehicles counted (e.g., Sedan, SUV), grouping the vehicles by their design and intended use.

number.number: The count or quantity of vehicles recorded for the specific combination of month, make, fuel type, and vehicle type, representing the core measurement in this dataset.

year.year: The academic or calendar year for which the student participation data is recorded, providing the temporal context for each art form's enrollment count.

artform.artform: The category or discipline of the arts (e.g., Music, Theatre, Visual Arts), serving as the primary subject for tracking student enrollment across different years.

students.students: The total number of students enrolled or participating in the specified art form during the given year, representing a quantitative measure of engagement.

newspaper_title.newspaper_title: The name of the newspaper or periodical in which the article was published, identifying the source publication for this article.

issue_id.issue_id: A unique identifier for the specific newspaper issue (edition) containing this article, grouping it with other content from the same publication date.

issue_date.issue_date: The publication date of the newspaper issue containing this article, providing the temporal context for when the article was released.

edition.edition: The edition number of the newspaper issue (e.g., first edition), offering further specification for the issue containing this article.

page_id.page_id: A unique identifier for the specific page on which this article appears, locating the article within the physical/digital layout of the issue.

page_number.page_number: The sequential page number within the newspaper issue where this article is located, indicating its positional context.

article_id.article_id: The unique identifier for this specific newspaper article, serving as the primary key for the individual content piece.

article_title.article_title: The headline or title of the article, describing the main topic or subject of this piece of content.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: An excerpt comprising the first 50 words of the article's main text, providing a sample of the article's content and subject matter.

yr.yr: The calendar year for which the member data is aggregated, providing temporal context for all other dimensions and measurements in the record.

regrossed_bal_grp.regrossed_bal_grp: Categorical grouping of members based on their regrossed balance ranges, representing financial segmentation of the active member population for the given year.

age_grp.age_grp: Categorical grouping of members based on their age ranges, representing demographic segmentation of the active member population for the given year.

no_of_active_mbrs.no_of_active_mbrs: The count of active members falling within the specific combination of year, balance group, and age group, representing the quantitative measurement for each aggregated segment.

year.year: The calendar year for which the institution count is reported, providing the temporal context for the data point.

type_of_institution.type_of_institution: The category or classification of the educational institution (e.g., Full-Time Islamic Religious School, Special Education School), serving as the primary entity being described and counted.

number_of_institution.number_of_institution: The count or total number of institutions belonging to the specified type that existed in the reported year, representing a quantitative measurement of the main subject.

year.year: The calendar year when the population growth measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for the demographic data.

level_1.level_1: The category of population growth being measured, distinguishing between resident population growth and total population growth as the primary subject of each data point.

value.value: The percentage growth rate for the specified population category in the given year, representing the quantitative measurement of demographic change.

year.year: The calendar year when the patent filing data was recorded, providing temporal context for the country's patent activity.

applicant_country.applicant_country: The country or territory that filed the patent applications, serving as the primary entity being analyzed in this dataset.

patent_filings.patent_filings: The number of patent applications filed by the country in the specified year, measuring the country's patent output volume.

rank.rank: The country's relative position in patent filing volume compared to other countries in the same year, indicating its standing in global patent activity.

year.year: The calendar year for which the PSLE English performance data is reported, providing the temporal context for each racial group's results.

race.race: The racial or ethnic group category (e.g., Chinese, Malay, Indian, Others) or the 'Overall' aggregate, serving as the primary subject for performance analysis.

percentage_psle_eng.percentage_psle_eng: The percentage of students within the specified racial group who met a certain achievement standard in the Primary School Leaving Examination (PSLE) English paper for the given year, measuring group performance.

year.year: The specific calendar year for which the Mother Tongue Language (MTL) pass rate data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal context for each observation.

race.race: The ethnic classification (e.g., Chinese, Indian, Others, Overall) for the student group whose pass rate is being reported for a given year.

percentage_pass_mtl.percentage_pass_mtl: The percentage of students within the specified race and year who passed the Mother Tongue Language (MTL) examination, representing the measured performance outcome.

quarter.quarter: The year and quarter period for which sales data is recorded, serving as the temporal context for all measurements in the table.

type_of_sale.type_of_sale: The classification of sales transactions into categories such as New Sale, Sub Sale, or Resale, indicating the nature of the sales activity for each quarter.

units.units: The count of units sold during the specified quarter and sale type, representing the quantitative sales volume measurement.

half_year.half_year: The half-year period when the facility count was recorded, using the format YYYY-H1 (first half) or YYYY-H2 (second half), providing temporal context for each measurement.

type.type: The category or classification of postal service facilities or points being tracked, representing the main entity type in this dataset (e.g., Self automated machines, Post offices, Stamp vendors).

number.number: The count or quantity of facilities of the specified type that existed during the given half-year period, representing the measurement value for each entity-time combination.

year.year: The calendar year when the sick leave statistics were recorded, serving as the temporal dimension for organizing the proportion data across different time periods.

sick_leave.sick_leave: The classification of sick leave type, either hospitalisation leave or outpatient sick leave, indicating which category the proportion measurement applies to for each year.

proportion.proportion: The percentage or proportion value representing the measurement of sick leave usage for each specific type in each corresponding year, quantifying the relationship between time and sick leave category.

date.date: The specific calendar date on which a public holiday occurs, serving as the primary identifier for each holiday record.

day.day: The day of the week (e.g., Monday, Friday) for the corresponding holiday date, providing contextual temporal classification for the event.

holiday.holiday: The name or description of the public holiday observed on the given date, specifying the reason for the observance.

year.year: The calendar year when the data was collected, providing temporal context for the flexible work arrangement statistics across industries.

industry1.industry1: The classification of economic sectors or industries being analyzed, serving as the primary subject for comparing flexible work arrangement adoption.

at_least_one.at_least_one: The percentage of workplaces within the industry that offer at least one type of flexible work arrangement, measuring overall adoption of flexible work practices.

part-time.part-time: The percentage of workplaces in the industry offering part-time work options, representing one specific type of flexible work arrangement available.

flexitime.flexitime: The percentage of workplaces in the industry providing flexitime arrangements, indicating availability of flexible start and end times for employees.

staggered_hours.staggered_hours: The percentage of workplaces in the industry implementing staggered working hours, showing adoption of varied shift start times to manage workforce distribution.

tele-working.tele-working: The percentage of workplaces in the industry supporting tele-working arrangements, measuring remote work adoption within the sector.

homeworking.homeworking: The percentage of workplaces in the industry allowing homeworking specifically, representing work-from-home arrangements as a subset of remote work options.

job-sharing.job-sharing: The percentage of workplaces in the industry offering job-sharing opportunities, indicating availability of shared position arrangements within the sector.

compressed_work_week.compressed_work_week: The percentage of workplaces in the industry implementing compressed work weeks, showing adoption of longer daily hours in exchange for fewer work days.

year.year: The calendar year for which the reentry rate data point is recorded, providing the temporal context for the measurement associated with an education level.

education1.education1: The highest education level category of the population group being measured. This is the primary categorical subject for which reentry rates are tracked.

reentry_rate.reentry_rate: The measured rate of reentry (likely expressed as a percentage) for individuals of the specified education level in the given year, representing the core quantitative metric.

year.year: The year when the course was offered or relevant, providing temporal context for when these educational programs were available.

course-code.course-code: A unique alphanumeric identifier for each educational course, serving as the primary key to distinguish individual training programs.

course-title.course-title: The descriptive name of the educational course, specifying the subject matter and focus area of the training program.

year.year: The calendar year when the labor force data was recorded, providing temporal context for the educational attainment statistics.

sex.sex: The gender category (male/female) for which the educational attainment and labor force data is segmented, representing demographic breakdown of the statistics.

highest_qualification.highest_qualification: The highest educational attainment level achieved, serving as the primary categorization for analyzing labor force participation patterns across different education levels.

labour_force.labour_force: The number of individuals in the labor force for the given year, sex, and educational qualification, representing the quantitative measurement of workforce participation.

year.year: The calendar year when the water sales measurement was recorded, serving as the temporal reference point for all data in this table.

category.category: The classification of water usage as either Domestic (household/residential) or Non-domestic (commercial/industrial), segmenting sales data within each year.

sales_of_potable_water.sales_of_potable_water: The volume of potable (drinkable) water sold in million cubic meters, representing the consumption measurement for a specific year and usage category.

year.year: The calendar year when the population measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for when this demographic data was collected.

level_1.level_1: The demographic and education category being measured, identifying specific population groups segmented by gender and educational attainment level.

value.value: The numerical measurement representing the population count or statistic for the specified demographic and education group in the given year.

year.year: The calendar year for which the employment or labor statistics are reported, serving as the primary temporal dimension of the dataset.

industry1.industry1: The industry sector (e.g., construction, services, manufacturing) to which the statistics apply, categorizing the data within each year.

total.total: The total number of cases or workers recorded for the specified year and industry, representing the overall count for the period.

short_work_week.short_work_week: The number of cases or workers associated with a reduced work week within the total for the given year and industry.

temporary_layoff.temporary_layoff: The number of cases or workers associated with temporary layoffs within the total for the given year and industry.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year when the tax enforcement cases occurred, providing temporal context for when these compliance activities took place relative to the tax type.

tax_type.tax_type: The category or classification of tax being enforced, serving as the primary subject that distinguishes between different tax regimes like income tax, GST, etc.

no_of_cases.no_of_cases: The number of tax enforcement or compliance cases identified for a specific tax type in a given financial year, measuring the volume of enforcement activity.

tax_and_penalty_arising.tax_and_penalty_arising: The total monetary amount collected from tax and penalties for enforcement cases of a specific tax type in a given financial year, representing the financial impact of compliance activities.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year for which the stamp duty data is summarized, serving as the primary temporal dimension for aggregating instrument counts and duty assessments.

instrument_type.instrument_type: The category of legal or financial document (e.g., Sale & Purchase Agreement, Mortgage) that incurred stamp duty, classifying the aggregated records within each financial year.

no_of_instrument.no_of_instrument: The total count of instruments of the specified type that were assessed for stamp duty within the given financial year, measuring transaction volume.

stamp_duty_assessed.stamp_duty_assessed: The total monetary value of stamp duty levied on all instruments of the specified type within the given financial year, representing the government revenue generated.

month.month: The month and year when the resale transaction was registered, indicating the timing of this property sale.

town.town: The town or planning area where the HDB flat is located, categorizing the property's broader geographical region.

flat_type.flat_type: The size category of the HDB flat (e.g., 2 ROOM, 4 ROOM, 5 ROOM), classifying the property type being transacted.

block.block: The specific building block number where the flat is situated, serving as a key identifier for the property location.

street_name.street_name: The street where the HDB block is located, providing the specific address component of the property.

storey_range.storey_range: The floor level range where the flat is situated within the block, indicating the vertical position of the property.

floor_area_sqm.floor_area_sqm: The internal floor area of the flat in square meters, measuring the size of the living space being transacted.

flat_model.flat_model: The design model or type of the HDB flat (e.g., Model A, Premium Apartment), categorizing the property's architectural style.

lease_commence_date.lease_commence_date: The year when the 99-year lease for the flat commenced, indicating the start of the property's leasehold tenure.

remaining_lease.remaining_lease: The remaining duration of the 99-year lease at the time of resale, measuring the property's remaining leasehold period.

resale_price.resale_price: The transaction price at which the HDB flat was resold, representing the monetary value of the property sale.

ban_age.ban_age: The age group of the survey respondent, representing demographic information about the individual's life stage.

age.age: The age of the patient associated with the case, describing a demographic characteristic.

gender.gender: The gender of the patient (e.g., M, F), describing a demographic characteristic of the case.

nationality.nationality: The nationality of the patient (e.g., Singapore, Chinese), categorizing the case by citizenship.

imported_local.imported_local: Classification indicating whether the case was imported from abroad or resulted from local transmission.

place.place: The location identified as the likely place where the infection was acquired (e.g., Wuhan, Singapore).

public_healthcare_institution.public_healthcare_institution: The name of the public healthcare institution where the patient is/was treated for this case.

status.status: The current hospitalization status of the case, such as 'Hospitalised' or 'Discharged'.

date_of_confirmation.date_of_confirmation: The date when the COVID-19 infection for this case was officially confirmed.

date_of_discharge.date_of_discharge: The date when the patient was discharged from the healthcare institution, if applicable.

places_visited.places_visited: A list of locations the patient visited, potentially relevant for contact tracing efforts related to the case.

residing_location.residing_location: The general area or specific address where the patient resides.

residing_postal_code.residing_postal_code: The postal code corresponding to the patient's residence.

reference_url.reference_url: The URL linking to the official Ministry of Health news release that announced this specific case.

calendar_year.calendar_year: The year when the charitable giving data was recorded, providing temporal context for when these donor-donee relationship statistics were measured.

donor-donee_relationship.donor-donee_relationship: The type of relationship between donors and recipients, categorizing connections as immediate family, extended family, or others, serving as the primary classification for analyzing charitable giving patterns.

number_of_donees.number_of_donees: The count of recipients (donees) for each relationship type in a given year, measuring the volume of charitable giving categorized by donor-recipient connections.

quarter.quarter: The calendar quarter (year and quarter) when the subscription data was recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for organizing this time-series telecommunications data.

type_of_fixed_lines.type_of_fixed_lines: The classification of telephone line type (Corporate or Residential), categorizing the subscription data by service category for each quarterly measurement.

number_of_subscriptions.number_of_subscriptions: The count of active subscriptions for the specified line type during the given quarter, representing the quantitative measurement of service adoption.

fare_type.fare_type: The passenger category or fare class that determines the pricing tier, such as Adult, Senior citizen, or concession cards. This is the primary classification for the fare structure.

applicable_time.applicable_time: The time period and conditions when this fare applies, specifying operational hours and day types for the pricing rule.

distance.distance: The travel distance range in kilometers that determines which fare applies, representing the journey length bracket for pricing.

fare_per_ride.fare_per_ride: The actual fare amount in cents or local currency units charged for a single ride under these specific conditions.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: The identifier for the government agency (e.g., ACRA) that issued the Unique Entity Number, indicating the registering authority for this business entity.

uen.uen: The Unique Entity Number that serves as the primary identifier for a registered business entity in Singapore, uniquely distinguishing it from all other entities.

entity_name.entity_name: The official legal name of the business entity as registered, representing how the entity is formally known and operates.

entity_type_description.entity_type_description: A classification describing the legal form of the entity, such as 'Business' or 'Local Company', which defines its regulatory structure.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: Describes the legal business structure or constitution, such as 'Sole Proprietor' or 'Partnership', outlining the ownership framework of the entity.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: Indicates the current operational and legal status of the entity, such as 'Live Company', 'Cancelled', or 'Struck Off', showing its active or inactive state.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date when the business entity was first formally registered or incorporated, marking the official start of its legal existence.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The specific date when the Unique Entity Number was issued to this business entity, which may differ from its registration date.

address_type.address_type: Specifies the type of address recorded for the entity, such as 'LOCAL' for a Singapore address, categorizing the address nature.

block.block: The block number component of the entity's registered physical address, part of the location identifier for the business premises.

street_name.street_name: The street name component of the entity's registered physical address, specifying the road where the business is located.

level_no.level_no: The floor or level number within a building where the entity's premises are situated, providing vertical location details.

unit_no.unit_no: The unit or office number within a level or building, providing the specific suite or space identifier for the entity's location.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building where the entity's premises are located, if applicable, offering a recognizable landmark identifier.

postal_code.postal_code: The Singapore postal code for the entity's registered address, enabling precise geographical identification and mail delivery.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: The number of charges (typically financial or legal encumbrances) registered against the business entity, indicating potential liabilities.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Singapore Standard Industrial Classification code assigned to the entity, numerically categorizing its main business activity.

primary_ssic_description.primary_ssic_description: The textual description corresponding to the primary SSIC code, detailing the entity's principal line of business or industry.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: An optional secondary SSIC code for the entity, numerically categorizing an additional or subsidiary business activity.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: The textual description corresponding to the secondary SSIC code, detailing the entity's additional line of business.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The count of officers (such as directors, partners, or secretaries) formally associated with the business entity, indicating governance size.

month.month: The specific year and month for which the measurement is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data point.

level_1.level_1: A categorical classification indicating the type or category of measurement being reported for each month, such as 'Total' for aggregate values.

value.value: The quantitative measurement or metric value associated with the specified month and category, representing the actual data point being tracked.

year.year: The calendar year when the expenditure data was recorded, providing temporal context for when the financial measurements apply to each institution type.

type_of_educational_institutions.type_of_educational_institutions: The category or level of educational institution being described, serving as the primary entity for tracking expenditure across different education sectors.

recurrent_expenditure.recurrent_expenditure: The operational or ongoing spending amount for the specified institution type in the given year, representing the financial resources allocated to educational operations.

year.year: The calendar year for which job retention metrics are reported, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data record.

3_month_job_retention.3_month_job_retention: The percentage of individuals who retained their jobs for at least three months during the reported year, representing a short-term employment stability metric for that period.

6_month_job_retention.6_month_job_retention: The percentage of individuals who retained their jobs for at least six months during the reported year, representing a medium-term employment stability metric for that period.

A unique identifier for each tender notice or contract, serving as the primary key for this procurement record.

tender_description.tender_description: A detailed description of the goods, services, or works required for the tender, defining the scope of the contract.

agency.agency: The name of the government or public sector agency that issued and is managing the tender.

award_date.award_date: The date on which the tender was officially awarded to the successful supplier, marking the contract's commencement.

tender_detail_status.tender_detail_status: The final status of the tender process, categorizing how the award was made (e.g., to a supplier or by line items).

supplier_name.supplier_name: The name of the company or entity that was awarded the contract as the successful bidder.

awarded_amt.awarded_amt: The monetary value of the contract awarded to the supplier, representing the agreed-upon price for the tender.

quarter.quarter: The calendar quarter and year for the recorded data, serving as the temporal context for the allocation and return figures of each industrial park or land segment.

product_segment.product_segment: The name of the specific industrial park, specialized zone, or land type (e.g., Logistics Park, Wafer Fab Park), identifying the primary entity being tracked for allocation and return activities.

gross_allocation.gross_allocation: The total amount of land or space allocated to the specified product segment during the quarter, representing the initial or gross provision of resources.

returns.returns: The amount of land or space returned from or deallocated for the specified product segment during the quarter, indicating a reduction or give-back of previously allocated resources.

year.year: The calendar year when the healthcare facility rate measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for when the data was collected for each facility type.

facility_type_a.facility_type_a: The classification of healthcare facilities (such as Community Hospitals, Psychiatric Hospitals, or Acute care facilities), serving as the primary entity for which rates are measured across different years and demographic groups.

sex.sex: The gender category (Male or Female) for which the facility rate is reported, representing the demographic breakdown of the measurements for each facility type.

rate.rate: The numerical measurement or metric value associated with each facility type, year, and gender combination, quantifying some aspect of healthcare facility performance or utilization.

year.year: The calendar year when the healthcare facility usage rate was measured, providing temporal context for the data point.

facility_type_a.facility_type_a: The type of healthcare facility (such as Acute, Community Hospitals, or Psychiatric Hospitals) for which the usage rate is reported, categorizing the service setting.

sex.sex: The gender classification (Male or Female) of the population group for which the healthcare facility usage rate is calculated, representing a demographic dimension.

age.age: The age group category (such as '0-14 Years', '15-64 years', or '65 years & over') for which the healthcare facility usage rate applies, defining the population cohort.

rate.rate: The measured healthcare facility usage rate per population, representing the core quantitative metric that varies by year, facility type, sex, and age group.

year.year: The calendar year when the facility statistics were recorded, providing temporal context for tracking healthcare infrastructure changes over time.

institution_type.institution_type: The broad category of healthcare institution (e.g., Hospital, Residential Long-Term), classifying the organizational level of the facilities being counted.

facility_type_a.facility_type_a: The specific type of healthcare facility (e.g., Psychiatric Hospitals, Acute, Community Hospitals), representing the main subject being tracked and counted in this dataset.

public_private.public_private: The ownership and operational model classification (Public, Private, Not-for-Profit), indicating the funding and management structure of the facilities.

no_of_facilities.no_of_facilities: The count of healthcare facilities matching the specified characteristics (type, ownership, year), measuring the quantity of operational facilities.

no_beds.no_beds: The total number of available patient beds across all facilities matching the specified characteristics, representing the capacity of the healthcare infrastructure.

centre_code.centre_code: A unique alphanumeric identifier for each childcare or preschool center, serving as the primary key for tracking individual educational institutions.

centre_name.centre_name: The official name of the childcare or preschool center, representing the specific educational institution's identity.

license_issue_date.license_issue_date: The date when the center's operating license was issued by regulatory authorities, indicating when the center became officially authorized to operate.

license_tenure.license_tenure: The duration in months for which the center's operating license is valid, representing the length of time the center is authorized to operate before license renewal is required.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year period for which the application and grant data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data record.

applications_approved.applications_approved: The total number of applications that were approved during the specified financial year, representing the volume of successful applications for that period.

grants_disbursed.grants_disbursed: The total monetary value of grants disbursed during the specified financial year, indicating the financial support provided in that period.

quarter.quarter: The year and quarter (e.g., 2007-Q1) to which the job vacancy data pertains, providing the temporal context for this labor market statistic.

industry1.industry1: The broad industry sector (e.g., services, manufacturing, construction) associated with the job vacancies, categorizing the economic activity at the highest level.

industry2.industry2: A more specific industry classification nested within the broad industry1 sector, providing additional detail about the type of business or service.

industry3.industry3: The most granular industry classification, further specifying the industry segment within the industry2 category, offering precise economic activity context.

occupation1.occupation1: The major occupational group (e.g., professional/managers, production/transport operators) for the job vacancies, classifying the type of work or role being offered.

job_vacancy.job_vacancy: The count of unfilled job positions, representing the core quantitative measure of labor demand for the specified quarter, industry, and occupation.

quarter.quarter: The year and quarter when the survey data was collected, representing the time period for which the export limitation factors were measured.

level_1.level_1: The specific factor or category that limits export orders in manufacturing, serving as the primary classification for analyzing export constraints.

value.value: The numerical measurement (likely count or percentage) indicating the prevalence or impact of each limiting factor during the specified quarter.

school_name.school_name: The official name of the educational institution, serving as the primary identifier for each school in the dataset.

url_address.url_address: The website URL for the school, providing online access to information about the institution.

address.address: The physical street address where the school is located, describing its geographical placement.

postal_code.postal_code: The postal code corresponding to the school's address, used for mail delivery and location identification.

telephone_no.telephone_no: The primary contact telephone number for the school, used for communication with the institution.

fax_no.fax_no: The fax machine number for the school, providing an alternative communication method.

email_address.email_address: The official email address for the school, enabling electronic correspondence with the institution.

mrt_desc.mrt_desc: Description of nearby MRT (Mass Rapid Transit) or LRT (Light Rail Transit) stations, indicating public transportation access to the school.

bus_desc.bus_desc: Description of bus services available near the school, detailing public bus transportation options for students and staff.

principal_name.principal_name: The name of the school's principal, identifying the head administrator responsible for the institution.

first_vp_name.first_vp_name: The name of the school's first vice-principal, identifying a key administrative leader supporting the principal.

second_vp_name.second_vp_name: The name of the school's second vice-principal, identifying another administrative leader in the school hierarchy.

dgp_code.dgp_code: The district or geographic planning area code where the school is located, categorizing the school by regional division.

zone_code.zone_code: The geographic zone classification (NORTH, SOUTH, EAST, WEST) for the school's location within the country.

type_code.type_code: The type of school funding and administration, such as 'GOVERNMENT SCHOOL' or 'GOVERNMENT-AIDED SCH'.

nature_code.nature_code: The gender composition of the school, indicating whether it is co-educational or single-gender (e.g., 'CO-ED SCHOOL', 'GIRLS' SCHOOL').

session_code.session_code: The session structure of the school, indicating whether it operates on a single or multiple session schedule.

mainlevel_code.mainlevel_code: The primary education level offered by the school, categorizing it as either 'PRIMARY' or 'SECONDARY' institution.

sap_ind.sap_ind: Indicator of whether the school participates in the Special Assistance Plan program, marked as 'Yes' or 'No'.

autonomous_ind.autonomous_ind: Indicator of whether the school has autonomous status, providing greater flexibility in programs and operations.

gifted_ind.gifted_ind: Indicator of whether the school offers a gifted education program for academically talented students.

ip_ind.ip_ind: Indicator of whether the school offers an Integrated Programme that combines secondary and pre-university education.

mothertongue1_code.mothertongue1_code: The primary mother tongue language offered by the school, typically the first language option for students.

mothertongue2_code.mothertongue2_code: The secondary mother tongue language offered by the school, providing an additional language option.

mothertongue3_code.mothertongue3_code: The tertiary mother tongue language offered by the school, representing a third language option for students.

quarter.quarter: The calendar quarter (year and quarter) for which the real estate metrics are reported, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data record.

category.category: A classification label (e.g., property type, region, or market segment) that categorizes the office market data, working with the quarter to define each unique observation.

office_med_rental_lc.office_med_rental_lc: The median rental price for office spaces, measured in local currency units, representing the central tendency of rental costs for the specified quarter and category.

office_med_rental_cd.office_med_rental_cd: The median rental price for office spaces, measured in a common or converted currency (likely USD), providing a standardized value for the specified quarter and category.

office_vancancy_rate.office_vancancy_rate: The office vacancy rate expressed as a percentage, indicating the proportion of unoccupied office space for the specified quarter and category (note: column name contains a typo 'vancancy').

newspaper_title.newspaper_title: The name of the newspaper that published the article, identifying the publication source for this content.

issue_id.issue_id: A unique identifier for the specific newspaper issue containing this article, linking to the publication instance.

issue_date.issue_date: The publication date of the newspaper issue containing this article, providing temporal context for when it was published.

edition.edition: The edition number of the newspaper issue containing this article, indicating the specific version of that day's publication.

page_id.page_id: A unique identifier for the specific page containing this article, linking to the physical location within the newspaper issue.

page_number.page_number: The page number within the newspaper issue where this article appears, indicating its physical placement in the publication.

article_id.article_id: A unique identifier for each individual newspaper article, serving as the primary key for tracking specific content items.

article_title.article_title: The headline or title of the newspaper article, describing the subject or topic of this specific content piece.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: The first 50 words of the article's text content, providing a preview or excerpt of the article's main content.

year.year: The calendar year when the student enrollment data was recorded, providing temporal context for each activity type's participation numbers.

type.type: The category or classification of the extracurricular activity or class, serving as the primary subject being tracked for enrollment trends over time.

students.students: The count of students enrolled in each activity type during the specified year, representing participation volume for that activity.

shs_year.shs_year: The year the Singapore Household Survey (SHS) was conducted, serving as the primary temporal identifier for this dataset.

ethnic_group.ethnic_group: The ethnic classification of the households being measured (e.g., Chinese, Malay, Indian, Others, or 'All' for the total).

no_of_income_earners.no_of_income_earners: A categorical variable indicating the number of persons earning income within a household (e.g., '1 person', '2 persons').

percentage.percentage: The measured percentage of households (for the given year and ethnic group) that have the specified number of income earners.

year.year: The calendar year when the count measurement was taken, serving as a temporal dimension that combines with sector to define each unique observation period.

sector.sector: The categorical classification of entities (Private Sector, Public Sector, Not in Active Practice), representing the main subject whose population counts are being tracked over time.

count.count: The numerical quantity of entities recorded within each sector for a specific year, representing the measured population size for that sector-year combination.

ban_education4.ban_education4: Respondent's education-related characteristic or opinion, with responses including No and missing (-) values indicating non-response or not applicable.

socialnetwork_dp05.socialnetwork_dp05: Respondent's social network characteristic DP05, recorded as a binary No response in the provided samples about a specific network attribute.

ban_q431.ban_q431: Respondent's answer to survey question Q431, recorded as a binary No response in the provided samples about a specific topic or behavior.

socialnetwork_5_slice.socialnetwork_5_slice: Respondent's social network segmentation or grouping, recorded as Yes for all shown samples indicating membership in a specific network segment.

ban_q18_q192.ban_q18_q192: Respondent's combined answer to survey questions Q18 and Q192, with binary Yes/No responses about related topics or behaviors.

students.students: The number of students enrolled or participating in the specified activity type during the given year. This quantitative measurement indicates the size or popularity of the group for that period.

respondent_serial.respondent_serial: A unique identifier for each survey respondent, serving as the primary key for tracking individual participants in the study.

ban_occupation_status4.ban_occupation_status4: An occupation status indicator for the respondent, representing one of several occupation-related classifications in the survey.

ban_children3.ban_children3: A children-related attribute for the respondent, indicating specific information about children in the household.

ban_q30_2.ban_q30_2: The respondent's answer to survey question Q30_2, showing their attitude or opinion on a specific topic (values include Neutral, T2B).

ban_gender.ban_gender: The respondent's gender, a fundamental demographic characteristic for population analysis.

ban_q432.ban_q432: The respondent's answer to survey question Q432, capturing a specific yes/no response about behaviors or attitudes.

q20_q212.q20_q212: The respondent's answer to survey question Q20_Q212, recording a specific yes/no response to a survey item.

ban_no_ofchildren.ban_no_ofchildren: The number of children the respondent has, quantifying family size for demographic analysis.

ban_mhi.ban_mhi: The respondent's monthly household income bracket, providing socioeconomic classification for analysis.

ban_q437.ban_q437: The respondent's answer to survey question Q437, capturing another specific yes/no response in the survey.

ban_q18_q191.ban_q18_q191: The respondent's answer to survey question Q18_Q191, recording a yes/no response to a particular survey item.

ban_children2.ban_children2: Another children-related attribute for the respondent, providing additional information about household composition.

ban_occupation_status2.ban_occupation_status2: A further occupation status classification for the respondent, adding to the occupational profile.

ban_occupation_role8.ban_occupation_role8: The respondent's occupational role, specifying their position or function in their occupation.

ban_children4.ban_children4: Additional children-related information for the respondent, completing the household composition data.

socialnetwork_2_slice.socialnetwork_2_slice: Another social network usage indicator for the respondent, showing engagement with different platforms.

newspaper_title.newspaper_title: The name of the newspaper that published the article, identifying the source publication for this piece of content.

issue_id.issue_id: A unique identifier for the specific newspaper issue in which this article was published, linking the article to its broader publication context.

edition.edition: The edition number of the newspaper issue, offering additional specificity about the version of the publication that contains this article.

article_id.article_id: The unique identifier for this specific newspaper article, serving as the primary key for the individual piece of journalistic content.

article_title.article_title: The headline or title of the article, describing the main subject or topic of this piece of journalistic content.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: The first approximately 50 words of the article's body text, providing a content preview or snippet of this journalistic piece.

period.period: The year when the customer or visitor data was collected, providing temporal context for the country statistics.

region.region: The geographical area or continent grouping for the country, categorizing the location of the customer or visitor data.

cor.cor: The specific country or territory for which customer or visitor statistics are recorded, serving as the primary entity in this dataset.

repeat.repeat: The count or percentage of returning customers or visitors for the specified country and period, measuring ongoing engagement.

not_stated.not_stated: The count or percentage of customers or visitors with unspecified status for the specified country and period, representing unclassified data points.

regno.regno: A unique registration number that identifies each individual record, serving as the primary key for the dataset.

fullname.fullname: The complete name of the individual, representing a key personal attribute of the person identified by the registration number.

branch.branch: The department or division to which the individual is assigned, classifying the person's organizational affiliation.

year.year: The calendar year when the English pass rate measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for the educational performance data.

no_of_registered_electors.no_of_registered_electors: The total number of eligible voters registered in this constituency for the specified election year, representing the voting population size.

no_of_spoilt_ballot_papers.no_of_spoilt_ballot_papers: The number of ballot papers that were spoiled or damaged in this constituency during the specified election, reflecting ballot integrity issues.

reason_non_completion.reason_non_completion: The categorical classification explaining why supervision was not completed, describing the primary cause for cases within each cohort year.

cases.cases: The count of supervision non-completion occurrences, measuring the volume of cases for each specific cohort year and reason combination.

annual.annual: The year of measurement, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data record in this time-series dataset.
