year.year: The calendar year for which water sales data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing all measurements in this dataset.

level_1.level_1: The primary category of measurement, which in this dataset specifically tracks 'Sales Of Potable Water' as the main metric being reported across all records.

level_2.level_2: A sub-category classification that distinguishes between domestic and non-domestic water sales, providing segmentation within the primary water sales measurement.

value.value: The numerical measurement representing the volume or amount of potable water sold, quantified for each specific year and customer segment combination.

year.year: The calendar year for which the enterprise statistics are reported, serving as the temporal reference point for all measurements in this dataset.

level_1.level_1: The primary category of enterprise share being measured, such as employment share, nominal value added share, or enterprise count share, classifying the type of economic indicator.

level_2.level_2: The secondary classification within each primary category, typically distinguishing between local and foreign enterprises, providing granular breakdown of the share measurements.

value.value: The numerical percentage value representing the share measurement for the specified year and categories, quantifying the economic indicator being tracked.

shs_year.shs_year: The year the Singapore Household Survey (SHS) was conducted, serving as the primary temporal context that groups all demographic segments and their associated data.

role.role: The legal or occupancy role (e.g., Owner, Occupier, Co-owner) of individuals within households, categorizing their tenure status for the given survey year.

relationship.relationship: The familial or legal relationship (e.g., Spouse, Sibling, Parents) of individuals to the main household reference person, categorizing their family tie for the given survey year.

percentage.percentage: The proportion (as a percentage) of the surveyed population that belongs to the specific demographic segment defined by the combination of survey year, role, and relationship.

year.year: The calendar year for which the demographic data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing population statistics.

level_1.level_1: The primary demographic classification category, typically representing ethnic and gender groups such as 'Total Residents', 'Total Female Malays', or 'Other Ethnic Groups (Males)'.

level_2.level_2: The age group classification for the demographic data, specifying ranges like '35 - 39 Years' or '90 Years & Over' to categorize population by age brackets.

value.value: The population count or numerical measurement for the specific demographic segment (defined by level_1 and level_2) in the given year, representing the size of that population group.

year.year: The academic year when the course was offered or available, indicating the temporal context for this educational program.

school.school: The specific academic department or school within the institution that offers this course, representing the organizational unit responsible for the program.

course_name.course_name: The official title or name of the educational course, serving as the primary identifier for this academic program.

course_description.course_description: A detailed explanation of the course content, objectives, and intended learning outcomes, providing comprehensive information about what the course covers.

reference.reference: A web URL link to additional official information about the course, serving as an external resource for further details about this educational program.

ban_age.ban_age: The age group of the survey respondent, representing demographic information about the individual's life stage.

socialnetwork_1_slice.socialnetwork_1_slice: Indicates whether the respondent participates in social network activities, showing their social engagement level.

md_segment.md_segment: The moral foundation segment classification of the respondent (e.g., Harm_Care, Purity_Degradation), categorizing their ethical orientation.

livinginsg_3_slice.livinginsg_3_slice: The respondent's agreement level with statements about living in Singapore, reflecting their residential satisfaction or perspective.

ban_q434.ban_q434: Survey response to question Q434, capturing specific opinion or behavioral data from the respondent.

levelsch.levelsch: The highest level of schooling completed by the respondent, indicating their educational attainment.

ban_occupation_status2.ban_occupation_status2: Indicates the respondent's current employment status, showing whether they are actively working.

ban_education4.ban_education4: Additional education-related information about the respondent, providing further educational context.

ban_education1.ban_education1: Primary education level information for the respondent, detailing their foundational education.

children.children: Indicates whether the respondent has children, representing their parental status.

ban_q28.ban_q28: Survey response to question Q28 about authority figures, capturing who the respondent considers authoritative.

ban_education3.ban_education3: Tertiary education information for the respondent, showing higher education details.

occupation2.occupation2: The respondent's specific occupational category or job type, describing their professional role.

livinginsg_2_slice.livinginsg_2_slice: Additional perspective on living in Singapore, providing more nuanced residential feedback.

q20_q213.q20_q213: Combined survey response to questions Q20 and Q213, capturing related opinion data.

rankmostimptchild_2.rankmostimptchild_2: Secondary ranking of importance regarding children-related values or priorities.

sliderliberty_1_slice.sliderliberty_1_slice: Response to liberty-related slider scale questions, measuring freedom/autonomy values.

socialnetwork_2_slice.socialnetwork_2_slice: Additional social network participation indicator, showing different aspects of social engagement.

ban_q30_2.ban_q30_2: Survey response to question Q30 part 2, capturing specific opinion data.

rankmostimptchild_1.rankmostimptchild_1: Primary ranking of importance regarding children-related values or priorities.

ban_occupation_role6.ban_occupation_role6: Detailed occupational role information for the respondent, specifying their job function.

yearbornin_1_slice.yearbornin_1_slice: The respondent's birth year or birth year range, providing precise age data.

ban_q30_4.ban_q30_4: Survey response to question Q30 part 4, capturing additional opinion data.

socialnetwork_dp08.socialnetwork_dp08: Social network data point 08, measuring specific aspects of social connectivity.

q20_q212.q20_q212: Combined survey response to questions Q20 and Q212, capturing related opinion data.

ban_q437.ban_q437: Survey response to question Q437, capturing specific opinion or behavioral data.

ban_occupation_role5.ban_occupation_role5: Additional occupational role detail for the respondent, further specifying job characteristics.

ban_children1.ban_children1: Primary children-related information for the respondent, detailing parental status.

ban_q18_q191.ban_q18_q191: Combined survey response to questions Q18 and Q191, capturing related opinion data.

ban_q32.ban_q32: Survey response to question Q32, capturing specific opinion data.

respondent_id.respondent_id: A unique identifier for each survey participant, serving as the primary key for tracking individual respondents in the study.

whichauthority.whichauthority: The type of authority figure the respondent respects or follows, indicating their preferred source of guidance.

socialnetwork_dp07.socialnetwork_dp07: Social network data point 07, measuring specific aspects of social connectivity and relationships.

highestlevel.highestlevel: The highest educational level achieved by the respondent, summarizing their academic qualifications.

ban_q433.ban_q433: Survey response to question Q433, capturing specific opinion or behavioral data.

ban_no_ofchildren.ban_no_ofchildren: The number of children the respondent has, quantifying their family size.

ban_children4.ban_children4: Additional children-related information for the respondent, providing further family context.

year.year: The calendar year when the property tender/allocation process occurred, providing temporal context for the transaction.

property_location.property_location: The specific address or description of the property being tendered or allocated, serving as the primary subject of each transaction record.

mode_of_allocation.mode_of_allocation: The method used to allocate the property, with all records showing 'Tender' indicating a competitive bidding process.

land_area.land_area: The total land area of the property in square meters, representing the physical size of the allocated plot.

gross_floor_area.gross_floor_area: The total built-up floor area in square meters that can be developed on the property, indicating development capacity.

tendered_uses.tendered_uses: The permitted or intended uses for the property as specified in the tender, defining what activities are allowed on the premises.

tenure.tenure: The lease duration or rental period granted for the property, typically expressed in years with renewal options.

closing_date.closing_date: The date when the tender submission period ended, marking the deadline for bid submissions.

award_date.award_date: The date when the tender was officially awarded to the successful bidder, finalizing the allocation.

award_value_per_month_for_the_first_term.award_value_per_month_for_the_first_term: The monthly rental value awarded for the initial lease term, representing the financial terms of the allocation.

successful_bidder.successful_bidder: The company or entity that won the tender and was awarded the right to use the property.

year.year: The calendar year when the development status data was recorded, providing temporal context for tracking construction project progress over time.

development_status.development_status: The categorical classification of construction or development projects, representing the primary subject of this dataset with categories like 'Under Construction', 'Planned - Written Permission', etc.

no_of_units.no_of_units: The count of housing or construction units associated with each development status in a given year, measuring the volume of units in different project stages.

year.year: The calendar year for which the space data is recorded, providing temporal context for the development status and space amounts.

type_of_space.type_of_space: The category of commercial real estate being tracked, serving as the primary classification for the development data (e.g., Office Space, Retail Space).

development_status.development_status: The current phase in the development lifecycle of the commercial space, describing its planning or construction stage relative to the type of space.

amount_of_space.amount_of_space: The quantity of commercial space available or planned, measured in square footage or similar units, associated with the specific space type and development status for the given year.

period.period: The month and year when the measurement was recorded, formatted as YYYY-MM, indicating the temporal context for each country's data point.

region.region: The geographical area or continent where the country is located, categorizing countries into broader regional groupings like EUROPE, ASIA, AMERICAS, etc.

cor.cor: The name of the country or corporate entity being measured, serving as the primary subject that identifies what entity the data represents.

vdays.vdays: A numerical measurement value associated with the country for the given period, likely representing volume, days, or some quantitative metric (exact meaning depends on domain context).

year.year: The academic year for which the educational statistics are recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for tracking trends in student and teacher populations.

sex.sex: The gender classification of the student population for that year, indicating whether the statistics represent female-only (F) or mixed/co-educational (MF) institutions.

school_type.school_type: The classification of school administration type for that year, categorizing institutions as government-run, government-aided, autonomous, or independent.

students_preu.students_preu: The total number of pre-university level students enrolled for that specific year, gender classification, and school type, measuring the student population size.

teachers_preu.teachers_preu: The total number of teachers employed at the pre-university level for that specific year, gender classification, and school type, measuring the teaching staff capacity.

noofchildren.noofchildren: The number of children in the household, serving as a key demographic attribute of the survey respondent or household.

q20_q214.q20_q214: A survey question response (Yes/No) related to the household, indicating a specific characteristic or behavior.

ban_education1.ban_education1: A binary indicator (Yes/No) for an education-related status of the respondent, describing an educational attribute.

ban_q436.ban_q436: A binary indicator (Yes/No) for a survey question response, representing another characteristic of the household.

ban_q18_q194.ban_q18_q194: A binary indicator (Yes/No) for a survey question response, capturing a specific aspect of the respondent's profile.

socialnetwork_dp08.socialnetwork_dp08: A binary indicator (Yes/No) for participation in a social network, reflecting the respondent's social engagement.

ban_personal_inc.ban_personal_inc: The personal income bracket of the respondent (Low, Medium, High), describing the economic status of the household.

socialnetwork_5_slice.socialnetwork_5_slice: A binary indicator (Yes/No) for another dimension of social network involvement, indicating further social connectivity.

year.year: The year for which the property development data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for grouping the statistics.

type_of_property.type_of_property: The classification of property type, either Landed Properties or Non-Landed Properties, describing a key characteristic of the development data.

development_status.development_status: The stage of the property development process (e.g., Under Construction, Planned - Others), indicating the progress status for the recorded units.

no_of_units.no_of_units: The number of property units corresponding to the specific year, property type, and development status, quantifying the scale of development.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year for which tax arrears data is reported, serving as the primary temporal context for all arrears records in this dataset.

tax_type.tax_type: The specific category of tax for which arrears are owed, such as Corporate Income Tax, Goods & Services Tax, or Property Tax, indicating the nature of the tax liability.

arrears_type.arrears_type: Classification of whether the tax arrears originated in the current financial year or accumulated from previous financial years, showing the timing of the arrears accumulation.

tax_arrears.tax_arrears: The monetary amount of unpaid taxes owed to the government, representing the quantitative value of tax arrears for the specified year, tax type, and arrears type.

year.year: The calendar year when the diagnosis measurement was recorded, providing temporal context for when each condition's prevalence rate was observed.

condition.condition: The medical condition or disease being tracked, serving as the primary entity for which diagnosis rates are measured over time.

percentage_diagnoses.percentage_diagnoses: The percentage of diagnoses or prevalence rate for the corresponding medical condition in the given year, representing the measured frequency of that health condition.

year_of_assessment.year_of_assessment: The specific fiscal year for which the tax data is being reported, providing the temporal context for the associated tax set-off statistics.

type_of_tax_set_offs.type_of_tax_set_offs: The category or classification of the tax relief, credit, or deduction scheme, serving as the primary subject of this dataset (e.g., Double Taxation Relief, Parenthood Tax Rebate).

no_of_claimants.no_of_claimants: The number of taxpayers who claimed a particular type of tax set-off in the given assessment year, indicating the popularity or uptake of that benefit.

amount.amount: The total monetary sum associated with a specific tax set-off type for the given year, representing the aggregate financial impact of that tax provision.

month.month: The year and month of the observation, serving as the primary temporal dimension for tracking air passenger departure statistics over time.

level_1.level_1: The metric or indicator being measured, specifically the count of air passenger departures, defining what the value represents for each month and region.

level_2.level_2: The geographic region or area for which the air passenger departure data is reported, categorizing the data within each monthly observation.

value.value: The numerical count of air passenger departures for the specified month, metric, and region, representing the core measurement in the dataset.

year.year: The calendar year when the enrollment rate was measured, providing temporal context for the education statistics.

level_of_education.level_of_education: The educational stage being measured (lower or upper secondary education), categorizing the type of schooling enrollment being reported.

sex.sex: The gender classification for the enrollment data (Male, Female, or combined Male-Female), providing demographic breakdown of the statistics.

total_net_enrolment_rate.total_net_enrolment_rate: The percentage of eligible population enrolled at the specified education level, representing the core educational outcome measurement for the given year, education level, and gender group.

year.year: The reference year for the statistical data point, serving as the primary temporal dimension for organizing this dataset on teacher demographics.

sex.sex: The gender category (e.g., M, F, MF for combined) of the teachers counted, representing a key demographic breakdown for the given year and other attributes.

level_of_school.level_of_school: The educational level (Primary, Secondary, Pre-University) where the teachers were employed, categorizing the teaching context for the statistical count in the given year.

age.age: The age group range of the teachers (e.g., '25 - 29', '55 & ABOVE'), providing a demographic age breakdown for the teacher count in the given year.

no_of_teachers.no_of_teachers: The number of teachers counted, representing the quantitative measurement that corresponds to the specific combination of year, sex, school level, and age group.

quarter.quarter: The calendar quarter (year and period) for which the allocation and supply data is recorded, providing the temporal context for each product segment's metrics.

product_segment.product_segment: The category or type of industrial property development or park (e.g., Business Park, Logistics Park), serving as the primary entity for which allocation and supply are tracked.

total_allocated.total_allocated: The amount of space that has been allocated or occupied within the specified product segment during the quarter, representing the utilized portion of the available supply.

supply.supply: The total available capacity or supply of space for the specified product segment as of the quarter, indicating the maximum allocatable area for that segment.

year.year: The calendar year for which the count of licensed food establishments is reported, providing the temporal context for the data record.

level_1.level_1: The high-level category grouping all specific food establishment types, consistently labeled as 'Total Licensed Food Establishments' in this dataset.

level_2.level_2: The specific type or sub-category of licensed food establishment (e.g., Supermarkets, Food Stalls), serving as the main entity being counted and analyzed.

value.value: The numerical count of licensed food establishments for the specified type ('level_2') in the given year, representing the quantitative measurement for each record.

year.year: The calendar year for which the count of the facility type is recorded, providing the temporal context for the measurement.

facility.facility: The type of transport infrastructure being counted, such as bridges, tunnels, or flyovers. This is the primary entity or category for the data.

number.number: The count or total quantity of the specified facility type that existed or was recorded in the given year, representing a quantitative measure of infrastructure.

shs_year.shs_year: The year when the survey or data collection was conducted, providing the temporal context for the housing and family composition statistics.

flat_type.flat_type: The classification of the housing unit by size/type (e.g., 1-room, 5-room, Executive), serving as the primary category for analyzing household characteristics.

type_of_family_nucleus.type_of_family_nucleus: The type of family structure (e.g., Nuclear, Extended Nuclear, Multi-nuclear) residing in the given flat type, describing the household composition for that housing category.

percentage.percentage: The percentage of households of the specified flat type and family structure in the given survey year, quantifying the prevalence of that household composition.

year.year: The calendar year when the web presence measurement was recorded, serving as the temporal identifier for this dataset tracking business technology adoption over time.

employment_size.employment_size: A categorical classification of businesses based on their number of employees, with categories including small (below 10), medium (10-199), and large (200+), representing the organizational scale dimension of the data.

web_presence.web_presence: A percentage or proportion value indicating what percentage of businesses in each employment size category had an online/web presence during the specified year, measuring digital adoption across different business scales.

block.block: A unique identifier for each block or entity, serving as the primary key that represents individual corporate or organizational units in the system.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: The current operational status of the entity/block, categorizing its legal or administrative standing such as active, cancelled, or dissolved.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: The identifier of the regulatory agency responsible for issuing or overseeing the entity, indicating which authority governs this block's registration.

year.year: The calendar year associated with the vehicle count data, categorizing when the vehicles were manufactured or registered for each make.

make.make: The name of the vehicle manufacturer or brand, serving as the primary entity identifier around which the count data is organized.

number.number: The count or quantity of vehicles for the specified manufacturer in the given year, representing the measurement of vehicles associated with that make.

year.year: The calendar year for which recruitment and resignation statistics are recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data observation.

recruitment_rate.recruitment_rate: The rate or percentage of recruitment activity occurring during the specified year, measuring workforce expansion or hiring intensity for that period.

resignation_rate.resignation_rate: The rate or percentage of resignations occurring during the specified year, measuring workforce attrition or employee turnover for that period.

year.year: The academic year for which the enrollment data is reported, providing the temporal context for the student count associated with each course.

school.school: The academic division or faculty (e.g., School of Design, School of Engineering) that offers the course, categorizing the program within the institution's structure.

course_type.course_type: The mode of study for the course (e.g., Full-Time), indicating the program's delivery format and intensity.

course_name.course_name: The specific name of the diploma or degree program (e.g., Diploma in Communication Design), serving as the primary identifier for the educational course being analyzed.

gender.gender: The gender category (e.g., Female, Male) used to segment the enrollment count, providing a demographic breakdown of students in the course.

count.count: The number of students enrolled in the course for the given year, school, course type, and gender combination, representing the quantitative measure of enrollment.

unit_no.unit_no: An identifier for a specific business unit, branch, or location, serving as the primary key for this record of business registration details.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: A textual description of the secondary business activity conducted by this unit, classifying its non-primary operations.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The date when the Unique Entity Number was issued for this business unit, marking its official registration in the system.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The original date of business registration or incorporation for the entity associated with this unit, indicating its founding or legal establishment.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: The legal structure or constitution of the business for this unit (e.g., Sole Proprietor), defining its ownership and liability framework.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: The Singapore Standard Industrial Classification (SSIC) code for the secondary business activity of this unit, providing a standardized classification.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Singapore Standard Industrial Classification (SSIC) code for this business unit, representing its main economic activity in a standardized format.

year.year: The calendar year for which the sick leave statistics are reported, serving as the temporal context for all industry-specific absence data.

industry1.industry1: The broadest industry sector classification (e.g., services, manufacturing) for which sick leave metrics are reported in a given year.

industry2.industry2: A more specific industry classification within the industry1 sector, providing finer granularity for sick leave analysis by year.

industry3.industry3: The most detailed industry classification within industry2, representing the specific sub-sector for year-based sick leave reporting.

sick_leave.sick_leave: The type of sick leave being measured (outpatient or hospitalisation) for a specific industry classification in a given year.

avg_days_per_absentee.avg_days_per_absentee: The average number of sick days taken per employee who was absent, measured for a specific industry, year, and leave type.

avg_days_per_employee.avg_days_per_employee: The average number of sick days taken per employee overall, calculated for a specific industry classification, year, and leave type.

year.year: The calendar year when the funding data was recorded, providing temporal context for the sector's revenue composition.

sector.sector: The category or domain of organizations being analyzed, representing the main subject of this funding source analysis.

percent_of_annual_receipts_by_donations.percent_of_annual_receipts_by_donations: The percentage of total annual receipts that came from donations for this sector, measuring reliance on charitable contributions.

percent_of_annual_receipts_by_govt_grant.percent_of_annual_receipts_by_govt_grant: The percentage of total annual receipts that came from government grants for this sector, measuring public funding support.

percent_of_annual_receipts_by_others.percent_of_annual_receipts_by_others: The percentage of total annual receipts from other sources not categorized as donations or government grants for this sector, representing alternative funding streams.

quarter.quarter: The calendar quarter (year and quarter) for which the forecast indicator is applicable, providing the temporal context for the forecast data point.

level_1.level_1: The specific type of business or economic forecast being measured, such as export orders, investment, or employment, serving as the primary categorical subject of each record.

value.value: The numerical forecast value for the specified indicator and quarter, representing the predicted level, change, or index for that metric.

socialnetwork_1_slice.socialnetwork_1_slice: Indicates whether the respondent uses social network 1 (Yes/No), showing their engagement with this specific social platform.

rankmostimptchild_2.rankmostimptchild_2: Ranking of importance for child-related factor 2, showing the respondent's prioritization of this aspect.

yearbornin_1_slice.yearbornin_1_slice: The birth year or year range of the respondent, indicating their generational cohort.

year.year: The calendar year for which the employment data is recorded, providing the temporal context for the art form's employment figure.

artform.artform: The category or discipline of artistic practice (e.g., Visual Arts, Film), serving as the primary subject for which employment data is tracked.

employment.employment: The total number of individuals employed within the specified art form during the given year, representing a quantitative measure of workforce size.

year.year: The calendar year to which the design filing data and rank correspond, providing the temporal context for the metrics associated with the design class.

design_class.design_class: The category or classification of designs (e.g., Lighting apparatus, Tools and hardware), serving as the primary entity describing the type of design being tracked.

design_filings.design_filings: The number of design filings recorded for a specific design class in a given year, quantifying the application activity for that category.

rank.rank: The relative ranking of the design class based on the number of filings within a given year, indicating its popularity or activity level compared to other categories.

year.year: The calendar year for which the crime statistics are recorded, serving as the temporal context for all demographic and offence data in this dataset.

population_by_gender.population_by_gender: The gender classification (Male/Female) of the population being measured, representing the demographic breakdown of individuals in the crime statistics.

population_by_main_offence_group.population_by_main_offence_group: The primary category of criminal offence committed, classifying individuals into different crime types such as Property Crimes, Crimes Against Person, etc.

number_of_population.number_of_population: The count of individuals falling into the specific combination of year, gender, and offence category, representing the quantitative measurement for each statistical record.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: The identifier for the government agency that issued the Unique Entity Number (UEN), typically ACRA for Singapore business entities.

uen.uen: The Unique Entity Number serving as the primary identifier for each registered business entity in Singapore, uniquely identifying the main subject of this record.

entity_name.entity_name: The official registered name of the business entity as recorded with the regulatory authority.

entity_type_description.entity_type_description: The classification of the business entity type, such as 'Business', 'Local Company', or 'LLP', describing its legal form.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: The legal structure or constitution of the business entity, such as 'Sole Proprietor', indicating its organizational framework.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: The current operational and legal status of the entity, such as 'Live Company', 'Cancelled', or 'Dissolved', showing its active state.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date when the business entity was originally registered or incorporated, marking its establishment.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The specific date when the Unique Entity Number was issued to this business entity by the regulatory authority.

address_type.address_type: The type of address recorded, such as 'LOCAL' for Singapore addresses, classifying the entity's location type.

total_foreign_reserve_usd.total_foreign_reserve_usd: The total value of Singapore's foreign reserves converted to US Dollars for the reported month, providing an internationally comparable measure of reserve holdings.

year.year: The calendar year when the enrollment rate data was collected or measured, serving as the temporal context for all education enrollment observations.

level_of_education.level_of_education: The educational stage or tier being measured, categorizing enrollment rates as either lower secondary or upper secondary education levels for each year's data.

sex.sex: The gender classification for the enrollment rate data, specifying whether the rate applies to males (M), females (F), or both combined (MF) for each year and education level.

total_net_enrolment_rate.total_net_enrolment_rate: The percentage of the relevant age group enrolled in the specified education level, representing the actual enrollment measurement for the given year, education level, and gender combination.

year.year: The calendar year when the vaccination data was recorded, providing temporal context for when the doses were administered for each vaccination type.

vaccination_type.vaccination_type: The specific type of vaccine administered (e.g., Poliomyelitis, Diphtheria tetanus, Measles mumps rubella), serving as the primary category being measured in this vaccination statistics dataset.

no_of_doses_in_thousands.no_of_doses_in_thousands: The number of vaccine doses administered for the specified vaccination type in the given year, measured in thousands, representing the quantitative volume of vaccinations delivered.

month.month: The specific year and month for which the data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each data entry.

level_1.level_1: The category or classification of the data being measured for the given month, such as the type of mail volume being reported.

value.value: The quantitative measurement (e.g., volume, count, or amount) associated with the specified category for that particular month.

month.month: The month and year for which visitor arrival statistics are recorded, serving as the temporal dimension for this tourism data series.

level_1.level_1: The top-level geographic classification representing major world regions or continent groups (e.g., Europe, Asia, Americas) for categorizing visitor origins.

level_2.level_2: The second-level geographic classification representing sub-regions or country groups within the level_1 category, providing more detailed geographic breakdown.

level_3.level_3: The most specific geographic classification representing individual countries or territories within the level_2 grouping, identifying the precise country of residence for visitors.

value.value: The number of international visitor arrivals recorded for the specified month and geographic classification, representing the quantitative measurement in this tourism statistics dataset.

year.year: The calendar year when the wage data was collected or measured, providing temporal context for the occupation statistics.

occ_desc.occ_desc: The job title or occupational description being analyzed, serving as the primary subject for wage measurement and comparison.

estab_size1.estab_size1: The first establishment size classification filter applied to the data, with 'all' indicating no filtering by establishment size in this dimension.

estab_size2.estab_size2: The second establishment size classification based on employee count, categorizing workplaces as either 'less than 200 employees' or 'at least 200 employees'.

age_grp1.age_grp1: The age group category of employees included in the wage statistics, such as '25-29', '30-39', etc., providing demographic context.

mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile: The median (50th percentile) monthly gross wage for the specified occupation, representing total compensation including allowances and bonuses.

mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile: The median (50th percentile) monthly basic wage for the specified occupation, representing the core salary excluding additional allowances.

year.year: The calendar year when the wage data was collected or measured, providing temporal context for the occupation's compensation statistics.

occ_desc.occ_desc: The description or title of the occupation being analyzed, serving as the primary subject for which wage statistics are reported.

ind1.ind1: The primary industry classification for the occupation, typically a broad category (like 'all' in this dataset) indicating the industry scope of the wage data.

ind2.ind2: A more specific industry classification or sector where the occupation is found, providing detailed context about the employment environment for the wage statistics.

mthly_gross_wage_75_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_75_pctile: The 75th percentile value of monthly gross wages for this occupation, representing the wage level at which 75% of workers earn less and 25% earn more.

mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile: The median (50th percentile) of monthly gross wages for this occupation, indicating the middle value where half of workers earn more and half earn less.

mthly_gross_wage_25_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_25_pctile: The 25th percentile value of monthly gross wages for this occupation, representing the wage level at which 25% of workers earn less and 75% earn more.

mthly_basic_wage_75_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_75_pctile: The 75th percentile of monthly basic wages (excluding bonuses and allowances) for this occupation, showing the base salary distribution's upper quartile.

mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile: The median of monthly basic wages for this occupation, indicating the middle value of base salaries without additional compensation components.

mthly_basic_wage_25_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_25_pctile: The 25th percentile of monthly basic wages for this occupation, showing the base salary distribution's lower quartile.

ban_education4.ban_education4: Indicates whether the respondent has a specific education level (likely tertiary education), representing an educational attainment attribute of the respondent.

ban_q30_3.ban_q30_3: Survey response to a question about freedom of expression conditions, capturing the respondent's attitude toward speech restrictions.

rankmostimptchild_new_2.rankmostimptchild_new_2: Ranking of importance for a child-related attribute or value, reflecting the respondent's priorities regarding child development.

vbc.vbc: Full text of a survey question or statement about freedom of expression rights, showing the specific prompt respondents were evaluating.

livinginsg_4_slice.livinginsg_4_slice: Attitude toward living in Singapore statement, indicating the respondent's level of agreement with a specific aspect of Singapore life.

ban_occupation_status7.ban_occupation_status7: Indicates whether the respondent has a specific occupation status, representing employment classification of the respondent.

ban_q30_4.ban_q30_4: Survey response to another freedom of expression question, capturing additional attitudinal data from the respondent.

ban_occupation_status1.ban_occupation_status1: Primary occupation status indicator, showing the respondent's main employment classification.

ban_q18_q191.ban_q18_q191: Response to a survey question about social attitudes or behaviors, providing insight into the respondent's perspectives.

livinginsg_2_slice.livinginsg_2_slice: Another attitude toward living in Singapore, representing the respondent's agreement level with different aspects of Singapore society.

ban_occupation_status6.ban_occupation_status6: Additional occupation status indicator, providing further employment classification detail for the respondent.

hhi.hhi: Household income bracket, representing the economic status of the respondent's household.

ban_occupation_status5.ban_occupation_status5: Occupation status indicator, contributing to the comprehensive employment profile of the respondent.

respondent_serial.respondent_serial: Unique identifier for each survey participant, serving as the primary key that links all respondent data together.

ban_marital.ban_marital: Marital status of the respondent, indicating whether they are single, married, or other relationship status.

ban_occupation_status3.ban_occupation_status3: Occupation status classification, adding to the employment profile details of the respondent.

ban_education2.ban_education2: Educational attainment level, representing the respondent's formal education background.

ban_age_youngest.ban_age_youngest: Age of the youngest child in the household, providing family composition information about the respondent.

occupationindustry.occupationindustry: Industry or sector where the respondent works, describing the field of their employment.

gender.gender: Gender identity of the respondent, representing their biological or identified gender.

rankmostimptchild_new_1.rankmostimptchild_new_1: Primary ranking of importance for child-related attributes, showing the respondent's top priority for children.

ban_age.ban_age: Age group of the respondent, categorizing them into demographic age brackets.

socialnetwork_dp01.socialnetwork_dp01: Response regarding social network or media usage, indicating the respondent's engagement with digital platforms.

socialnetwork_dp04.socialnetwork_dp04: Additional social network behavior response, providing more detail about the respondent's online activities.

livinginsg_1_slice.livinginsg_1_slice: Primary attitude toward living in Singapore, representing the respondent's overall satisfaction or agreement.

ban_children4.ban_children4: Indicates whether the respondent has children, providing basic family composition information.

socialnetwork_4_slice.socialnetwork_4_slice: Social network usage pattern or attitude, capturing how the respondent engages with online communities.

occupation2.occupation2: Detailed occupation classification, specifying the respondent's job type or professional category.

ban_q432.ban_q432: Survey response to a specific question, adding to the attitudinal profile of the respondent.

socialnetwork_3_slice.socialnetwork_3_slice: Social media or network behavior indicator, showing patterns in the respondent's online interactions.

ban_q18_q194.ban_q18_q194: Additional survey question response, contributing to the comprehensive attitudinal data for the respondent.

ban_occupation_role3.ban_occupation_role3: Specific role or position within occupation, providing detailed employment information about the respondent.

ban_q30_2.ban_q30_2: Another freedom of expression attitude response, building the respondent's profile on speech-related issues.

yearbornin_1_slice.yearbornin_1_slice: Year of birth or birth cohort, providing generational context for the respondent.

ban_q435.ban_q435: Survey response to an attitudinal question, adding to the respondent's profile of opinions and beliefs.

socialnetwork_dp06.socialnetwork_dp06: Social network dependency or usage frequency, indicating how integral online platforms are to the respondent.

ban_occupation_status4.ban_occupation_status4: Occupation status indicator, completing the employment classification details for the respondent.

ageofrespondent.ageofrespondent: Exact age in years of the respondent, providing precise demographic information for analysis.
